100.action: [2694d0]TRAILBLAZE[-] north through gaps in the trees
100.text: The moss is pleasant under your feet as you trailblaze through the dense forest. Go to [b]Location 105[/b].
You hope your water-soaked toes will dry before you start getting blisters. Go to [b]Location 410[/b].

101.action: [2694d0]CHASE[-] away the animal to clear a path north (if the animal is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
101.text: You make yourself big, spooking the animal. Gain 1 morale; you may go north to [b]Location 106[/b].
A menagerie of forest creatures stares at you as you float past them downstream. Go to [b]Location 472[/b].

102.action: [2694d0]WADE[-] north, using the shallow stream as a trail
102.text: The stone rings along the stream look both crafted and natural at the same time. Go to [b]Location 107[/b].

102.action: [2694d0]TRAILBLAZE[-] south around the outskirts of a city
102.text: The pleasant cacophony of the brightly colored birds here reminds you of an orchestra warming up. Choose one:

choices.option: Enter the city from the north
choices.outcome: Go to city [b]Location 526[/b].

choices.option: Steer clear of the city, heading into the shallows of a sea after you break free of the jungle
choices.outcome: Go to [b]Location 473[/b].

choices.option: Follow the stream north as it winds around the hill
choices.outcome: Go to [b]Location 108[/b].

choices.option: Pay [fff349]1 take[-] and place your palm on the door in the hill
choices.outcome: The stone slides to the side, exposing a gaping cavern. Go to cave [b]Location 095[/b].

103.text: You push through the foliage and step into the vast sea beyond. Gain ability [b]Item 1489[/b] and go to [b]Location 474[/b].

104.text: A large animal bathing in the waterfall doesn’t notice you as you hike by. Go to [b]Location 475[/b].

105.text: You follow a flash of pink that stands out from the green of the dense jungle. Go to [b]Location 100[/b].
At each water crossing, you have renewed gratitude for the lack of mosquitoes on this expedition. Go to [b]Location 411[/b].

106.text: You breathe sparingly as you trailblaze in case inhaling the mushrooms’ spores causes any nasty side effects. Go to [b]Location 107[/b].
The stone surface is slippery, but you make it to the top of the waterfall. Go to [b]Location 111[/b].
Do you hear something skittering on the jungle floor, or is it just the branches you’re pushing out of your way? Go to [b]Location 101[/b].

107.text: The thick jungle vines assist you as you ascend the slippery waterfall. Go to [b]Location 112[/b].
The rhythmic sloshing around your ankles lulls you into a sense of serenity. Go to [b]Location 102[/b].
Your progress is slow, and you hope your crew is having an easier time. Go to [b]Location 106[/b].

108.text: Oddly, you glimpse other animals heading the same direction as you. Go to [b]Location 109[/b].
The bright reflections off the shield and the water make you wish your sunglasses survived the crash. Go to [b]Location 103[/b].

109.action: [2694d0]SNEAK[-] north past the sentient (if the sentient is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
109.text: It’s hard to avoid making noise while carrying your gear. You wish you had some help. Go to [b]Location 114[/b].
The thick ceiling of leaves keeps you safe from sunburn… you just hope there’s no poison ivy. Go to [b]Location 108[/b].

110.text: The first rock is easy to climb, but each successive boulder is significantly larger than the last. You finally emerge at the edge of a lake. Go to [b]Location 115[/b].

111.text: You are remarkably successful at telling yourself not to worry about whatever broke that orb! Go to [b]Location 112[/b].

111.action: [2694d0]DESCEND[-] south down the waterfall to an ancient grove
111.text: Following the water downstream should lead to the coast eventually, right? Go to [b]Location 106[/b].

112.text: The constant spray of the waterfall makes the rocky cliff face difficult to grip, but you manage to reach the top; as you pull yourself over the ledge, you notice an elegant bird watching you silently. Go to [b]Location 117[/b] and gain 1 morale.

112.action: [2694d0]DESCEND[-] south down a small waterfall using vines for leverage
112.text: The vines are slick from the water, but so plentiful that you have no trouble finding handholds. Go to [b]Location 107[/b].
You keep telling yourself that the bizarre life forms are out to get you. Go to [b]Location 111[/b].

113.text: At the top of the cliff, you’re greeted by a view of the surrounding area. View page 41 in the Book of Vantages and gain 2 boost, then go to [b]Location 118[/b].

114.action: [2694d0]HIKE[-] north up the hill or [2694d0]DESCEND[-] into the depths of the well

choices.outcome: You climb the steep hill and then walk back down to a shoreline on the far side. Go to [b]Location 119[/b].
The slick stones lining the interior of the well provide weak footing at best, and you tumble into the darkness. Go to cave [b]Location 095[/b].

115.action: [2694d0]LEAP[-] east across the gaps in the bridge
115.text: With a running start, you clear the first gap by a comfortable margin but the second, longer gap by so little that when you land your foot breaks off a piece of stone that falls into the river below. Go to [b]Location 116[/b] and gain 1 morale.
Besides natural stones, you also see chunks of masonry in the water beneath you. Go to [b]Location 120[/b].
As you head south, you find yourself facing a series of broad, steep boulders. Go to [b]Location 110[/b].

116.text: The water flows directly through the surrounding hills, as if in a trough. Go to [b]Location 111[/b].
Though you’re careful of the turbulent water, your pace quickens with anticipation! Go to [b]Location 115[/b].

117.text: As you hop along the stones, you notice that the wide-beaked bird perched on one of them bears an uncanny resemblance to the frogmouths of Old Earth. Go up the river to [b]Location 122[/b].

As you gently lower yourself over the edge of the slick escarpment, you notice there’s something familiar about the dignified-looking bird watching you descend. Go to [b]Location 112[/b] and gain 1 morale.

118.text: Leaving the animal’s territory, the beams of light piercing the sky catch your attention. Go to [b]Location 123[/b].
The base of the cliff gives way to a vast jungle. Go to [b]Location 113[/b].

119.text: The organic fragrance of the blooms quickly fades as the metal facade looms closer. Go to [b]Location 124[/b].

119.action: [2694d0]HIKE[-] south down the hill toward a well
119.text: The steep grade of the hill is brutal on your knees, and you’re happy to find a wishing well at the bottom. Go to [b]Location 114[/b].

120.text: The best reason to swim toward a volcano is that the warm water is almost like visiting a spa. Go to [b]Location 481[/b].
You don’t like the look of that eruption and decide to put more distance between it and you. Go to [b]Location 115[/b].
The whole area seems to be shaking, so you head off to explore what hasn’t been damaged yet. Go to [b]Location 414[/b].

121.text: What a tranquil scene! Surely nothing hectic could happen on a day such as this. Go to [b]Location 482[/b].

122.text: You make a mental note to look for more transmission towers; they could prove useful. Go to [b]Location 483[/b].

122.action: [2694d0]LEAP[-] south across a series of stones
122.text: You haven’t played hopscotch since you were a kid. Never thought it would come in handy… go figure. Go to [b]Location 117[/b].

123.text: The wind and shadows seem to move in odd bursts that don’t match the lazy clouds in the sky. Go to [b]Location 118[/b].

124.action: [2694d0]ENTER[-] the building to the north through the front door or ◆2 [2694d0]TREK[-] north around the building

choices.outcome: Shocked by your insolence, a guard tries to shove you backwards, which you use as an opening. Roll X dice; if at least 1 result is look, the guard falls for your feint and you go to interior [b]Location 554[/b]. If not, gain 1 boost and continue.
You try to stay in the metal sentients’ good graces and keep a respectful distance. Go to [b]Location 485[/b].

124.text: The structure is reminiscent of a face with unblinking, unnerving eyes. Go to [b]Location 119[/b].

125.text: Roll 2 skill dice and gain all [a84fc0]look[-] results. Then suffer 1 heat damage unless you pay [a84fc0]1 look[-] to spot and avoid the molten cracks in the ground. Go to [b]Location 130[/b].
The air shimmers in the heat and you back away before it saps any more of your strength. Go to [b]Location 376[/b].

126.action: [2694d0]CLIMB[-] east up and over the sheer rock wall
126.text: The rock wall is hot to the touch, reminding you of the particularly high cost of falling during this ascent. You manage to pull yourself over the top and lower yourself into a comparatively hospitable canyon. Go to [b]Location 127[/b] and gain 1 morale.
You feel exposed to the elements… and any watching eyes. Go to [b]Location 131[/b].
Swimming is great for your cardiovascular system that’s still adjusting to the alien air. Go to [b]Location 377[/b].

127.action: [2694d0]WADE[-] south toward a group of merchants
127.text: You head toward the vendors, eager to see if they have anything you can use. Go to [b]Location 378[/b].

127.action: [2694d0]CLIMB[-] west up and over the sheer rock wall
127.text: As you crest the rock wall, you see a shallow pool of lava that makes the west side of the wall much less inviting than the east side you just came from. Go to [b]Location 126[/b] and gain 1 morale.

128.text: The difference between running away and tactical maneuvering is just timing. Go to [b]Location 129[/b].

128.action: [2694d0]EVADE[-] north around the sentient and wade through the water (if the sentient is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
128.text: You stay on rocks wherever possible, and in the shallowest water when necessary. Go to [b]Location 133[/b].

128.action: [2694d0]LEAP[-] south over lava after crossing a narrow strait
128.text: Roll 5 skill dice and gain all [a84fc0]look[-] results. Then suffer 1 heat damage unless you pay [a84fc0]1 look[-] to avoid a scalding stone. Go to [b]Location 379[/b].

129.text: Watching your footing constantly takes so much mental focus you almost forget your mission. Go to [b]Location 380[/b].

129.action: [2694d0]LEAP[-] west over the water using the stones
129.text: Seeing the rocks float makes you wonder if you can defy gravity too. Go to [b]Location 128[/b].

013.action: [2694d0]SQUEEZE[-] into the tunnel to the west
013.text: The narrow tunnel curves and winds down into the earth. The darkness finally gives way to a glowing green chamber. Go to cave [b]Location 097[/b].

130.action: [2694d0]SNEAK[-] north past the gambling sentients (if the sentients are no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
130.text: You take a last furtive glance at the rolling dice, one of the few familiar objects in this strange realm. Go to [b]Location 135[/b].
Roll 2 skill dice and gain all [a84fc0]look[-] results. Then suffer 1 heat damage unless you pay [a84fc0]1 look[-] to spot and avoid the molten cracks in the ground. Then go to [b]Location 125[/b].

131.text: The steep cliff leads east to the edge of a lake. Go to [b]Location 132[/b].
The drop off is so steep that you question why anyone would pitch a tent right on the ledge. Go to [b]Location 136[/b] and gain 1 morale.
The bright red shapes in the distance make it easy to keep your bearings. Go to [b]Location 126[/b].

132.text: The water is frigid and choppy, leaving your extremities almost numb by the time you pull yourself ashore. Go to [b]Location 137[/b], gain 1 morale, and suffer 1 cold damage.
You’re out of breath from the elevation gain, but the view is worth it. Go to [b]Location 131[/b].

133.text: The lush moss is so pleasant to walk on compared to the abundance of rocks. Go to [b]Location 138[/b].
Is this a friend or foe? You hope for the best but prepare for the worst. Go to [b]Location 128[/b].

134.action: [2694d0]BALANCE[-] north along a narrow string of boulders jutting out of the water
134.text: You turn the task into a game by pretending you’re on the balance beam in the Galactic Olympics. Go to [b]Location 139[/b].

135.text: The grass snags your outfit as you hike east. Go to [b]Location 136[/b].
You don’t see the Traveler move at all, yet even after leaving them behind, they’re right back in front of you when you arrive. Go to [b]Location 140[/b].
Maybe you can find more items on the outskirts of the crumbling buildings. Go to [b]Location 406[/b].

136.text: You catch a glimpse of what looks like a red tent at the top of the cliff. Go to [b]Location 131[/b] and gain 1 morale.
You wade through the waist-high grass to ruins that no longer offer much shelter but still offer a great view of the coastline. Go to [b]Location 135[/b].

137.text: The water is shockingly cold, even by the standards of glacial lakes. Go to [b]Location 132[/b], gain 1 morale, and suffer 1 cold damage.

138.text: You try to think of a reason why there would only be a single lotus on the hillside. Go to [b]Location 143[/b].

138.action: [2694d0]BALANCE[-] south along a narrow string of mossy boulders
138.text: You try to convince yourself otherwise, but you’re secretly beginning to enjoy your time on the planet. Go to [b]Location 133[/b].

139.text: The gentle water feels nice between your toes as you head north to [b]Location 144[/b].
The bones in the grass look ominous enough to seek out a different path. Go to [b]Location 134[/b].

014.text: Return to the cave location from which you originally entered the dungeon.

140.text: As you hike along the shore, you pass by the ruins of a large building at the top of the seaside cliff. Go to [b]Location 135[/b].

140.action: [2694d0]WADE[-] west toward a similar rock structure
140.text: The concept of energy being sent through rock formations makes you wonder what else is possible here. Go to [b]Location 407[/b].

141.text: The bones add a sense of adventure during your tour of this new world. Go to [b]Location 146[/b].

142.action: [2694d0]TREK[-] north toward the smell of saltwater
142.text: The metallic scent is quickly replaced by a pleasant ocean breeze wafting up from the shore. Go to [b]Location 147[/b].

143.text: A piece of wreckage could have served as a toboggan on the grass, were it not for the rust. Go to [b]Location 138[/b].

144.action: [2694d0]HIKE[-] north up the steep, slick hill
144.text: You’ve never seen such green grass! It would be great for a picnic if you had the time. Go to [b]Location 149[/b].

144.action: [2694d0]LEAP[-] south from one mossy rock to the next
144.text: The moss is exceptionally springy. Go to [b]Location 139[/b].

145.action: [2694d0]LEAP[-] east off the cliff into the water
145.text: Roll 2 skill dice and gain all [a84fc0]look[-] results. Then lose 1 health unless you pay [a84fc0]1 look[-] to avoid a sharp rock on your way down. Go to [b]Location 146[/b].
The waves seem to stretch on forever, but eventually you pull yourself up on a verdant shoreline. Go to [b]Location 471[/b] and gain 1 morale.

146.text: After an exhausting swim, your muscles ache, but the view of a glistening waterfall pouring into the forest below lifts your spirits. Go to [b]Location 472[/b] and gain 1 morale.
The bird calls fade as you leave the shore, and the quiet offers a time for reflection. Go to [b]Location 141[/b].

You struggle to maintain your grip on the slick, concave cliff wall, but finally you pull yourself over the overhang and onto the soft grass. Gain ability [b]Item 1468[/b] and 1 morale; go to [b]Location 145[/b].

147.action: [2694d0]SWIM[-] east toward a shadow under the waves
147.text: Unless you have item [b]Item 1232[/b], as you splash into the water, a colossal beast rises from the sea, surveying its fresh prey. Roll 2 skill dice and gain all [ec1c3b]overpower[-] results. Then lose 1 health unless you pay [ec1c3b]1 overpower[-]. Go east to [b]Location 148[/b].
The small flock of seabirds follows you on your exhausting swim north across the sea, as if cheering you on. Go to [b]Location 473[/b] and gain 1 morale.
The water looks too vast to cross at the moment, but the debris you saw may prove useful. Go to [b]Location 142[/b].

148.action: [2694d0]TREK[-] north along the beach before wading across an inlet
148.text: Your feet leave footprints in the sand as you trek north and slowly ease into the shallows. Go to [b]Location 474[/b].

Unless you have item [b]Item 1232[/b], as you splash into the water, a colossal beast rises from the sea, surveying its fresh prey. Roll 2 skill dice and gain all [ec1c3b]overpower[-] results. Then lose 1 health unless you pay [ec1c3b]1 overpower[-]. Go west to [b]Location 147[/b].

149.text: The hike is grueling on your thighs as you head downhill. Go to [b]Location 144[/b].

015.text: Return to the cave location from which you originally entered the dungeon.

150.text: The currents and crosscurrents make the swim even longer than it looked from shore. Go to [b]Location 155[/b] and gain 1 morale.

150.action: [2694d0]DODGE[-] fireballs to move south around the volcano
150.text: The volcano never ceases to erupt as you circumnavigate it. Go to [b]Location 481[/b] and gain 1 morale.
You splash through the warm water. Go to [b]Location 416[/b].

151.text: The formation gives you a strong reminder of the old “duck or rabbit” optical illusion. Go to [b]Location 156[/b].
A recent eruption of a nearby volcano has left the city a smoldering pile of rubble. You head toward the sounds of people just to the south of the ruins. Go to [b]Location 482[/b].

152.text: The little island is strangely compelling. Go to [b]Location 157[/b].

As you stroll toward some boulders off the shoreline, you pass a piece of your ship wreckage. It’s part of the propulsion system and could become flightworthy with a bit of work. You may either go south to [b]Location 483[/b] or continue with a [0b955e]help-◆3-[b]REPAIR[/b][-] action (then read the next result only).

choices.outcome: After patching a small portion of the shattered spaceship, you realize just how big of a task you’ve created for yourself. Gain 1 boost and destiny [b]Item 1605[/b] (place it in the center). You may either stop (go south to [b]Location 483[/b]) or continue with a [0b955e]help-◆5-[b]REPAIR[/b][-] action to weld the pieces into something more cohesive yet still unfunctional (then read the next result only):

You step back and admire your work. This part of the spaceship is airtight, but the most difficult job remains. For the spaceship to be even semi-operational, you must rewire it and fix the power supply. Gain 1 morale and [0b955e]1 help[-]. You may either stop (go south to [b]Location 483[/b]) or continue with a [0b955e]help-◆7-[b]REPAIR[/b][-] action to obtain a partial spaceship (then read the next result):
The lights flicker on, and your heart sings as the ship hovers off the ground. Gain vehicle [b]Item 1434[/b] and go south to [b]Location 483[/b].

153.text: The amulet dominates your thoughts as you swim. Go to [b]Location 158[/b].
You think you’ll get more help from science than magic. Go to [b]Location 484[/b].

154.action: [2694d0]SWIM[-] east toward some towering rock formations
154.text: You’re not sure your gear could withstand volcanic heat. Go to [b]Location 438[/b].
You think you can find a part of the shore that is protected from lava. Go to [b]Location 159[/b].

154.action: [2694d0]SWIM[-] south to some distant rocks jutting out of the water
154.text: You struggle a bit against the current as the water is pulled toward the seismic cracks. Go to [b]Location 485[/b].

155.text: Crossing lines dominate the northern sky. Are those contrails from other ships? Go to [b]Location 160[/b].
The swim is long, but eventually you pull yourself ashore on an island that is empty save for an improbably balanced igneous rock formation. Go to [b]Location 150[/b] and gain 1 morale.

156.text: The flashes of light up ahead remind you of the fireworks you avoided as a child. Go to [b]Location 161[/b].
The rock formations make it impossible to travel in a straight line. Go to [b]Location 151[/b].

157.text: The air in front of you seems to vibrate and sweat starts to bead on your forehead. Go to [b]Location 162[/b].
Staying above the water reminds you of playing “the floor is lava” in your childhood home. Go to [b]Location 152[/b].

158.text: As you hike north, you notice a dark cave to your right. You may either enter it (go to cave [b]Location 039[/b]) or go north to [b]Location 163[/b].
The sea life is so intriguing you wish you had a mask and snorkel. Go to [b]Location 153[/b].

159.action: [2694d0]LEAP[-] north over the lavafall and past the sentients
159.text: You know better than to follow the sentients into the lava. Go to [b]Location 164[/b].
The lava entering the water behind you makes a cloud of steam that’s hard to see through. Go to [b]Location 154[/b].

016.text: Return to the cave location from which you originally entered the dungeon.

160.action: [2694d0]SWIM[-] south with the tide to another island
160.text: This archipelago comprises dozens of little islands. You swim past a few until you find one that looks intriguing. Go to [b]Location 155[/b].

161.action: [2694d0]DODGE[-] the lava bursts, making your way north
161.text: You’re sweating profusely, but you make it through with only minor singed spots on your clothes. Go to [b]Location 166[/b].

161.action: [2694d0]WADE[-] south toward some odd rock formations
161.text: Escaping the heat becomes your top priority. Go to [b]Location 156[/b].

162.text: The water warms to the temperature of a pleasant bath as you near the incandescent city. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Go to city [b]Location 525[/b] and gain 1 random skill.
Go to [b]Location 167[/b].

162.text: The giant rune on the rock above the city will be a good landmark for your navigation. Go to [b]Location 157[/b].

163.text: Acknowledging the Traveler’s warning, you still press north. Go to [b]Location 168[/b].

164.text: Dodging the molten puddles takes all your concentration. Go to [b]Location 159[/b].

165.text: Seeing a piece of your ship reminds you how lucky you are to have survived. Go to [b]Location 170[/b].

166.text: As you pass the wind chimes, you’re eerily reminded of the jangling of hollow bones. Go to [b]Location 171[/b].
Music at your back and lights up ahead—it’s like you’re at a party! Go to [b]Location 161[/b].

167.text: The fire sentient’s glow is so faint as you pass that you worry for its health. Go to [b]Location 172[/b].

168.action: [2694d0]EVADE[-] north past the elemental (if the elemental is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
168.text: Mercifully the monumental fire elemental seems too busy with the fire-breathing insects circling it to notice you slowly circumnavigating it from a great distance. Go to [b]Location 173[/b]; if this action’s cost was not reduced to 1, also gain 1 morale.
Surely the animal’s instinct to stay away from the elemental’s home is a good one. Go to [b]Location 163[/b].

169.text: You swim to the north a respectful— and, you hope, safe—distance away from the towering monument. Go to [b]Location 174[/b] and gain 1 morale.

017.text: Return to the cave location from which you originally entered the dungeon.

170.text: It looks like rough terrain, but you’ll be grateful for dry land again. Go to [b]Location 250[/b].
That piece sticking out of the water looks awfully familiar… Go to [b]Location 165[/b].

171.text: The north looks less volcanic; will it have other dangers instead? Go to [b]Location 251[/b].
The lava that solidified in the water makes for a very uneven surface. Go to [b]Location 166[/b].

172.text: When you reach the shore, choose one:

choices.outcome: Go to [b]Location 251[/b].

choices.option: Hike north up the steep mountain
choices.outcome: Lose 1 time and go to [b]Location 252[/b].

172.text: The trek makes you long for the gorp you nibbled on during childhood strolls with your parents. Go to [b]Location 167[/b].

173.text: Who (or what) receives the enhanced signal beaming into the sky? Go to [b]Location 253[/b].

173.action: [2694d0]SNEAK[-] south past a fiery elemental (if the elemental is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
173.text: You’ve picked a tactically questionable place to cross the sea, but the elemental maintains its gaze to the south and doesn’t notice your approach. Go to [b]Location 168[/b]; if this action’s cost was not reduced to 1, also gain 1 morale.

174.text: Nodding deferentially to the sentient as you pass, you’re eager to press on. Go to [b]Location 254[/b].
As you swim through the volcanic archipelago, you spot a towering lavafall pouring from an opening in a small mountain. Go to [b]Location 169[/b] and gain 1 morale.

175.action: [2694d0]EVADE[-] north past the swift sentient (if the sentient is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
175.text: You’re probably not fast enough to outrun the winged sentient, but you bolt through the plains to the north until you spot a breezier sentient relaxing in another tent. Go to [b]Location 180[/b]; if this action’s cost was not reduced to 1, also gain 1 morale.

176.action: [2694d0]DANCE[-] north into and around the twisters
176.text: You were expecting to go north, but you’re surprised to feel the grip of the sentients’ hands in yours as they dance with you, delighted that you’d join in their revelry. A tingling sensation runs up your spine. Eventually you bid farewell and go to [b]Location 181[/b]. Also gain 1 morale and 1 boost.

177.action: [2694d0]WALK[-] north across the field of flags
177.text: Sentients jeer at you for stomping on their sacred field. Gain curse [b]Item 1387[/b] and 1 boost; go to [b]Location 182[/b].

178.action: [2694d0]EVADE[-] north past the sentient (if the sentient is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
178.text: You weave between the sentient and the towering blooms, ignoring the copious airborne pollen and dust, and bolt to the north. Go to [b]Location 183[/b]; if this action’s cost was not reduced to 1, also gain 1 morale.
You briefly consider trying to slide down the dunes on a huge flower petal before dismissing the idea. Go to [b]Location 348[/b].

179.action: [2694d0]SNEAK[-] north past the blissfully unaware sentient (if the sentient is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
179.text: The flowers looming overhead are downright Seussian. Go to [b]Location 184[/b].
Thankfully the huge flowers provide relief from the desert sun. Go to [b]Location 349[/b].

018.text: Return to the cave location from which you originally entered the dungeon.

180.action: [2694d0]SNEAK[-] south around a busy sentient (if the sentient is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
180.text: Sentients seem to be all around you; you wonder if they know each other. Go to [b]Location 175[/b].

181.action: [2694d0]DASH[-] north past the sentients (if the sentients are no longer an obstacle, reduce the cost to 1)
181.text: The sentients tighten their hold on the chest but make no effort to stop you as you go to [b]Location 186[/b].
The wind tugs at your clothes, gear, and anything else it can find. Go to [b]Location 176[/b].

182.action: [2694d0]EVADE[-] north past the sentients, jumping to your feet and racing ahead (if the sentients are no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
182.text: You dodge the sentients and sprint north across the open prairie. Go to [b]Location 187[/b]; if this action’s cost was not reduced to 1, also gain 1 morale.

182.action: [2694d0]WALK[-] south across a field of flags
182.text: A sentient angrily informs you this is sacred ground. Gain curse [b]Item 1387[/b] and 1 boost; go to [b]Location 177[/b].

185.text: You stick close to the ruins, both for a barrier to the wind and to admire the sculpted flourishes. Go to [b]Location 190[/b].

186.text: You resist the urge to tilt at the windmills. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Go to city [b]Location 518[/b].
Go to [b]Location 191[/b].

188.text: Passing the windmill on your way to the water makes you wonder if the planet also utilizes hydropower. Go to [b]Location 193[/b].

189.action: [2694d0]LEAP[-] north from one sandbar to the next
189.text: You make a game out of hopping along the path of banners on the few dry patches you can find. Go to [b]Location 194[/b].

019.text: Return to the cave location from which you originally entered the dungeon.

190.action: [2694d0]TREK[-] north across the wetlands and up the hill
190.text: Your feet are slick with mud as you begin to trek up the slope. You pass by the entrance to the cave, the mouth of which is much larger than it appeared from a distance. Choose one:

choices.option: Proceed around the hill to the north
choices.outcome: Go to [b]Location 195[/b].

choices.option: Perform a [a84fc0]look-◆4-[b]EXPLORE[/b][-] in the mouth of the cave
choices.outcome: As your keen eyes adjust to the darkness, you reach a barrier that requires further attention. Go to cave [b]Location 036[/b].

191.text: You consider taking a piece of the shredded tapestry to use as a towel, but you never know who’s watching. Go to [b]Location 196[/b].
Move either into the town (city [b]Location 518[/b]) or around the town (location [b]Location 186[/b]).

193.text: As you descend the hill, you see several objects in motion across the water. Go to [b]Location 188[/b].

194.action: [2694d0]EVADE[-] the twister as you head north (if the twister is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
194.text: The gale-force winds leave you unsteady on your feet at first, but you sprint without stopping until you reach (much more tranquil) foothills to the north. Go to [b]Location 199[/b] and gain 1 morale.
You pick up a family of leeches from the muck, but you eventually arrive at the far shore. Lose 1 health and go to [b]Location 189[/b].

195.action: [2694d0]ENTER[-] the gate to the north; you may pay $2
195.text: Green lights scan your body as you pass through the gateway. If you paid $2, gain 2 health—the gateway provides a health benefit for those willing to pay. Whether or not you paid, go to [b]Location 225[/b].

195.action: [2694d0]TREK[-] south down the hill and across the shallow water
195.text: The music fades into the distance but keeps playing in your head for quite a while. Go to [b]Location 190[/b].

196.text: The rainbow beam of light calls to you on a deeper level than you understand. Go to [b]Location 226[/b].
No use dwelling on the crash; it’s in the past but you have to look ahead. Go to [b]Location 191[/b].

197.action: [2694d0]EVADE[-] north past the sentient, losing them in the mountain pass (if the sentient is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
197.text: You slow down once you’re sure the sentient isn’t following you and soon find yourself at the top of an escarpment. Go to [b]Location 227[/b]; if this action’s cost was not reduced to 1, also gain 1 morale.

198.text: You marvel at the orb’s narrow perch, taking care not to veer too far off the ridge. Go to [b]Location 228[/b].

199.action: [2694d0]SNEAK[-] north past the oblivious sentient (if the sentient is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
199.text: A circular rock formation in the distance looks like a window to the sky. Go to [b]Location 229[/b].

199.action: [2694d0]EVADE[-] south around the twister (if the twister is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
199.text: The whipping winds of the tornado keep you off-balance and the palpable static electricity leaves your hair standing on end. Go to [b]Location 194[/b] and gain 1 morale.

200.text: You descend into the opaque fog below, where the poor visibility and rugged terrain together make navigation all but impossible. Roll 6 skill dice and gain all [a84fc0]look[-] results. You may pay [a84fc0]2 look[-] to go to interior [b]Location 563[/b]. Otherwise, go to location [b]Location 205[/b]. Either way, also gain 1 morale.
You barely make a harrowing leap over an icy gorge, then descend the mountain only to find a hulking, magnetic elemental. Go to [b]Location 393[/b] and gain 1 morale.

201.text: Choose a direction for your leap:

choices.option: Leap over the gap to the left
choices.outcome: Go to [b]Location 206[/b].

choices.option: Leap over the gap to the right
choices.outcome: As you do, the sentient flies up to you and performs a routine inspection. If you have any weapons, they admonish you and tell you to report to the King of Thieves. Either way, go northeast to [b]Location 207[/b].

201.text: Amazed at the flying sentient, you long to rise into the air yourself. Go to [b]Location 712[/b].

202.text: Floating machines, hovering sentients… you start to wonder if you can defy gravity too. Go to [b]Location 203[/b].

202.action: [2694d0]EVADE[-] north around the sentient (if the sentient is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
202.text: The sentient shrugs and returns to their job as you leave them in your wake. Go to [b]Location 207[/b].

202.action: [2694d0]LEAP[-] south across the gap after finding a gap in the mountains
202.text: Clouds drift across the crevice. Go to [b]Location 718[/b].

203.text: If the brutal cold becomes any more forgiving as you descend into the snow-covered, rocky valley below, you don’t notice it. Gain ability [b]Item 1505[/b] and 1 morale; go to [b]Location 208[/b].
Not entirely trusting the floating stones, you are surprised to find them a sturdy launching point. Go to [b]Location 202[/b].

204.action: [2694d0]LEAP[-] north from one floating lodestone to the next
204.text: Each lodestone shifts under your weight as you leap, and you’re relieved when you finally reach solid ground again. Go to [b]Location 209[/b].
You wonder what prevents the lodestones from becoming magnetized and causing chaos as they float. Go to [b]Location 730[/b].

205.text: A cruel wind whipping through the frozen canyon makes an already miserable ascent even colder and slower. Go to [b]Location 210[/b] and gain 1 morale.

205.action: [2694d0]TREK[-] south through the cloud cover to an outlook
205.text: You descend into the soupy fog filling the valley, where the uneven ground and thick mist together make navigation all but impractical. Roll 6 skill dice and gain all [a84fc0]look[-] results. You may pay [a84fc0]2 look[-] to go to interior [b]Location 563[/b]. Otherwise, go to [b]Location 200[/b]. Either way, also gain 1 morale.
Careful to avoid the lotuses, you head for something reflective at the top of the ridge. Go to [b]Location 394[/b].

206.action: [2694d0]DESCEND[-] east down the steep cliff toward a meditating sentient below
206.text: A cruel crosswind makes gripping the icy handholds even harder. Go to [b]Location 207[/b] and gain 1 morale.
You suspect this freezing city doesn’t draw many tourists. Choose one:

choices.outcome: You stop your journey short of the distant bridge and instead enter the city. Gain 1 time, 1 morale, and [2694d0]1 move[-]; go to city [b]Location 522[/b].
Gain ability [b]Item 1468[/b] and 1 morale; go to [b]Location 211[/b].

207.text: A clever thief bumps into you on your way up, lightening your purse. Lose $1 and go to [b]Location 212[/b].
You’re glad to leave with all your belongings (but you still check your pockets). Go to [b]Location 202[/b].
The few handholds you can find are slick with ice, but you manage to pull yourself over the snowy ledge at the top of the cliff face. Go to [b]Location 206[/b] and gain 1 morale.

208.text: Each peak of these mountains seems to hide another marvel. Go to [b]Location 213[/b].
The staircase winds up the mountain and through a dark passage, and ends at the base of a narrow path. Go to [b]Location 214[/b].

Long into your exhausting trek, you pass through a thick layer of clouds, making the pinnacles to your north look like islands in an endless white sea. Gain ability [b]Item 1505[/b] and 1 morale; go to [b]Location 203[/b].

209.text: Maybe the animal’s territory isn’t very big and you can find a way around. Go to [b]Location 416[/b].

209.action: [2694d0]CHASE[-] away the animal (if the animal is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
209.text: You make yourself big, spooking the animal. Gain 1 morale; you may go north to [b]Location 214[/b].

209.action: [2694d0]LEAP[-] south from one floating lodestone to the next
209.text: The stones aren’t fixed in space; they jostle around as you land on them. Go to [b]Location 204[/b].

210.action: [2694d0]EVADE[-] the magnetic pull of the object to move north
210.text: Feeling the unmistakable metallic pull, you give the monument a wide berth. Go to [b]Location 215[/b].
The fierce wind snaking through the narrow gorge below tests your already tenuous grip on the steep rock wall. Go to [b]Location 205[/b] and gain 1 morale.

211.action: [2694d0]SNEAK[-] north under the bridge and past the sentient (if the sentient is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
211.text: The wind funnels under the bridge, making it even colder and muffling the sound of your travel. Go to [b]Location 216[/b].
The numbing cold doesn’t become any more sufferable and you descend toward a cliffside and a towering city of metal built along it. Gain ability [b]Item 1491[/b] and 1 morale; choose one:

choices.outcome: Go to [b]Location 206[/b].

choices.option: Enter the city as you approach
choices.outcome: You shimmy along the edge of the cliff until you find a narrow, trash-filled alley. Go to city [b]Location 522[/b].

211.text: Go to [b]Location 210[/b]. If you have any item of value $10 or higher, the sentient smites you for not selling it to them (gain curse [b]Item 1391[/b]) but follows you west out of curiosity (gain sentient [b]Item 1336[/b]).

212.action: [2694d0]EVADE[-] the animal to proceed north (if the animal is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
212.text: As you head north, you catch a hearty whiff of the large lotus on the right. Gain 1 health; you may also lose 1 curse. Then go to [b]Location 217[/b].
Is it your imagination or do you see a rainbow ahead of you? Go to [b]Location 207[/b].

213.text: You exploit a blind spot in the sentinels’ predictable route. Either go north to [b]Location 218[/b], or suffer 1 heat damage and go to interior [b]Location 513[/b].

213.action: [2694d0]HIKE[-] southeast toward a moving red glow
213.text: You can’t take your eyes off the erratic red object, like a cat with a laser pointer. Go to [b]Location 209[/b].
Your breath should become fog at this temperature, but the air is too thin to hold moisture. Go to [b]Location 208[/b].

214.action: [2694d0]BALANCE[-] north precariously across the narrow path
214.text: You have to think about every step (gain ability [b]Item 1501[/b]), but you make it safely to cave [b]Location 034[/b].

214.action: [2694d0]DESCEND[-] east off the steep, icy path
214.text: A staircase leads down to the edge of the sea. Go to [b]Location 417[/b] and gain 1 morale.

214.action: [2694d0]HIKE[-] southwest down a staircase toward a glowing orb
214.text: The sphere grows from the size of a marble to taller than a person as you get closer. Go to [b]Location 208[/b].

215.text: You leave the metal city toward a structure with entirely different architecture. Go to [b]Location 216[/b].
The view of the city’s underside is a maze of wires, lights, and metal. Go to [b]Location 220[/b].

216.text: Passing fragrant flowers and animal remains, you’re amazed at life’s adaptability. Go to [b]Location 221[/b].
From soft lines to harsh angles, the difference in structures is jarring. Go to [b]Location 215[/b].

217.action: [2694d0]CLIMB[-] north up and over one of the rocky outcroppings that break up the fence
217.text: The fence is relatively easy for you to bypass… but is that a good idea? Go to [b]Location 222[/b].

218.text: Even knowing what the Traveler told you about the stone, it’s hard to leave it behind. Go to [b]Location 213[/b].

219.text: The icy road is narrow, and the weather only seems to worsen the further you walk. Gain ability [b]Item 1505[/b] and go to [b]Location 224[/b].

219.action: [2694d0]DESCEND[-] southeast toward the salty sea breeze
219.text: An impassable rocky ridge rises directly to the south of here, so you head southeast instead. Go to [b]Location 417[/b].

219.action: [2694d0]EVADE[-] west around the sentient (if the sentient is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
219.text: While the Traveler distracts the guard, slip around them to [b]Location 218[/b].

220.text: The slick ice gives you a chance to have fun and see how far you can glide. Go to [b]Location 601[/b].
The ice is behind you now, but what looks like a jagged iceberg looms ahead. Go to [b]Location 215[/b].

221.action: [2694d0]EVADE[-] the mechanical hydra (if the animal is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
221.text: You bend and twist to avoid the beast; choose one:

choices.outcome: If this action’s cost was not reduced to 1, also gain 1 morale.
Gain 1 boost and [2694d0]1 move[-] when you notice that the hydra only really cares about guarding the cave.

221.text: You leave the steep mountain passes for more civilized environs. Go to [b]Location 216[/b].

222.text: The snow resting on tree branches reminds you of cozy winter mornings. Go to [b]Location 223[/b].
The frigid snow field soon yields to a (still frigid) expanse of opaque ice. Gain ability [b]Item 1496[/b] and go to [b]Location 603[/b].

222.action: [2694d0]CLIMB[-] south up and over one of the rocky outcroppings
222.text: Whatever the barricade was meant for, it’s no match for you. Go to [b]Location 217[/b].

223.text: The cold doesn’t abate, and snowdrifts hinder your steps. Go to [b]Location 604[/b].
Despite the frigid temperature, you see signs of abundant wildlife. Go to [b]Location 222[/b].

224.text: You see hunched shapes through the snow. Go to [b]Location 605[/b].
You press against the ridge, as far from the sheer drop as you can get. Go to [b]Location 420[/b].
Following the well-defined path seems to be the safest route. Go to [b]Location 219[/b].

225.text: The rocky cliff face offers fewer fingerholds than you’d hoped for, but you eventually make your way down into the slight but noticeable glow of the dense swamp below. Gain ability [b]Item 1491[/b] and 1 morale; go to [b]Location 230[/b].

225.action: [2694d0]WALK[-] south toward a gate in the ridge with blinking red lights
225.text: Choose how to proceed when you reach the gate:

choices.outcome: The gate’s lights turn to green and you walk through. Gain 2 health and go to [b]Location 195[/b].
A shock ripples through you, causing your muscles to spasm. Lose 2 health and go to [b]Location 195[/b].
You find a coin on the ground. Gain $1 and continue with a [2694d0]move[-] action in a different direction.

226.text: Your legs ache from the long descent, but your curiosity about the source of the glimmering helix of light below sustains your motivation. Gain ability [b]Item 1491[/b] and 1 morale; go to [b]Location 231[/b].
What looks to you like an iridescent maypole has lifted your spirits. Go to [b]Location 196[/b].

227.text: Climbing down the sheer cliff leaves your muscles aching, and at the bottom your feet sink slightly into the boggy mud of the swamp. Gain ability [b]Item 1491[/b] and 1 morale; go to [b]Location 232[/b].

228.text: Leaving the tower’s elevated position, the sky is quickly obscured by a forest canopy. Go to [b]Location 233[/b].
The landscape abruptly changes on the other side of the hill. Go to [b]Location 198[/b].

229.text: The slope of the rocky cliff face on the north side of the curiously shaped mountain is unforgiving, but eventually you make your way into a dense swamp punctuated by glowing lights. Gain ability [b]Item 1491[/b] and 1 morale; go to [b]Location 234[/b].

230.text: Sunlight barely penetrates the foliage, so thank goodness for the mysterious lanterns. Go to [b]Location 235[/b].

You kick off as much muck from your feet as you can and steadily pull yourself up the sheer rock face, only to find an improbably located campsite at the top of the cliff. Go to [b]Location 225[/b] and gain 1 morale.

231.text: Encountering the gauntlet rattled your thoughts. Go to [b]Location 236[/b].
Enough handholds in the otherwise sheer rock face make the ascent manageable if tiring. Go to [b]Location 226[/b] and gain 1 morale.

232.action: [2694d0]WADE[-] or [2694d0]TRAILBLAZE[-] north through the shimmering muck

choices.outcome: Several energy sentients curse you for the disrespect. Gain curse [b]Item 1395[/b] and go to [b]Location 237[/b].

Roll 1 challenge die from the pool (if none are available, refresh a die from the center); if the result is 1 time, lose 1 time and place the die in the center (otherwise, refresh the die). Then go to [b]Location 237[/b].

232.text: The glow of countless lamps in the swamp below helps illuminate the nearly vertical rock wall, and eventually you pull yourself over the grass ledge at the top. Go to [b]Location 227[/b] and gain 1 morale.

233.text: You don’t want to get lost, but the hazy light up ahead lures you closer. Go to [b]Location 238[/b].
Rising above the dense layer of trees feels like coming up for air. Go to [b]Location 228[/b].

234.text: Unless you’ve been warned to avoid the lily, lose 1 health as the plant smashes against you, leaving welts on your skin. Go north to [b]Location 239[/b].
The peculiar geometry of the mountain makes an already challenging ascent exhausting. Go to [b]Location 229[/b] and gain 1 morale.

235.text: The Traveler’s observation about feeling energized keeps your spirits up. Go to [b]Location 230[/b].

236.text: The metal giving a purple glow is a stark contrast to the wood and yellow ambient light. Go to [b]Location 241[/b].

237.text: Go to [b]Location 232[/b] and gain curse [b]Item 1395[/b] for disrupting a birth.

238.text: Despite that it’s visible from a great distance, the city is silent except for the occasional electrical discharge or clang of a lantern. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Go to city [b]Location 520[/b] and gain 1 random skill.
Go to [b]Location 243[/b].

239.text: The structure above you looks like the best treehouse a child could want. Go to [b]Location 244[/b].

239.action: [2694d0]WADE[-] south through the swamp toward a large flower
239.text: Lose 1 health as the plant smashes against you, leaving welts on your skin. Go south to [b]Location 234[/b].

240.text: The tree trunks are impressively sturdy to support those chains. Go to [b]Location 245[/b].

241.text: It looks easy, but you have a feeling not to pass through the opening in the stone. Go to [b]Location 246[/b].
To avoid getting lost in the swamp, you head for something that doesn’t look like the rest of the trees. Go to [b]Location 236[/b].

242.action: [2694d0]EVADE[-] north past the elemental (if the elemental is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
242.text: Even from the careful distance of your circuitous hike around the monstrous elemental, a sense of creeping discouragement weighs on you. Go to [b]Location 247[/b]; if this action’s cost was not reduced to 1, also gain 1 morale.

243.text: You’re careful not to get stuck in the mud along with the device. Go to [b]Location 248[/b].
The bright yellow lights of a city belie its eerie silence. Move either into the city ([b]Location 520[/b]) or around the city ([b]Location 238[/b]).

244.text: Look up ahead! Is that a break in the endless trees? Go to [b]Location 249[/b].

choices.outcome: The reeds sting as you walk past. Lose 1 health and go to [b]Location 661[/b].
You hop over some inhospitable-looking reeds. Go to [b]Location 661[/b].

245.text: If those flowers have roots, there must be SOME solid ground to stand on. Go to [b]Location 240[/b].

246.action: [2694d0]TRAILBLAZE[-] north around the pond through the bushes
246.text: The bushes look like a deliberate line, almost a hedge. Go to [b]Location 662[/b].
Visibility decreases rapidly as you head into the trees. Go to [b]Location 241[/b].

247.action: [2694d0]SNEAK[-] north around the sentients (if they are no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
247.text: You stay behind the runestones, just in case. Go to [b]Location 663[/b].

247.action: [2694d0]SNEAK[-] south past a hulking elemental (if the elemental is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
247.text: As you sneak among the dense thicket of trees, you feel a sense of wilting demoralization that you can’t quite shake. Go to [b]Location 242[/b]; if this action’s cost was not reduced to 1, also gain 1 morale.

248.action: [2694d0]WADE[-] north across the river and beyond
248.text: You admire the flocks of birds high in the sky as you leave the swampy wetland for the pleasant grassland to the north and the forest beyond. Go to [b]Location 664[/b].
The pattern on the tree has elements of paint, light, and lichen. Go to [b]Location 243[/b].

249.text: The river looks ideal for irrigation. Go to [b]Location 665[/b].
The unadorned tree trunks look plain after the patterns you just left. Go to [b]Location 244[/b].

250.text: The water looks more appealing than the sand right now. Go to [b]Location 170[/b].
Of course deserts aren’t always hot; even so, the drop in temperature was bracing. Go to [b]Location 421[/b].

251.text: Are those… teeth at the center of the indentation? Go to [b]Location 256[/b].
You ponder tying your gear to one of the floating rocks, to take the weight off your shoulders. Go to [b]Location 171[/b].

252.text: Maybe the desert heat has weakened the chest. Go to [b]Location 253[/b].
The slow sentient doesn’t attempt to stop you. Go to [b]Location 257[/b].

252.action: [2694d0]DESCEND[-] south down the plateau and swim across the water
252.text: It’s out of the frying pan and into the fire: No sooner is the desert at your back than an erupting volcano looms in front of you, and you swim to the south side of the inlet to keep your distance. Go to [b]Location 172[/b] and gain 1 morale.

253.text: You feel more buoyant in this planet’s water than in the oceans at home. Go to [b]Location 173[/b].
If those are birds up ahead, they’re like none you’ve ever seen before. Go to [b]Location 252[/b].

254.action: [2694d0]HIKE[-] south to a slippery, rocky shoreline
254.text: Your departure adds to the distinct indentations in the red soil. Go to [b]Location 174[/b].

256.text: The smoking bones aren’t enough warning to deter you from pressing deeper into the heat. Go to [b]Location 261[/b].

257.text: You still can’t find any shade but maybe the figure can offer another kind of help. Go to [b]Location 258[/b].

257.action: [2694d0]DASH[-] north past the beasts (if the birds are no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
257.text: You’d rather not have any chance of being trapped in this environment. Go to [b]Location 262[/b].

258.action: [2694d0]EVADE[-] north around the peddler (if the sentient is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
258.text: You haven’t seen many animals here, so where did the peddler get so many bones? Go to [b]Location 263[/b].

258.action: [2694d0]TREK[-] west toward a sentient in trouble
258.text: Unlike the peddler, the sentient ahead looks decidedly out of their element. Go to [b]Location 257[/b].

259.action: [2694d0]LEAP[-] east over a gap in the mesa
259.text: The mesa abruptly ends here, but you clear the gap. Go to [b]Location 444[/b].

260.action: [2694d0]EVADE[-] north around the animal (if the animal is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
260.text: The 8-armed animal attempts to pull you close, and you barely escape. Go to [b]Location 265[/b]; if this action’s cost was not reduced to 1, also gain 1 morale.

262.text: There must be a way out of this desert! Go to [b]Location 263[/b].
The bony architecture of the city is magnificent but a little unsettling. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Go to city [b]Location 524[/b] and gain 1 random skill.

choices.option: Enter the cave behind the city
choices.outcome: Go to cave [b]Location 027[/b].
Go to [b]Location 267[/b].

263.text: An odd noise akin to damp laundry flapping in the wind is getting louder. Go to [b]Location 268[/b].
The lone flower fighting for survival parallels your situation and gives you hope. Go to [b]Location 262[/b].

264.text: Anyone atop that castle would have a perfect view of the pass you’re walking through. Go to [b]Location 269[/b].

265.action: [2694d0]HIDE[-] until the coast is clear, then move north (if you interacted with the sentients, reduce this cost to 1)
265.text: The path of scraped dirt from the dragged sentient extends as far as you can see. Go to [b]Location 270[/b].

266.text: The casino seems out of place out here in the desert. Go to [b]Location 271[/b].

267.action: [2694d0]FOLLOW[-] the swift sentient north (if you already interacted with the sentient, reduce this cost to 2)
267.text: Gain 1 health as you pass through the oasis. Go to [b]Location 272[/b].

267.action: [2694d0]TREK[-] south either into or around the city
267.text: The animals whose bones now form the (literal) spine of the city were colossal. Go to city [b]Location 524[/b] or to a view overlooking the city ([b]Location 262[/b]).

268.action: [2694d0]DASH[-] north past the commotion (reduce this cost to 1 if the sentients are no longer an obstacle)
268.text: You hurry to see if the hills in the distance might offer some shade. Go to [b]Location 273[/b].

269.text: You’re able to move through the sandstorm to [b]Location 274[/b], but not before the sand leaves hundreds of shallow gashes in your skin. Lose 1 health.
Dust fills the air, even with the tornado behind you. Go to [b]Location 264[/b].

270.action: [2694d0]TREK[-] east toward an odd configuration of bones
270.text: The bleached white shapes draw most of your attention, but you keep an eye on the giant to the north. Go to [b]Location 271[/b].

271.action: [2694d0]TREK[-] west in the direction of a cool breeze
271.text: Even a few degrees cooler can make a big difference. Go to [b]Location 270[/b].

272.text: The shade of the trees cooled you enough to face the heat. Go to [b]Location 267[/b].

273.action: [2694d0]SNEAK[-] south past a scuffle (reduce this cost to 1 if the sentients are no longer an obstacle)
273.text: You’re distracted by flashbacks of the crash but are still aware of your surroundings. Go to [b]Location 268[/b].

274.text: The twister pelts you with sand and pebbles, leaving you with small cuts on your hands and sand caked on your augsuit. Go to [b]Location 269[/b] and lose 1 health.

275.text: You walk through the sands of the still desert until you come upon a sand sentient who seems to have been expecting you. Go to [b]Location 280[/b].
Your pace increases as you smell the coast before you see it. Go to [b]Location 486[/b].

276.text: It takes time and effort to scale up and down the wall. Go to [b]Location 281[/b] and gain 1 morale.
Your practice pays off: Depending on which type of movement you chose, gain the ability either to balance ([b]Item 1501[/b]) or to leap ([b]Item 1486[/b]), respectively; go to [b]Location 487[/b].

277.action: [2694d0]EVADE[-] north under the beast (if the animal is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
277.text: The animal grabs at you, finding only air where you were seconds before. Go to [b]Location 282[/b]; if this action’s cost was not reduced to 1, also gain 1 morale.
Whatever strung up that insect is not something you want to deal with right now. Go to [b]Location 488[/b].

278.text: You see no way up that cliff, so you conserve your energy and head the other way. Go to [b]Location 489[/b].

279.text: You have to brush the sand away from the handholds on the way down, but you manage the long descent with nothing worse than sore extremities. Go to [b]Location 462[/b] and gain 1 morale.
As you make your way northward, you think you hear the sentient quietly repeating a sequence of numbers: “4, 8, 15, 16, 23, 42.” Go to [b]Location 284[/b].

280.text: As you walk toward the base of the towering wall, the elder sand sentient nods knowingly, and you leave to live out an immediate future they already foreseen. Go to [b]Location 281[/b] and gain 1 morale.
As you walk toward the base of the imposing wall, the elder sand sentient nods knowingly, as if they have already foreseen your future. Go to [b]Location 285[/b] and gain 1 morale.
As you walk into the open desert and toward the towering spires to the south, the elder sand sentient nods knowingly as if they already know your future. Go to [b]Location 275[/b].

281.text: Past the building is a hole in the rock so precise, it must be a door. Go to [b]Location 286[/b].
Your descent down the vertical wall into the open sands below is exhausting. Gain ability [b]Item 1491[/b] and 1 morale; go to [b]Location 276[/b].

Your climb down into the dry valley below is exhausting, and at the bottom you find a sand sentient who seems to have been expecting you. Gain ability [b]Item 1491[/b] and 1 morale; go to [b]Location 280[/b].

282.text: No matter how tired you are, that beam of light calls you to keep going. Go to [b]Location 287[/b].

282.action: [2694d0]DASH[-] south past a guardian in a gateway before it sees you (reduce this cost to 1 if the guardian no longer an obstacle)
282.text: The narrow opening makes you feel like the walls are closing in. Go to [b]Location 277[/b].

283.text: The climb down is so difficult that you don’t think you can return via the same route. Go to [b]Location 278[/b].

284.text: You stay near the water’s edge, marveling at the erosion patterns. Go to [b]Location 279[/b].

285.action: [2694d0]TRUDGE[-] north across the desert as the air begins to chill
285.text: You crest one sandy dune, and then another, and another. Go to [b]Location 290[/b].
Your climb down the cliff to the sands below is tiring, and at the bottom you find a sand sentient who seems to have been expecting you. Go to [b]Location 280[/b] and gain 1 morale.

286.action: [2694d0]SNEAK[-] north past the multi-headed sentient as the sun lowers in the sky (if the sentient is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
286.text: The sentient is too busy debating something untranslatable with itself to notice you slipping behind a rock outcrop. Go to [b]Location 291[/b]; if this action’s cost was not reduced to 1, also gain 1 morale.
The sentient’s debate has exhausted you before you even start walking. Go to [b]Location 281[/b].

287.text: Circumnavigating the Memory Palace provides an opportunity to reflect on your most cherished memories. Go to [b]Location 292[/b].
The pillar of light behind you is bright enough to cast a shadow. Go to [b]Location 282[/b].

288.text: As you walk through the opening, you feel a tripwire at your feet, and a boulder smashes into your shoulders. Lose 1 health and crawl forward to [b]Location 293[/b].

289.text: You take a running start and leap off the bridge to the other side. Go to [b]Location 294[/b] and gain 1 morale.

290.text: You leave the skull behind and head for something much less natural in the ground ahead. Go to [b]Location 285[/b].

291.text: As you walk past the pit, the sand under your feet gives way and a massive centipede bursts upward. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Go north to [b]Location 296[/b].
Go to cave [b]Location 049[/b].

292.text: Even in a world this unfamiliar, the skull and crossbones needs no translation. Go to [b]Location 297[/b].
The steep mountain presents two options. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Go to [b]Location 287[/b].

After a long, vertical hike, you reach an entrance near the top. Lose 1 time. First, view page 38 of the Book of Vantages and gain 2 boost as you look down at the world below. Then go to interior [b]Location 592[/b] and gain 1 morale.

293.text: Passing the fresh water source, you wonder if something is keeping animals away. Go to [b]Location 297[/b].
As you pass the spring—which is far too small for you to enter—the water carries the sounds of a crowd cheering. Go to [b]Location 298[/b].

294.text: The artificial red lights in the distance aren’t nearly as comforting as the firelight you left. Go to [b]Location 299[/b].
Suppressing a self-preservation instinct, you sprint into a long jump, barely clearing the gap below. Go to [b]Location 289[/b] and gain 1 morale.

295.action: [2694d0]SNEAK[-] north past the sentient and their assistant (if they are no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
295.text: The sentient and their insectile aide are preoccupied with their careful glasswork. Go to [b]Location 325[/b]; if this action’s cost was not reduced to 1, also gain 1 morale.

296.text: Are the stones actually making noise, or are you just sensing vibrations through your skin? Go to [b]Location 326[/b].

296.action: [2694d0]TRUDGE[-] south across the desert toward a spiky pit
296.text: As you walk past the pit, the sand under your feet gives way and a massive centipede bursts upward. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Go south to [b]Location 291[/b].
Go to cave [b]Location 049[/b].

297.text: Daylight should give some relief from the chill of night. Go to [b]Location 327[/b].
You cover as much of your skin as possible and hope the exertion warms you up. Go to [b]Location 292[/b].

298.text: The air grows warmer as dawn breaks. Go to [b]Location 328[/b].
Attempts to ride a lorestone down the cliff don’t go as planned. Go to [b]Location 293[/b].

299.text: The sky brightens as you trek north. Go to [b]Location 329[/b].

300.action: [2694d0]EVADE[-] north around the wild animal (if the animal is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
300.text: The stone bridge provides some overhead protection. Go to [b]Location 305[/b].
You leave the animal’s territory before others arrive. Go to [b]Location 370[/b].

301.action: [2694d0]HIKE[-] north down the hill and around the circle of sentients
301.text: You do your best not to disrupt any activity at the henge-like site. Go to [b]Location 306[/b].
Something stings you as you go to [b]Location 371[/b]; lose 1 health.

302.action: [2694d0]DESCEND[-] north down the mountain toward the sea
302.text: The trail is steep and leads to a view of several immense birdhouses. Go to [b]Location 307[/b] and gain 1 morale.
Lose 1 health as the sharp fangs of a large fish tear at your leg; go to [b]Location 372[/b].

303.action: [2694d0]LEAP[-] north off the cliff or [2694d0]DESCEND[-] north down the cliff into the sea

choices.outcome: Roll 3 skill dice and gain all [a84fc0]look[-] results. Then lose 1 health unless you pay [a84fc0]1 look[-] to avoid a painful belly flop onto the water’s surface. Go to [b]Location 308[/b].
Carefully (and a little awkwardly) you clamber down the rocky cliff face. Go to [b]Location 308[/b].

303.text: The elevated peninsula is too exposed for your liking. Go to [b]Location 373[/b].

304.action: [2694d0]LEAP[-] east across the gap to another sky island
304.text: The ocean far below is turbulent, and with a running start you manage to clear the gap. Go to [b]Location 404[/b] and gain 1 morale.

304.action: [2694d0]LEAP[-] north off the skybound islands into the sea below, or increase the cost to 6 to [2694d0]DESCEND[-] north down the cliff to the water’s edge

choices.outcome: Roll 3 skill dice and gain all [a84fc0]look[-] results. Then lose 1 health unless you pay [a84fc0]1 look[-] to avoid cracking your knee on a stone on the way down. Go to [b]Location 309[/b].
You descend cautiously down the cliff face to the water below. Go to [b]Location 309[/b] and gain 1 morale.

305.text: As you turn the corner beyond the lighthouse, the rainbow comes into full view. Go to [b]Location 310[/b].

306.text: It’s unnerving to swim below the massive hovering stones. Go to [b]Location 311[/b].
Purple energy seems to infuse the stones and even the air in this part of the world. Go to [b]Location 301[/b].

307.action: [2694d0]SWIM[-] north from the island to the distant shore
307.text: Could that titanic animal have produced offspring? You try not to think about it as you swim. Go to [b]Location 312[/b].
With a swift start you set off around the mountain, and several colossal birdhouses come into view. Go to [b]Location 302[/b] and gain 1 morale.

308.text: The long journey across the wide open waters leaves your muscles tired, but eventually you swim up to a palm-shaded beach. Go to [b]Location 313[/b] and gain 1 morale.

308.action: [2694d0]CLIMB[-] south up the steep, windblown cliff
308.text: The overhang at the top of the precipice pushes your climbing skills to their limit, but you finally pull yourself over the ledge next to some curious stones. Go to [b]Location 303[/b] and gain 1 morale.

309.action: [2694d0]SWIM[-] north underwater as far as possible to avoid detection (if the pirates are no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
309.text: Your lungs burn but the pirates above are otherwise occupied and don’t notice you. Go to [b]Location 314[/b].

309.action: [2694d0]CLIMB[-] south up to a sky island
309.text: The force of the salty wind makes the already challenging climb nearly impossible, but you eventually manage to pull yourself over the ledge of the floating island. Gain ability [b]Item 1468[/b] and 1 morale; go to [b]Location 304[/b].

310.text: Passing directly through the end of the rainbow gives a split second of unnatural wisdom. Gain 1 boost and go to [b]Location 315[/b].
Maybe it’s your imagination, but this beach has grains of sand in a rainbow of colors. Go to [b]Location 305[/b].

311.action: [2694d0]SWIM[-] south toward an island surrounded by floating stones
311.text: The shoreline path extends below you on the seabed. Go to [b]Location 306[/b].

312.text: The island has a distinctive silhouette, one that makes you uneasy. Go to [b]Location 307[/b].

313.action: [2694d0]CHASE[-] away the animal as you wade north (if the animal is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
313.text: You make yourself big, spooking the animal. Gain 1 morale and go north to [b]Location 318[/b].
The long swim across the sea exhausts you, but you eventually find your way to another palm-lined shore. Go to [b]Location 308[/b], and gain 1 morale and [2694d0]1 move[-].
No wonder that bay had so many birds. The current makes it hard to leave! Go to [b]Location 312[/b].

314.action: [2694d0]WADE[-] over to the shore and proceed over the hill
314.text: When you reach the shore, you have an uneasy feeling as you pass the hole in the hill. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Go to cave [b]Location 037[/b].

choices.option: Walk around the hill to the right
choices.outcome: Go to location [b]Location 319[/b].

314.text: A hovering vehicle casts a shadow over you during the swim. Go to [b]Location 309[/b].
The water is shallow enough to stand up and take occasional breaks. Go to [b]Location 313[/b].

315.text: You’re so enthralled by the color of the flowers you don’t notice the color in the sky. Go to [b]Location 310[/b].
With the newfound knowledge from the book, you look at your surroundings more closely. Go to [b]Location 385[/b].

317.text: That animal looked so much like a plant that you’re on high alert as you pass through the “trees.” Go to [b]Location 316[/b].

318.text: This river could have cultural or commercial significance to the local inhabitants. Go to [b]Location 313[/b].

319.text: Biologists would love to study this animal-created art. Go to [b]Location 324[/b].

321.text: The scholarly atmosphere of the building is enhanced by a meditative valley. Go to [b]Location 707[/b].

322.text: The delicacy with which the sentient handled the flowers showed true reverence. Go to [b]Location 713[/b].

323.text: Hands-on experience might teach you more than a classroom. Go to [b]Location 324[/b].
You are careful not to disrupt the lesson. Go to [b]Location 719[/b].

324.text: A calm but consistent voice grows louder. Go to [b]Location 323[/b].

325.text: You make yourself as small as possible, so you don’t get caught too. Go to [b]Location 330[/b].

326.action: [2694d0]LEAP[-] east over the gap in the ground
326.text: The hot liquid falls into the chasm below. Go to [b]Location 327[/b].
An errant drop burns a mark into your gear. Go to [b]Location 331[/b].
There is a chill in the air as day turns to night. Go to [b]Location 296[/b].

327.action: [2694d0]HIKE[-] north along the winding path to the spire
327.text: The lights along the sides of the path make it easy to find the best route. Go to [b]Location 332[/b].
The sky grows dark as you head south. Go to [b]Location 297[/b].
You pull up short on the other side, narrowly avoiding a long fall. Go to [b]Location 326[/b].

328.text: The sentient makes a feeble attempt to catch you, but you easily evade them. As you do, you’re drawn to the sweet smell of the nearby lotus. Gain 1 health; you may also lose 1 curse. Go north to [b]Location 333[/b].
Stars appear in the sky as you trudge south. Go to [b]Location 298[/b].

329.action: [2694d0]HIKE[-] north, where the canyonland gives way to grassier terrain
329.text: The grass is literally greener on the other side. Go to [b]Location 334[/b].
The sky grows dark as you journey south. Go to [b]Location 299[/b].

331.text: One day the fissure will likely be a rift valley, but for now it’s just narrow enough to clear with a running start. Go to [b]Location 336[/b] and gain 1 morale.
The current of hot air is rising from the roiling liquid below. Go to [b]Location 326[/b].

332.action: [2694d0]DESCEND[-] north down the top of the spire
332.text: The noisy village is well-shaded from the afternoon sun. Choose one:

choices.option: Enter the city through a back entrance
choices.outcome: Go to city [b]Location 530[/b] and gain 1 random skill.

choices.option: Take a [2694d0]move-◆6-[b]DESCEND[/b][-] action north toward the valley
choices.outcome: The descent down the spire takes quite a bit of effort, and you’re exhausted when you reach the bottom. Gain ability [b]Item 1491[/b] and 1 morale; go to [b]Location 337[/b].

332.text: Bracing against the wind, you make your way south. Go to [b]Location 327[/b].

333.action: [2694d0]DESCEND[-] north into the valley using the ladder attached to the shop
333.text: A cacophony of sound drifts up from below. Go north to [b]Location 338[/b].

334.text: The golden liquid has made the grass slippery. Go to [b]Location 339[/b].

334.action: [2694d0]HIKE[-] south as the grass turns to canyonland
334.text: Patches of rock and rifts in the earth appear more often here. Go to [b]Location 329[/b].

335.action: [2694d0]DESCEND[-] north down the extremely steep cliff
335.text: You slowly descend the sheer face of the cliff to the river valley below and make your way to gently lapping waves of the nearby shoreline. Gain ability [b]Item 1491[/b] and 1 morale; go to [b]Location 340[/b].

336.text: As you land on your feet, several sentients in the caravan applaud the impressive jump. They were planning to stop soon for a break, and they invite you as the guest of honor at a campfire feast, where they share stories about collecting and selling husks to other gold sentients. Gain 1 morale, 1 health, and 1 boost. The caravan moves on, leaving you on [b]Location 341[/b].
The fissure is wide enough that you need a running start to leap across it. Go to [b]Location 331[/b] and gain 1 morale.

337.text: The old ropes and slats sway back and forth beneath you. Go to [b]Location 342[/b].
After a long, windy climb, you find yourself in a back alley of an isolated village. Gain 1 morale and go to city [b]Location 530[/b].

338.action: [2694d0]TREK[-] north around the resort to the shore
338.text: The view of the resort reminds you of the all-inclusive luxury hotels back home. Go to [b]Location 343[/b].

338.action: [2694d0]CLIMB[-] south up the plateau using a ladder dangling from the edge
338.text: The ladder is a big help! Does someone want you to go this way? Go to [b]Location 333[/b].

339.text: Luck is with you, as you bypass the commotion unscathed. Go to [b]Location 344[/b].
You decide to head for calmer surroundings. Go to [b]Location 334[/b].

340.text: Your legs sink into the mud as you wade north. Go to [b]Location 504[/b].

340.action: [2694d0]CLIMB[-] a long, steep cliff to the south
340.text: After walking upstream through a river valley, the vertical face of the rock cliff towers high above you. You slowly, but steadily, ascend to the top. Gain ability [b]Item 1468[/b] and 1 morale; go to [b]Location 335[/b].

341.text: Far from the trial site you find a canyon that you can barely clear with a running start. Go to [b]Location 336[/b] and gain 1 morale.

342.text: The polished gold of the geometric city glimmers on the calm water. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Go to city [b]Location 529[/b] and gain 1 random skill.
Go to [b]Location 506[/b].

342.text: The reflected glow of the city warms the landscape around you. Go to [b]Location 337[/b].

343.action: [2694d0]SWIM[-] across the canal to the north shore
343.text: The water tastes slightly brackish. Go to [b]Location 507[/b].
The shade from above is provided by a massive floating structure. Go to [b]Location 338[/b] for a better view.

344.text: The cityscape fades quickly, replaced by a more natural setting. Go to [b]Location 470[/b].
You go right past where the city should be and find yourself on a shallow beach. Go to [b]Location 508[/b].
You can’t decipher the rules of the game, but you’re still fascinated. Go to [b]Location 339[/b].

345.text: The sights and sounds of a sprawling city greet you on the other side of the wall. Go to [b]Location 766[/b].
The water near the shore is calm, but you quickly find yourself struggling against the tide. Go to [b]Location 461[/b].

346.text: The bay narrows near the end of your swim as you enter a busy city. Go to [b]Location 772[/b] and gain 1 morale.
Heading into the wind and the current feels like the world is against you. Go to [b]Location 345[/b].

347.text: When you approach the shaded hill in the distance, the sand centipede perched on top of the hill crashes down on you. Roll 3 skill dice and gain all [2694d0]move[-] results. Then choose one:

choices.outcome: Go north to [b]Location 177[/b].
Go to cave [b]Location 049[/b].

347.text: Your ascent south leads into the heart of a vast city. Go to [b]Location 778[/b].

348.action: [2694d0]SCALE[-] the city wall to the south
348.text: On the other side of the wall is an ancient city. Go to [b]Location 784[/b].

349.text: Even wilted, the flower had a graceful beauty. You hope to see more of them. Go to [b]Location 179[/b].

349.action: [2694d0]SCALE[-] the city wall to the south
349.text: Beyond the wall you find a sprawling city. Go to [b]Location 790[/b].

350.text: Turning your back on the cave makes you a little uncomfortable. Go to [b]Location 491[/b].

351.text: The tower you pass is metal, but it feels like a natural part of the landscape. Go to [b]Location 370[/b].

351.action: [2694d0]TRUDGE[-] south up a hillside covered in slushy snow
351.text: As soon as the elevation rises, the green surroundings are covered by white. Go to [b]Location 492[/b].

352.text: You never thought your hopscotch skills would prove useful later in life! Go to [b]Location 371[/b].
The melting snow must flow into the river you just left. Go to [b]Location 493[/b].

353.text: With the river on your left, you’re cognizant of the avalanche potential from your right. Go to [b]Location 354[/b].
The mud of the riverbank soon gives way to the snow of the mountainside. Go to [b]Location 494[/b].

354.action: [2694d0]HIKE[-] south up the steep, snow-crested mountainside
354.text: The walk is taxing, but the effort is worth the spectacular view of the verdant terrain below. Go to [b]Location 495[/b] and gain 1 morale.

354.action: [2694d0]WALK[-] west to a curve in the river
354.text: If the water is mostly melted snow, it would be very cold to wade through. Go to [b]Location 353[/b].

355.action: [2694d0]HIKE[-] south across the wetlands and up a hill
355.text: The ruined section behind you contained life support systems; the irony isn’t lost on you. Go to [b]Location 496[/b].

356.action: [2694d0]SWIM[-] north toward the cove on the right
356.text: Choose one based on previous actions:

choices.option: The sea centipede is no longer an obstacle
choices.outcome: Go to [b]Location 375[/b] and gain [2694d0]2 move[-].

choices.option: You haven’t neutralized the sea centipede and you pay [a84fc0]1 look[-]
choices.outcome: You notice the gaping mouth in the water and swim around it to [b]Location 375[/b].

choices.option: You haven’t neutralized the sea centipede and you don’t pay [a84fc0]1 look[-]
choices.outcome: The beast swallows you (lose 1 health) and spits you out in cave [b]Location 046[/b].

356.text: The warehouse reminds you of the unassuming canneries in the port town your parents retired to. Either swim into the warehouse (interior [b]Location 578[/b]) or past it (location [b]Location 497[/b]).

357.text: This building won’t last long, and you can help more elsewhere. Go to [b]Location 376[/b].

357.action: [2694d0]SNEAK[-] south around a monstrous elemental (if the elemental is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
357.text: The narrow canyon leaves little room for sneaking as you avoid the hulking elemental’s attention, and the tremors of its footsteps knock you off balance more than once. Go to [b]Location 498[/b]; if this action’s cost was not reduced to 1, also gain 1 morale.

358.action: [2694d0]SNEAK[-] north past the sentient (reduce this cost to 1 if the sentient is no longer an obstacle)
358.text: The rocky islands have plenty of overhangs that keep you out of sight. Go to [b]Location 377[/b].
Glowing windows set asymmetrically into stone pillars leer down at you. Go to [b]Location 499[/b].

359.text: Water and algae on the rocks make reliable footing hard to find. Go to [b]Location 360[/b].

359.action: [2694d0]WADE[-] north through the pleasantly steaming waters
359.text: The water is just cool enough to be enjoyable. Go to [b]Location 378[/b] and gain 1 health.
Glowing pockets of lava still pock the new terrain. Go to [b]Location 500[/b] and suffer 1 heat damage.

036.text: You exit the cave, your eyes adjusting to daylight. You can either head north around the hill to [b]Location 195[/b] or traverse the marsh to the south to [b]Location 190[/b].

360.text: You time your jump perfectly between swells that spray mist into the air. Go to [b]Location 359[/b].

361.action: [2694d0]TREK[-] north along the shoreline, avoiding the lava
361.text: As you head north, your instincts say that you’re missing something. Choose one:

choices.outcome: You find a small hole in the rocks that leads to a much bigger cavern. You squeeze inside and soon reach a barrier that requires further attention. Go to cave [b]Location 026[/b].
Go to [b]Location 380[/b].

361.text: As the lava boils the seawater, you suppose that this coastline probably isn’t the safest place you could be hiking. Go to [b]Location 502[/b].

362.action: [2694d0]SWIM[-] northeast on the ocean surface or [2694d0]WADE[-] directly east

choices.outcome: Gain 1 random skill and go to the ocean location matching that skill: [2694d0]move[-]/[a84fc0]look[-] ([b]Location 061[/b]); anything else ([b]Location 054[/b]).
The ocean floor drops away quickly, and soon you’re treading water amidst a flotilla of lilies. Go to [b]Location 363[/b].

362.action: [2694d0]WADE[-] north toward an object on the water
362.text: You love being able to see the sea life around you as you pass. Go to [b]Location 381[/b].
The water is more viscous than you’re used to, making your clothes heavier. Go to [b]Location 503[/b].

363.action: [2694d0]WADE[-] east as seaweed tangles around your legs
363.text: Being able to see the seaweed doesn’t help avoid it; it seems to reach for you. Go to [b]Location 364[/b].
