Gain 1 random skill and go to the ocean location matching that skill: [2694d0]move[-]/[a84fc0]look[-] ([b]Location 060[/b]); anything else ([b]Location 053[/b]).

363.action: [2694d0]WADE[-] south toward a fleet of ships
363.text: You see a ship soaring through the air, like in the fables of Galecrest. Go to [b]Location 504[/b].
The seaweed thins out and you start to see more colorful plants. Go to [b]Location 362[/b].

364.text: You’re not afraid of a little weather! Go to [b]Location 365[/b].
Gain 1 random skill and go to the ocean location matching that skill: [2694d0]move[-]/[a84fc0]look[-] ([b]Location 053[/b]); anything else ([b]Location 058[/b]).

364.action: [2694d0]WADE[-] south toward a sentient in the water
364.text: The shallow water with the sentient looks like a nice break from fighting the waves. Go to [b]Location 505[/b].
You have plenty of challenges already without adding a storm to the mix. Go to [b]Location 363[/b].

365.text: You push through the turbulence until it starts to lessen. Go to [b]Location 366[/b].

Gain 1 random skill and go to the ocean location matching that skill: [2694d0]move[-] ([b]Location 512[/b]); [a84fc0]look[-]/[fd8c46]engage[-] ([b]Location 052[/b]); [0b955e]help[-]/[fff349]take[-]/[ec1c3b]overpower[-] ([b]Location 058[/b]).
Where there are structures, there must be shelter from the elements. Go to [b]Location 506[/b].
Desperately seeking calmer water, you head for a break in the clouds. Go to [b]Location 364[/b].

366.text: Even though the water is shallow enough to wade through, you’re constantly fighting against the strong current. Go to [b]Location 367[/b].
Gain 1 random skill and go to the ocean location matching that skill: [2694d0]move[-]/[a84fc0]look[-] ([b]Location 059[/b]); anything else ([b]Location 055[/b]).

366.action: [2694d0]WADE[-] south across a series of sandbars
366.text: As deep as the water appears, the sandbars make it possible to wade instead of swim. Go to [b]Location 507[/b].
The water keeps trying to pull your legs out from under you. Go to [b]Location 365[/b].

367.action: [2694d0]WADE[-] east through the swell of the waves
367.text: Keeping your upper body above the water helps to propel you through the tide. Go to [b]Location 368[/b].
Gain 1 random skill and go to the ocean location matching that skill: [2694d0]move[-]/[a84fc0]look[-] ([b]Location 053[/b]); anything else ([b]Location 055[/b]).

367.action: [2694d0]SWIM[-] south toward a large animal surrounded by boats
367.text: The boats appear harmless at first, but you realize that they are attacking the helpless animal. Go to [b]Location 508[/b].

367.action: [2694d0]WADE[-] west, the current pulling at your body
367.text: Occasional flotsam drifts past you. Go to [b]Location 366[/b].

368.text: You’re soaking wet as you step ashore. Go to [b]Location 661[/b].
Just past the waterfalls you find a quiet inlet. Go to [b]Location 448[/b].
The water turns brackish as sea meets wetlands. Go to [b]Location 509[/b].
Your sense of adventure outweighs any fear of sea life. Go to [b]Location 367[/b].

369.action: [2694d0]EVADE[-] north past the elemental (if the elemental is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
369.text: To get away from the nauseating stench of the elemental, you walk a long route around it, keeping your distance. Go to [b]Location 382[/b]; if this action’s cost was not reduced to 1, also gain 1 morale.

370.text: The stream is shallow but full of slippery rocks. A hearty gulp of the fresh springwater rejuvenates you before you crest the hill. Gain 1 health and go to [b]Location 300[/b].
You’re reminded of finding colorful rocks in a neighborhood pond as a youth. Go to [b]Location 351[/b].

371.text: When you reach the area between the metal poles, a jolt of electricity shocks you. Suffer 1 heat damage and go to [b]Location 301[/b]. You pull yourself to shore using a large bone, which you keep. Gain item [b]Item 1186[/b].
You ensure your path through the pond doesn’t entangle you with the fishing line. Go to [b]Location 352[/b].

372.action: [2694d0]WADE[-] or [2694d0]LEAP[-] north across the brook (choose one)

choices.outcome: An underwater predator snaps at your feet as soon as you enter the water. Unless you previously removed this threat, lose 1 health and drag yourself ashore onto [b]Location 302[/b].

You attempt to avoid any predators that may lurk in the water. Roll 1 challenge die from the pool (if none are available, refresh a die from the center); if the result is 1 health, lose 1 health and place the die in the center (otherwise, refresh the die). Then go to [b]Location 302[/b].

373.action: [2694d0]EVADE[-] north around the animal and cross the river (if the animal is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
373.text: You spring across the creek and up a hill. Go to [b]Location 303[/b].

374.text: With a running start you leap to the islets to the east, where there (mercifully) appear to be fewer giant crustaceans made of rock. Go to [b]Location 375[/b].

374.action: [2694d0]CHASE[-] away the animals (if the animals are no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
374.text: You make yourself big, spooking the animals. Gain 1 morale; you may go north to [b]Location 304[/b].

375.action: [2694d0]CLIMB[-] north up the cliff after braving the choppy waves
375.text: The waves smash into the rocks below as you pull yourself onto an outcrop partway up the cliff face. Go to [b]Location 404[/b] and gain 1 morale.
Choose to swim with your eyes open or closed:

choices.option: Pay 1 boost to swim with your eyes open
choices.outcome: The saltwater stings your eyes, but the sacrifice enables you to notice the gaping mouth of a sea wyrm in the water and swim around it. Go to [b]Location 356[/b].
Go to [b]Location 356[/b] but lose 1 health when an unseen creature bites your foot.

375.text: You like to think that your graceful long jump to the rocky shore impresses the giant crabs there. Go to [b]Location 374[/b].

376.text: The entire body of water feels like a sauna. Go to [b]Location 125[/b].

376.action: [2694d0]SWIM[-] south toward some giant flying insects
376.text: The effervescing, warm water would almost be relaxing if not for the gargantuan, fire-breathing insects overhead. Go to [b]Location 357[/b].

377.text: The crust cracks beneath your feet as you walk past the lava, burning your feet. Suffer 1 heat damage and go to [b]Location 378[/b].
It’s out of the frying pan and into the fire as the water becomes almost unpleasantly hot as you move northward. Go to [b]Location 126[/b].

378.text: The sentients heckle you as you wade north. Go to [b]Location 127[/b].

378.action: [2694d0]WADE[-] south through the pleasantly steaming waters
378.text: The warm water has a mild healing impact on your body as you wade south. Go to [b]Location 359[/b] and gain 1 health.
You suffer 1 heat damage as the crust cracks beneath your feet. Go to [b]Location 377[/b].

379.text: You cleverly elect to go over rather than through the lava. Go to [b]Location 128[/b].

380.text: You make your way along the boulders to the north, where a towering monolithic rock, tidepools, salty air, and puffin-like seabirds riding the breeze above all remind you of your favorite beach town, leaving you a little homesick. Go to [b]Location 129[/b].

380.action: [2694d0]TREK[-] south along the shoreline, avoiding the lava
380.text: As you move south, your instincts say that you’re missing something. Choose one:

choices.outcome: You find a small hole in the rocks that leads to a much bigger cavern. You squeeze inside and soon reach a barrier that requires further attention. Go to cave [b]Location 026[/b].
Go to [b]Location 361[/b].

381.action: [2694d0]SWIM[-] east on the ocean surface or [2694d0]DIVE[-] east underwater

choices.outcome: Gain 1 random skill and go to the ocean location matching that skill: [2694d0]move[-]/[a84fc0]look[-] ([b]Location 057[/b]); anything else ([b]Location 053[/b]).
Go to [b]Location 631[/b], where you ignore hypoxia damage upon arrival.

381.text: The clarity of the water is better than any of the holoimagers you had on your ship. Go to [b]Location 362[/b].

382.action: [2694d0]SNEAK[-] south past a spooky elemental (if the elemental is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
382.text: You sneak behind the dense flora and manage to avoid the haunting glare of the gaunt elemental. Go to [b]Location 369[/b]; if this action’s cost was not reduced to 1, also gain 1 morale.

383.text: Questions swirl as you hike: Are sentients created? Born? Transformed from natural elements? Go to [b]Location 384[/b].

384.text: The bushes snag on your augsuit as you try to pass through them. Go to [b]Location 385[/b].
You crash through the bushes into a grassy grove. Go to [b]Location 383[/b].

385.text: Some of the “tree roots” on the ground turn out to be fallen stone pillars. Go to [b]Location 315[/b].
Despite the slow progress you make through the bushes, you stop to smell the variety of flowers. Go to [b]Location 384[/b].

386.text: The vegetation thins out considerably, perhaps even deliberately. Go to [b]Location 695[/b].

387.text: Bright light is coming over the horizon, but the sun is in a different part of the sky. Go to [b]Location 701[/b].
You head north along the path toward the bridge in the distance. Go to [b]Location 388[/b].
The thick undergrowth catches on your augsuit, and you finally break through into a vast field. Go to [b]Location 700[/b].

388.action: [2694d0]SWIM[-] north against the current of the muddy river
388.text: The difficult swim leaves you a dirty, wet mess, but you’re otherwise unscathed. Go to [b]Location 389[/b].
You’re glad to leave the dirty water behind before it erodes the hill you’re on. Go to [b]Location 387[/b].
The river serves as an extended moat for a vast city to the west. Go to [b]Location 785[/b].

389.action: [2694d0]SWIM[-] south through an increasingly muddy river toward a bridge
389.text: When you reach the bridge, two guards drag you out of the water and toss you to the east, reprimanding you. Go to [b]Location 702[/b].

389.action: [2694d0]SCALE[-] west up the narrow staircase in the wall
389.text: With no railing and barely wide enough for one person, the stairs would be easy to defend from above. Go to [b]Location 786[/b].

390.text: You strain to pull yourself over the ledge, and you’re rewarded with a magnificent view of the surrounding area. View page 39 of the Book of Vantages and gain 2 boost before lowering yourself into a massive city. Go to [b]Location 787[/b].

391.text: In the shade of the wall, no one notices you slowly searching for footholds. You finally pull yourself over the top and into a busy street. Go to [b]Location 788[/b].

392.text: The wind-worn wall has few good handholds, but you make it up and over the top. Go to [b]Location 789[/b].

393.action: [2694d0]LEAP[-] through the clouds over a gap
393.text: After an impressive leap, you land on a rocky outcropping. Go to [b]Location 200[/b] and gain 1 morale.

393.action: [2694d0]EVADE[-] north past the elemental (if the elemental is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
393.text: Even from a distance the powerful loops of magnetic force pull your possessions toward the hulking elemental. Go to [b]Location 394[/b]; if this action’s cost was not reduced to 1, also gain 1 morale.
As you climb up the wall, you reflect on how you’ve sometimes taken having friendly neighbors for granted. Go to [b]Location 790[/b].

394.action: [2694d0]HIKE[-] north along the steep mountain trail
394.text: The incline of the trail is challenging, and your extremities are sore when you reach the top. Go to [b]Location 395[/b].

394.action: [2694d0]SNEAK[-] south past a magnetic elemental (if the elemental is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
394.text: As you circumnavigate the elemental, even from a distance its magnetic force tugs at your possessions. Go to [b]Location 393[/b]; if this action’s cost was not reduced to 1, also gain 1 morale.

395.text: The invisible resistance makes for an arduous journey north, but on the other side, you are delighted to see an animal similar to a greyhound of Old Earth lounging near some decorative banners. Go to [b]Location 396[/b].
You pass near some spaceship wreckage during the descent. Go to [b]Location 394[/b].

397.text: You stay as dry as you can, but it’s tough when you’re low on energy. Go to [b]Location 398[/b].

398.text: The perilous path leads to some tense moments between you and southbound sentients. Go to [b]Location 399[/b].
A light dusting of snow from the east tickles your cheek as you head south. Go to [b]Location 397[/b].

399.text: The ice cracks under your weight, sending you splashing into frigid water. Suffer 1 cold damage. As you pull yourself to safety, the glint of something green catches your eye through the frozen waterfall. You reach through and grab it before pulling yourself back onto the ledge where you started. Gain item [b]Item 1175[/b] and continue.
The climb alongside the waterfall is short but technically demanding. Go to [b]Location 400[/b].
It’s the oddest sensation; you feel two distinct temperatures on your left and right sides. Go to [b]Location 398[/b].

400.text: The snow blowing from the east has left the sheer cliff wall frustratingly slick, but you eventually reach the mucky ground below. Gain ability [b]Item 1491[/b] and 1 morale; go to [b]Location 401[/b].

400.action: [2694d0]DESCEND[-] south down an icy mountain slope
400.text: The climb down is short, but the spray of the waterfall and the cold make it physically challenging. Go to [b]Location 399[/b] and gain 1 morale.

401.text: The columns are so firmly embedded you can use them to help pull yourself along. Go to [b]Location 402[/b].
You ascend the cliff slowly and methodically as the freezing wind currents and snow sting your exposed skin. Gain ability [b]Item 1468[/b] and 1 morale; go to [b]Location 400[/b].

402.text: The temperature drops precipitously when you pull yourself onto the other side of the wall. Go to [b]Location 621[/b].
The long, chilly hike along the north-south snowline leaves your thighs aching. Go to [b]Location 403[/b] and gain 1 morale.
The confluence of melting snow and fallen leaves has turned the ground into soup. Go to [b]Location 401[/b].

403.text: A jolt of electricity strikes as you grab the top of the fence (unless you disarmed the fence, suffer 1 heat damage). Go to [b]Location 626[/b].
The easterly wind deposits snowflakes on you, chilling you as you descend to the valley below. Go to [b]Location 402[/b] and gain 1 morale.

404.action: [2694d0]LEAP[-] or [2694d0]DESCEND[-] north off the cliff into the water (choose one)

choices.outcome: Roll 3 skill dice and gain all [a84fc0]look[-] results. Lose 1 health unless you pay [a84fc0]1 look[-] to avoid a sharp rock on the way down. Go to [b]Location 405[/b].

Roll 1 challenge die from the pool (if none are available, refresh a die from the center); if the result is 1 time, lose 1 time and place the die in the center (otherwise, refresh the die). Then go to [b]Location 405[/b].

404.action: [2694d0]DESCEND[-] south down the cliff into the crashing waves
404.text: The cliff face is slippery, and you slip and fall the last meter onto the rocks below. Go to [b]Location 375[/b] and lose 1 health.

404.action: [2694d0]LEAP[-] west across the gap to another sky island
404.text: Mindful of the unruly sea far below, you sprint and clear the gap, landing on the thick grass of the island to the west. Go to [b]Location 304[/b].

405.text: The waves lap gently on the shores of the nearby island. Go to [b]Location 406[/b].
While you slowly climb up the sheer cliff face, you wonder what forces shaped the bizarre topography of the area. Go to [b]Location 404[/b] and gain 1 morale.

406.text: You wade east toward a rocky shoreline sloping up toward a long-abandoned building. Go to [b]Location 135[/b].
You wade north through choppy waters, but at least your upper half stays dry. Go to [b]Location 407[/b].
The calm sea is only waist-deep here, and the breeze is pleasant. Go to [b]Location 405[/b].

407.text: The shoreline presents only a few small obstacles as you head north toward the seaside cliffs. Go to [b]Location 408[/b].
The shallow waters are almost entirely clear here. Go to [b]Location 406[/b].

408.text: The swim is even longer than it looks, and by the time you reach the far shore and the curious glowing obelisks there, your muscles are burning. Go to [b]Location 409[/b] and gain 1 morale.
You admire the rocky but scenic shoreline as you push through the shallow water. Go to [b]Location 407[/b].

409.text: As if the swim itself weren’t taxing enough, a cliff abuts the far shoreline, and you drag yourself to the top. Go to [b]Location 408[/b] and gain 1 morale.
You try to decipher the spires’ purpose as you walk. Lighthouses? Power generators? Go to [b]Location 725[/b].

410.text: As you pass, you admire the courage it takes to live under that massive rock. Go to [b]Location 100[/b].

411.text: You should watch your footing in the water, but you can’t tear your eyes from the huge rune. Go to [b]Location 105[/b].
There are no paths leading north past the runestone, so you roll up your pants and splash forward. Go to [b]Location 412[/b].

412.action: [2694d0]TREK[-] north along the right path or northwest along the left path

choices.outcome: As you move away from the river, you notice that the loose rocks here are curiously all aligned in one direction.Go to [b]Location 729[/b].
You follow the river north, where it expands into a misty inlet. Go to [b]Location 413[/b].

412.text: The gorge is too steep to walk along the sides, but fortunately the river is shallow. Go to [b]Location 411[/b].

413.text: Mist obscures your view as you wade north across the inlet. Go to [b]Location 414[/b].
You enjoy a long walk south along a riverside path. Go to [b]Location 412[/b].

414.text: As you head east, ashes fall from the sky like dark snowflakes. Go to [b]Location 120[/b].
You hike along the rough coastline—at least the water here is calm for the moment. Go to [b]Location 415[/b].
The mist idly drifting over the water refreshes you. Go to [b]Location 413[/b].

415.text: You get goosebumps while walking under the levitating stones, though their lack of gravity has no effect on you. Go to [b]Location 416[/b].
The peculiar shoreline is rocky but charming. Go to [b]Location 414[/b].

416.text: You consider burying a treasure chest like a pirate, but the island looks too rocky to dig. Go to [b]Location 150[/b].
You hike along a narrow strip of sand between the mountain and sea. Go to [b]Location 417[/b].
As you move south, more levitating stones appear. Go to [b]Location 415[/b].
The temperate seaside quickly turns cold, with the mountain dividing east and west. Go to [b]Location 209[/b].

417.action: [2694d0]HIDE[-] for a moment until the sentient passes, then move north (if the sentient is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
417.text: The sentient takes no notice of you—in fact, you get the feeling that they don’t want anyone to notice them. Soon their light grows dim as they ascend the stairs. Go to [b]Location 418[/b].
You stroll along the sandy shoreline at the base of a mountain range dividing the warm east from the cold west. Go to [b]Location 416[/b].

417.action: [2694d0]HIKE[-] west up the increasingly icy staircase
417.text: The temperature drops rapidly as you hike up the staircase, which leads to a snowcapped peak. Go to [b]Location 214[/b] and gain 1 morale.

418.text: The tower looks as tall as the mountains from this angle. Go to [b]Location 419[/b].

419.text: The mostly-intact skull is big enough for you to fit inside. Go to [b]Location 418[/b].

042.action: [2694d0]SQUEEZE[-] through a back panel into another room
042.text: You eavesdrop on some sentients in the assassin’s guild as you approach from the shadows. Gain 1 boost. You may exit to city [b]Location 041[/b]; if you do, continue with the [0b955e]help-[b]OFFER[/b][-] action there with the cost reduced by 2.

420.text: You slip on the slush during a short but steep hike. Go to [b]Location 421[/b].

421.action: [2694d0]HIKE[-] east away from the cold weather
421.text: The cold wind from the west makes you eager to arrive in the warmer climate to the east. Go to [b]Location 250[/b].

422.action: [2694d0]ENTER[-] the green gateway to the west
422.text: Proceed based on whether or not you’ve disarmed the gateway:

choices.outcome: Go to [b]Location 615[/b].
Lose 1 health and go to [b]Location 615[/b].

423.text: Your breath grows ragged as you make the steep ascent to the west. Go to [b]Location 620[/b] and gain 1 morale.

424.text: The mush of melting snow grows crisp under your feet as you hike west over the mountain range. Go to [b]Location 625[/b] and gain 1 morale.

425.text: The temperature drops rapidly as you trek upward and westward. Go to [b]Location 630[/b].

426.action: [2694d0]SWIM[-] east on the ocean surface or [2694d0]DIVE[-] east underwater

choices.outcome: Gain 1 random skill and go to the ocean location matching that skill: [2694d0]move[-]/[a84fc0]look[-] ([b]Location 062[/b]); anything else ([b]Location 061[/b]).
Go to [b]Location 632[/b], where you ignore hypoxia damage upon arrival.

426.action: [2694d0]EVADE[-] north past the beast (if the animal is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
426.text: Knowing that being in the water would leave you at a severe disadvantage in any conflict with the giant sea creature, you leave it a wide berth as you swim around it. Go to [b]Location 427[/b]; if this action’s cost was not reduced to 1, also gain 1 morale.

427.text: Gain 1 random skill and go to the ocean location matching that skill: [2694d0]move[-]/[a84fc0]look[-] ([b]Location 063[/b]); anything else ([b]Location 057[/b]).

427.action: [2694d0]SNEAK[-] north past the scout (if the sentient is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
427.text: There’s little place to hide along the water, but the watchful scout either ignores you or isn’t so watchful. Go to [b]Location 428[/b].

427.action: [2694d0]EVADE[-] south past a threat in the water (if it is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
427.text: Careful to keep your distance, you swim a long way around the irritable-looking sea creature. Go to [b]Location 426[/b]; if this action’s cost was not reduced to 1, also gain 1 morale.

428.text: Gain 1 random skill and go to the ocean location matching that skill: [2694d0]move[-]/[a84fc0]look[-] ([b]Location 062[/b]); anything else ([b]Location 059[/b]).

428.action: [2694d0]WADE[-] north through the slippery sea garden
428.text: The misshapen spheres bob on the water like inflatable beach balls. Go to [b]Location 429[/b].

429.text: Gain 1 random skill and go to the ocean location matching that skill: [2694d0]move[-]/[a84fc0]look[-] ([b]Location 055[/b]); anything else ([b]Location 056[/b]).
You look for reeds to fashion a snorkel but don’t see any nearby. Go to [b]Location 430[/b].

429.action: [2694d0]WADE[-] south over the slippery algae under the surface
429.text: You find your way into an overgrown cove that, mostly importantly, isn’t occupied by any waterspouts at the moment. Go to [b]Location 428[/b].

043.text: You step into an elevator, and the door slides closed behind you. The elevator ascends slightly toward the surface, opening within an underground city. Go to city [b]Location 041[/b].

043.action: [2694d0]EVADE[-] north around the nest and the worms to proceed through the dark tunnel
043.text: Your augsuit catches on the nest as you maneuver north, and the baby centipedes shriek in unison. Go to cave [b]Location 044[/b].

430.action: [2694d0]HIKE[-] along the steep shoreline, avoiding the waterspouts
430.text: You are happy to have stayed on dry land, as you avoided a fearsome beast rising from the sea. Go to [b]Location 475[/b].

choices.option: Pay [2694d0]1 move[-] to evade the second sea spout
choices.outcome: Go north to [b]Location 431[/b] and gain 1 morale.

You are caught in the second sea spout, which sends you rocketing out of the water. Roll a skill die and go to a location based on the result: [2694d0]move[-] ([b]Location 761[/b]); [a84fc0]look[-] ([b]Location 361[/b]); [fd8c46]engage[-] ([b]Location 667[/b]); [0b955e]help[-] ([b]Location 434[/b]); [fff349]take[-] ([b]Location 649[/b]); [ec1c3b]overpower[-] ([b]Location 752[/b]).

430.text: Gain 1 random skill and go to the ocean location matching that skill: [2694d0]move[-]/[a84fc0]look[-] ([b]Location 054[/b]); anything else ([b]Location 060[/b]).
You’d rather not risk swimming into an underwater vortex. Go to [b]Location 429[/b].

431.action: [2694d0]EVADE[-] north past the elemental (if the elemental is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
431.text: Avoiding the circling waterspouts and the strong pull of currents and crosscurrents swirling around the elemental is exhausting, but eventually you roll ashore on a (much more relaxing) beach. Go to [b]Location 432[/b]; if this action’s cost was not reduced to 1, also gain 1 morale.
Gain 1 random skill and go to the ocean location matching that skill: [2694d0]move[-]/[a84fc0]look[-] ([b]Location 060[/b]); anything else ([b]Location 054[/b]).

choices.outcome: Go south to [b]Location 430[/b] and gain 1 morale.

You are caught in the second waterspout, which sends you rocketing out of the ocean. Roll a skill die and go to a location based on the result: [2694d0]move[-] ([b]Location 430[/b]); [a84fc0]look[-] ([b]Location 361[/b]); [fd8c46]engage[-] ([b]Location 667[/b]); [0b955e]help[-] ([b]Location 434[/b]); [fff349]take[-] ([b]Location 649[/b]); [ec1c3b]overpower[-] ([b]Location 752[/b]).

431.text: Scaling the nearly vertical cliff face would be a formidable task even without the sheets of water soaking you and the deafening white noise of the falls, but you manage to pull yourself over the edge onto much calmer terrain. Gain ability [b]Item 1468[/b] and 1 morale; go to [b]Location 475[/b].

432.action: [2694d0]WADE[-] east toward the source of the scrapheap
432.text: You walk away from the footsteps but make a mental note that you’re not alone. Go to [b]Location 731[/b].

432.action: [2694d0]SNEAK[-] south through the rainforest and past the elemental (if the elemental is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
432.text: You keep a wide berth between you and the elemental and the waterspouts gyrating around it. Go to [b]Location 431[/b]; if this action’s cost was not reduced to 1, also gain 1 morale.

434.text: The idyllic beauty of the rainforest makes the climb up the steep slope a little more bearable. Go to [b]Location 435[/b] and gain 1 morale.

435.text: The stones lead into a dark passage through the pillar of stone. Roll 5 skill dice and gain all [a84fc0]look[-] results. If you pay [a84fc0]1 look[-], you find something in the darkness (gain item [b]Item 1263[/b]). Go east to [b]Location 734[/b].

435.action: [2694d0]HIKE[-] south down the mountain to a verdant valley
435.text: The stone pillar in front of you looms like a hive in an alien apiary. You leave it behind for somewhere more tranquil. Go to [b]Location 434[/b].

choices.outcome: The path passes by the mouth of a cave. Either go to cave [b]Location 033[/b] or go north to location [b]Location 437[/b].
Despite your careful steps, several wedges of glass slice into your feet. Lose 1 health and gain item [b]Item 1194[/b]; go to [b]Location 437[/b].

437.action: [2694d0]TREK[-] north along the shoreline or [2694d0]TRUDGE[-] north across the sand dune

choices.outcome: The waves and slippery rocks make this path difficult, but eventually you arrive. Go to [b]Location 438[/b] and gain 1 morale.
This route is more direct than walking along the shoreline, but the sand is riddled with unavoidable glass shards. Lose 1 health and gain ability [b]Item 1496[/b]; go to [b]Location 438[/b].
Despite your careful steps, several wedges of glass slice your skin. Lose 1 health and gain item [b]Item 1194[/b]; go to [b]Location 436[/b].
You pass by a cave entrance. Either enter it (go to cave [b]Location 033[/b]) or proceed south (go to location [b]Location 436[/b]).

438.action: [2694d0]SWIM[-] or [2694d0]HIKE[-] north toward the far shore

choices.outcome: You swim northwest toward the glowing lavafall. Go to [b]Location 159[/b].
You hike up the tall, rocky hill: Go to [b]Location 439[/b].

438.text: Did you hear a loud rumble or is it just water in your ears? Go to [b]Location 154[/b].

044.action: [2694d0]DODGE[-] west around the tail of the sand centipede as it whips forward (if the sand centipede is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
044.text: You squeeze into a nook and hope the beast doesn’t notice you. Like other underground animals, it uses touch and sound more than sight. After several heart-stopping moments, it slithers away. You lean back in relief… and the soil collapses behind you. Go deeper into the planet to cave [b]Location 040[/b].

440.action: [2694d0]CHASE[-] away the animals so you can proceed north (if the animals are no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
440.text: You make yourself big, spooking the animals, though they hover a safe distance away as if waiting for you to leave so they can return to the lava flow. Go to [b]Location 441[/b].

441.text: A second tower emerges from behind the first as you get closer. Go to [b]Location 442[/b].

442.text: You follow a path under the arch. Go to [b]Location 443[/b].
The sky brightens as you head south. Go to [b]Location 441[/b].

443.action: [2694d0]EVADE[-] north as the beast charges by (reduce this to 1 if the animal is no longer an obstacle)
443.text: At the top of the dune, you’ll be able to see if more creatures are approaching. Go to [b]Location 444[/b].
As the sand silently yields to your feet, you soak in the view of the stars. Go to [b]Location 442[/b].

444.text: A path is barely discernible through the sand and dust. Go to [b]Location 445[/b].
Red dust fills your vision as you head west into a desert. Go to [b]Location 259[/b].

445.text: You are filled with a sense of dread as you follow the path toward some sort of monster. Go to [b]Location 446[/b].
As you move south, the air dries and stars begin to emerge from the twilight. Go to [b]Location 444[/b].

446.action: [2694d0]EVADE[-] north past the elemental (if the elemental is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
446.text: There aren’t many places to hide among these gently sloping hills, but you manage to avoid the elemental’s attention. Go to [b]Location 447[/b]; if this action’s cost was not reduced to 1, also gain 1 morale.
You are filled with a sense of relief as you head south away from the elemental’s location. Go to [b]Location 445[/b].

447.text: You have a wistful urge for ice cream as you walk into the sunset. Go to [b]Location 503[/b].

447.action: [2694d0]SNEAK[-] south past a hulking elemental (if the elemental is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
447.text: The shallow hills make for few hiding spots, but you manage to evade the strange, hulking elemental. Go to [b]Location 446[/b]; if this action’s cost was not reduced to 1, also gain 1 morale.

448.text: The water almost reaches your chin as you wade south. Go to [b]Location 368[/b].
Gain 1 random skill and go to the ocean location matching that skill: [2694d0]move[-]/[a84fc0]look[-] ([b]Location 063[/b]); anything else ([b]Location 056[/b]).

449.action: [2694d0]SNEAK[-] north around the sentient, submerging to avoid detection (if the sentient is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
449.text: While you’re underwater, you notice several pods large enough to hold a sentient. Gain 1 boost and go to [b]Location 450[/b].
Gain 1 random skill and go to the ocean location matching that skill: [2694d0]move[-]/[a84fc0]look[-] ([b]Location 062[/b]); anything else ([b]Location 052[/b]).

045.action: [2694d0]EVADE[-] north around the sand centipede (if the animal is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
045.text: You scrape through some glowing sediment and tumble into a hidden chamber. Go deeper into the planet to cave [b]Location 040[/b]; if this action’s cost was not reduced to 1, also gain 1 morale.

450.text: As you tread water, something from the depths clamps onto your ankle and tries to drag you underwater. Roll 2 skill dice and gain all [ec1c3b]overpower[-] results. If you pay 1 [ec1c3b]overpower[-], go north to [b]Location 451[/b]. Otherwise, lose 1 health and get dragged west underwater to [b]Location 657[/b], where you ignore hypoxia damage upon arrival.
Gain 1 random skill and go to the ocean location matching that skill: [2694d0]move[-]/[a84fc0]look[-] ([b]Location 057[/b]); anything else ([b]Location 063[/b]).

451.action: [2694d0]SNEAK[-] north past the sentients (if the sentients are no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
451.text: You move furtively through the waves, easing yourself onto shore and beyond. Go to [b]Location 452[/b].
Gain 1 random skill and go to the ocean location matching that skill: [2694d0]move[-]/[a84fc0]look[-] ([b]Location 056[/b]); anything else ([b]Location 059[/b]).

452.text: Swimming through long lotus stems feels like you’re in a bowl of noodles. Go to [b]Location 453[/b].
Gain 1 random skill and go to the ocean location matching that skill: [2694d0]move[-]/[a84fc0]look[-] ([b]Location 051[/b]); anything else ([b]Location 052[/b]).

453.text: The tide helps to carry you along as you head north. Go to [b]Location 454[/b].

453.action: [2694d0]SWIM[-] south, drifting close to the shore
453.text: You breathe easier as the acrid smoke is replaced by a pleasant floral scent. Go to [b]Location 452[/b].

453.action: [2694d0]SWIM[-] west on the ocean surface or [2694d0]DIVE[-] west underwater

choices.outcome: Gain 1 random skill and go to the ocean location matching that skill: [2694d0]move[-]/[a84fc0]look[-] ([b]Location 061[/b]); anything else ([b]Location 051[/b]).
Go to [b]Location 660[/b], where you ignore hypoxia damage upon arrival.

454.text: You try to swim directly to shore, but the current pulls you closer to the vast city in the distance. Go to [b]Location 455[/b].
The cool water here is deceptively deep given how close you are to shore. Go to [b]Location 453[/b].
Gain 1 random skill and go to the ocean location matching that skill: [2694d0]move[-]/[a84fc0]look[-] ([b]Location 054[/b]); anything else ([b]Location 063[/b]).
The tide pulls you into deeper water where an animal lingers near the Traveler. Go to [b]Location 480[/b].

455.action: [2694d0]SWIM[-] north against the current across the canal
455.text: The undercurrent slows your progress, but at least it’s pleasant weather for a swim. Go to [b]Location 456[/b].
You struggle to push off against the slippery rocks near the shoreline, but movement is easier when you start to swim. Go to [b]Location 454[/b].

455.action: [2694d0]SWIM[-] west, struggling against the crashing waves
455.text: The heaving waves slow your progress and carry wooden debris from the west. Go to [b]Location 755[/b].

456.action: [2694d0]CLIMB[-] east up the sea-kissed cliff into the city
456.text: For being adjacent to a large city the terrain is surprisingly untamed here, but you manage to scramble up the mossy rocks to the outskirts. Go to [b]Location 762[/b] and gain 1 morale.

456.action: [2694d0]SWIM[-] south across the widest part of the canal
456.text: The current helps to push you toward a small gatehouse. Go to [b]Location 455[/b].

457.action: [2694d0]SQUEEZE[-] east through gaps in the old city ruins
457.text: It’s a tight fit through the break in the wall, but you’re rewarded with a striking view of a towering dome to the north. Go to [b]Location 763[/b].

457.action: [2694d0]LEAP[-] north from rock to rock until you reach the shore
457.text: You’re less worried about the sharp rocks you can see than any hidden below the surface of the water. Soon you find yourself safely on the sand. Go to [b]Location 458[/b].
You try to race the nearby fish, but they quickly vanish into the distance. Go to [b]Location 757[/b].

458.action: [2694d0]CLIMB[-] east up a tree and over the city wall
458.text: The sounds and smells of a busy city drift over the wall as you climb. Go to [b]Location 764[/b].

458.action: [2694d0]LEAP[-] south from one slippery rock to the next
458.text: The sandy shoreline ends abruptly at a canal, and the only way across is to jump strategically. Go to [b]Location 457[/b].

459.action: [2694d0]ENTER[-] an abandoned house to the east
459.text: The house was built a long time ago outside of the protective walls of the city. You find some old toothpaste and a toothbrush, as well as a short tunnel at the back of the house. Gain item [b]Item 1208[/b]; you may go to [b]Location 765[/b].

459.action: [2694d0]TRUDGE[-] west up the sand dune toward a pair of sentients
459.text: If the runes on stones are natural, are the runes on buildings made by sentients? Go to [b]Location 759[/b].

046.text: Falling forward, you find yourself in a bright chamber. Go deeper into the planet to cave [b]Location 040[/b].
You follow some voices, which grow louder as you approach. Go to cave [b]Location 047[/b].

460.action: [2694d0]WADE[-] east into the city through a canal
460.text: This canal would only suit passenger boats; cargo ships would scrape their hulls. Go to [b]Location 766[/b].
The waves threaten to smash you against the rocks and ships as you swim north. Go to [b]Location 461[/b].
A roaring sound grows louder as you near the top of the sandstone cliff. Go to [b]Location 760[/b].

461.text: You follow the wide, silty coastline eastward, astutely avoiding the dusty air to the north. Go to [b]Location 345[/b].
The calm waters turn choppy the closer you are to the city shipyard. Go to [b]Location 460[/b].
The water never gets too deep, and it keeps you cool even as the wind carries heat from the west. Go to [b]Location 490[/b].

462.text: A strong headwind makes the stroll quite challenging. Go to [b]Location 463[/b].

462.action: [2694d0]CLIMB[-] west up the steep seaside cliff
462.text: The wind whips sand in your face as it courses along the cliffside, but at least it provides a little relief from the midday heat. Go to [b]Location 279[/b] and gain 1 morale.

463.action: [2694d0]EVADE[-] north past the elemental (if the elemental is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
463.text: Pushing against the constant wind whipped up by the elemental’s daunting wingspan, you make your way around it and slip off— unseen, you hope—to the north. Go to [b]Location 464[/b]; if this action’s cost was not reduced to 1, also gain 1 morale.
Moving southward along the desolate landscape, you feel the air pressure return to normal. Go to [b]Location 462[/b].

464.text: With a running start you manage to clear the fissure, but upon arriving on the other side, the glowing landscape is sickly with corruption. Go to [b]Location 465[/b] and gain 1 morale.

464.action: [2694d0]SNEAK[-] south past a flying elemental (if the elemental is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
464.text: The constant beating of the elemental’s massive wings generates a powerful air current, and you struggle to push against it as you try to slip by the creature undetected. Go to [b]Location 463[/b]; if this action’s cost was not reduced to 1, also gain 1 morale.

465.action: [2694d0]HIKE[-] north through the mud and up the hill
465.text: You step in a green, goopy substance, and instead of rubbing off in the mudflats, it clings to your skin and begins to burn. Lose 1 health. Roll 3 skill dice and gain all [0b955e]help[-] results. Unless you pay [0b955e]1 help[-], lose another health. Go to [b]Location 466[/b].
The fresh air gusting up from the canyon is a welcome relief from the corruption you left behind. Go to [b]Location 464[/b].

466.action: [2694d0]ENTER[-] the gap to the north or add 3 to the cost and [2694d0]SCALE[-] north over the wall

choices.outcome: Two bandits jump you from either side, leaving you with a bruise on your head and an empty purse. Lose 1 health and lose $3; go to [b]Location 467[/b].
Go to [b]Location 467[/b].

466.action: [2694d0]HIKE[-] south down a hill toward a mysterious green glow
466.text: A fluorescent, otherworldly sickness permeates the valley below. Go to [b]Location 465[/b].

467.text: You follow the edge of the great swamp to the east down toward the valley floor. Go to [b]Location 468[/b].

467.action: [2694d0]ENTER[-] a gap in a towering wall to reach its southern side
467.text: As you approach the gap in the wall, you notice two bandits hiding in the shadows, their backs to you. They’re waiting for unsuspecting travelers to pass through the gap from south to north. Choose one:

choices.outcome: You clear the gap by a good distance, leaving the surprised bandits in your wake. Go to [b]Location 466[/b].

Roll 2 skill dice and keep all [2694d0]move[-] and [ec1c3b]overpower[-] results. If you pay [2694d0]1 move[-] or [ec1c3b]1 overpower[-], the bandits stumble away, leaving behind a knife (gain item [b]Item 1209[/b], then go to [b]Location 466[/b], where your only choices on the location are to move east, south, or west). Otherwise, lose 1 health and $2, then go to [b]Location 466[/b].

choices.option: Change your route and move to the east or west instead
choices.outcome: Go east to [b]Location 225[/b] or west to [b]Location 329[/b].

468.action: [2694d0]HIKE[-] south out of the forest valley
468.text: The hike takes you up around a hill. Go to [b]Location 467[/b].

469.action: [2694d0]WALK[-] north, choosing a direction at the fork in the path
469.text: Choose to walk to the left or right at the split:

choices.outcome: Go north to [b]Location 470[/b].
It’s on this path that you notice a lotus patch. Gain 1 health; you may also lose 1 curse. Then go northeast to [b]Location 240[/b].

047.action: [2694d0]DODGE[-] north around the sand centipede and climb the staircase in the rear of the cave (if the animal is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
047.text: The centipede is massive but lumbering, and a well-timed dash takes you to the safety of the glowing stairwell. Go deeper into the planet to cave [b]Location 040[/b].

470.text: Keeping your distance from the animals, you quietly enter the water. With every step you sink deeper into the rich sediment of the shallows. Go to [b]Location 509[/b].
The gangly giants grazing along the shore pay little attention to you. Go to [b]Location 344[/b].

471.text: The river is so wide that you don’t quite make it across. Go to [b]Location 472[/b].
The long swim is exhausting, but at the far shore the spectacle of light at the top of the cliff makes the climb a little more tolerable. Go to [b]Location 145[/b] and gain 1 morale.

472.text: Some large animals plod upstream as you swim by, paying no attention. Go to [b]Location 101[/b].
The endless waves leave your muscles aching. When you pull yourself ashore, you see birds circling a glowing light just above the water. Go to [b]Location 146[/b] and gain 1 morale.

472.action: [2694d0]SWIM[-] west toward a shoreside treasure chest
472.text: You glide across the murky water, watching to see if anyone claims the treasure chest before you reach it. Go to [b]Location 471[/b].

473.action: [2694d0]TRAILBLAZE[-] into the jungle, either to proceed north or to enter the city
473.text: Fashionable sentients mill around the entrance to the city. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Gain 1 random skill and go to city [b]Location 526[/b].
Gain ability [b]Item 1484[/b] and go to [b]Location 102[/b].

473.text: The gentle squawking of the seabirds above welcomes you ashore after an exhausting swim. Go to [b]Location 147[/b] and gain 1 morale.

474.text: You trip over underwater branches as you make your way to shore. Go to [b]Location 103[/b].

474.action: [2694d0]WADE[-] south to the closest shoreline before walking along the beach
474.text: The beach is idyllic, but there’s something unsettling about the water here. Go to [b]Location 148[/b].

475.action: [2694d0]LEAP[-] east off the waterfall toward an elemental in the water
475.text: Jumping off a waterfall is easy, but avoiding the rocks below is not. Roll 2 skill dice and gain all [a84fc0]look[-] results. Lose 1 health unless you pay [a84fc0]1 look[-]. Go to [b]Location 431[/b].
The hike takes you through the bushes, across a series of waterfalls, and to the edge of a forest. Go to [b]Location 104[/b].

476.text: Gain 1 random skill and go to the ocean location matching that skill: [2694d0]move[-]/[a84fc0]look[-] ([b]Location 055[/b]); anything else ([b]Location 060[/b]).
You tread carefully through the clear water, avoiding the jagged metal shards of your spaceship wreckage. Go to [b]Location 731[/b].

476.action: [2694d0]DIVE[-] south underwater, trying to avoid several dangerous-looking sea spouts

choices.outcome: Go south to [b]Location 636[/b] and gain 1 morale.

You are caught in the second sea spout, which sends you rocketing out of the water. Roll a skill die and go to a location based on the result: [2694d0]move[-] ([b]Location 636[/b]); [a84fc0]look[-] ([b]Location 361[/b]); [fd8c46]engage[-] ([b]Location 667[/b]); [0b955e]help[-] ([b]Location 434[/b]); [fff349]take[-] ([b]Location 649[/b]); [ec1c3b]overpower[-] ([b]Location 752[/b]).

477.text: Keeping the shoreline well within view, you paddle eastward, where large flora cast shadows underwater. Go to [b]Location 478[/b].
You swim toward the flags bobbing on the surface of the water. Go to [b]Location 737[/b].
Gain 1 random skill and go to the ocean location matching that skill: [2694d0]move[-]/[a84fc0]look[-] ([b]Location 059[/b]); anything else ([b]Location 062[/b]).

478.text: Never venturing too far from the nearest shore, you swim eastward, where a watchful sentient seems to be patrolling the waves. Go to [b]Location 479[/b].
The verdant jungle in the distance beckons to you as you swim. Go to [b]Location 743[/b].
Gain 1 random skill and go to the ocean location matching that skill: [2694d0]move[-]/[a84fc0]look[-] ([b]Location 051[/b]); anything else ([b]Location 062[/b]).
You keep your head above water as you swim, trying to discern how the Traveler is standing on the ocean surface. Go to [b]Location 477[/b].

479.text: You paddle near the shoreline toward a large, affable-looking serpent-like creature. Go to [b]Location 480[/b].
You stay as close to the surface as possible while you swim, avoiding the jellyfish. Go to [b]Location 749[/b].
Gain 1 random skill and go to the ocean location matching that skill: [2694d0]move[-]/[a84fc0]look[-] ([b]Location 052[/b]); anything else ([b]Location 057[/b]).
You swim west toward an angular technology hovering above the water. Go to [b]Location 478[/b].

480.text: The swim along the gentle tide is relaxing, and the rolling hills to the north look idyllic. Go to [b]Location 454[/b].
The calm swim becomes precarious as you approach the wreckage of a wooden ship. Go to [b]Location 755[/b].
Gain 1 random skill and go to the ocean location matching that skill: [2694d0]move[-]/[a84fc0]look[-] ([b]Location 056[/b]); anything else ([b]Location 051[/b]).
You try to avoid splashing a sentient hovering above the water. Go to [b]Location 479[/b].

481.action: [2694d0]DODGE[-] fireballs to move north around the volcano
481.text: The seisms of the ground and the occasional salvo of fireballs in your direction makes what would otherwise be a pleasant stroll potentially lethal. Go to [b]Location 150[/b] and gain 1 morale.
The water cools noticeably as you (prudently) move further from the volcano. Go to [b]Location 120[/b].

482.text: A series of boulders covered in lichen make for faster progress than swimming or wading. Go to [b]Location 483[/b].

482.action: [2694d0]SWIM[-] north, ignoring the advice of the sentients
482.text: The city is covered in ash, but you find a nice inlet on the far shore. Go to [b]Location 151[/b].
You leap from rock to rock in a single, bold dash. Go to [b]Location 121[/b].

483.text: As you stroll along the far shore, you pass a piece of your ship wreckage. It’s part of the propulsion system and could become flightworthy with a bit of work. You may either go north to [b]Location 152[/b] or continue with a [0b955e]help-◆3-[b]REPAIR[/b][-] action (then read the next result only):

choices.outcome: After patching a small portion of the shattered spaceship, you realize just how big of a task you’ve created for yourself. Gain 1 boost and destiny [b]Item 1605[/b] (place it in the center). You may either stop (go to [b]Location 152[/b]) or continue with a [0b955e]help-◆5-[b]REPAIR[/b][-] action to weld the pieces into something more cohesive yet still nonfunctional (then read the next result only):

You step back and admire your work. This part of the spaceship is airtight, but the most difficult job remains. For the spaceship to be even semi-operational, you must rewire it and fix the power supply. Gain 1 morale and [0b955e]1 help[-]. You may either stop (go to [b]Location 152[/b]) or continue with a [0b955e]help-◆7-[b]REPAIR[/b][-] action to obtain a partial spaceship (then read the next result):
The lights flicker on, and your heart sings as the ship hovers off the ground. Gain vehicle [b]Item 1434[/b] and go to [b]Location 152[/b].

483.text: As you move westward from rock to rock, you hear the commotion of distress. Go to [b]Location 482[/b].

484.action: [2694d0]WADE[-] north toward an odd rock formation
484.text: Whether it was some kind of natural mirage or sentient-made deception, you realize as you approach that rock formation is hiding a precious secret. Go to [b]Location 153[/b].

485.text: As you swim in the warming water, lava continues to ooze slowly from the caldera of the stratovolcano. Go to [b]Location 154[/b].

486.text: The intensifying heat of the desert air makes an already strenuous hike even more exhausting… and even more exhilarating to finish. Go to [b]Location 487[/b] and gain 1 morale.

On the far side, you find an unoccupied boat. You may pay [2694d0]1 move[-], [fff349]1 take[-], or 1 time to steer it into the water; if so, gain vehicle [b]Item 1014[/b] and $4. Either way, go to [b]Location 275[/b].

486.action: [2694d0]TRUDGE[-] south through an area of the desert speckled with reflective objects
486.text: Due to the sheer volume of mirrored glass in the sand, you can’t avoid slicing open your leg. Lose 1 health. You can go to [b]Location 736[/b] and lose another health or turn back to stay on [b]Location 486[/b].

487.text: It takes a running start, but you manage to clear the canyon with room to spare. You feel proud, and you look around, hoping that someone saw your feat. Go to [b]Location 276[/b].

The sand slips under your feet with every step, making the hike even more tiring, but at least the cool wind off the water to the west provides a little relief. Go to [b]Location 486[/b] and gain 1 morale.

488.text: As you approach the gateway in the wall, what appears at first to be a mirage is actually a many-legged beast. Go to [b]Location 277[/b].
A curious fog rests over the desert city. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Go to [b]Location 748[/b].

choices.option: Enter the city to the south through a back entrance
choices.outcome: Go to city [b]Location 531[/b].

489.text: You plod along the dry desert, willing yourself to keep going. Go to [b]Location 278[/b].
You avoid the long trails of dust and sand that the riders and their mounts are kicking up. Go to [b]Location 754[/b].

049.text: As you walk, the entire cave begins to vibrate and move. Choose one:

choices.option: Grab a spike and hold on
choices.outcome: Despite the wild movements of the cave—which you now realize is a rather large creature—the inside is surprisingly stable. That is, until the beast reaches the surface, propelling you skyward. Your fall is cushioned by palm trees and phlegm. Gain 1 boost and go to [b]Location 758[/b].

choices.option: Reverse course and dash south out of the cave
choices.outcome: As you run, a sudden gust of moist wind hurtles you out of the cave. Lose 1 health and go to cave [b]Location 044[/b].

049.text: The cave jerks under your feet as you walk, and you stumble out to cave [b]Location 044[/b].

490.text: The cool water is welcome relief from the hot wind still blowing from the west. Go to [b]Location 461[/b].

490.action: [2694d0]EVADE[-] south through the chaos of battle
490.text: The clangor of battle rings in your ears. Roll 5 skill dice and gain all [ec1c3b]overpower[-] results. Then lose 1 health unless you pay [ec1c3b]1 overpower[-]. Go to [b]Location 760[/b].

491.text: The pond may be shallow, but you quickly learn to test every step to avoid slicing your feet on the wreckage. Go to [b]Location 350[/b].

492.text: Unless you pay [2694d0]1 move[-], lose 1 health as you crash into the ground at the base of the valley. Go to [b]Location 351[/b].
As much heat as the complex produces, a patina of ice still covers most of its topside. Go to [b]Location 626[/b].

493.text: The snow gets shallower and eventually gives way to mud and grass as you descend into the valley below. Go to [b]Location 352[/b].
The cables are wide, but they’re slick with ice. Gain ability [b]Item 1501[/b] and go to city [b]Location 521[/b].

494.text: As you trudge down the long hillside, the snowy terrain gives way to slippery mud and grass. Go to [b]Location 353[/b] and gain 1 morale.

495.action: [2694d0]BALANCE[-] east using the rope as a zipline or [2694d0]LEAP[-] east
495.text: You make the death-defying maneuver look easy. Go to [b]Location 496[/b] and gain 1 morale.
The climb down the icy cliff face is unforgiving and the handholds are fewer in number than you’d like, but at least the view to the north is spectacular. Go to [b]Location 354[/b] and gain 1 morale.

496.text: The crunching of the crisp snow gives way to the squelching of mud as you slowly plod down the mountainside. Go to [b]Location 355[/b] and gain 1 morale.
A giant, tentacled animal blocks the route west, so you skirt around it to the south. Go to [b]Location 629[/b].

497.text: The water is cold from the melting snow to the south, but it grows warmer the farther you swim. Go to [b]Location 356[/b].

498.action: [2694d0]EVADE[-] north past the elemental (if the elemental is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
498.text: The narrow canyon leaves little room for maneuvering, but you manage to avoid the monstrous elemental’s attention—or at least its interest. Go to [b]Location 357[/b]; if this action’s cost was not reduced to 1, also gain 1 morale.

499.action: [2694d0]TREK[-] north through the cluster of buildings
499.text: The sulfides seeping through the fissures in the ground nauseate you. Go to [b]Location 358[/b].

050.text: Even with a running start, you barely manage to clear the gap. Move deeper into the planet to cave [b]Location 079[/b].

500.action: [2694d0]TREK[-] north across the lava field; you may add +2 to this cost to move to the northeast or northwest instead

choices.outcome: You tread carefully to an expanse covered in igneous pinnacles. Go to [b]Location 358[/b].
Suffer 1 heat damage and go to [b]Location 359[/b].
Soon you hear the crash of waves and the sizzle of rapidly cooling lava falling into the sea. Go to [b]Location 360[/b].

501.text: Suffer 1 heat damage and go to [b]Location 360[/b].

502.action: [2694d0]WADE[-] north across the channel or add 2 to this cost to [2694d0]TREK[-] north along the shoreline

choices.outcome: The scalding water boils your skin as you wade. Suffer 1 heat damage and go to [b]Location 361[/b].
The terrain is unforgiving, but you can’t help but admire the severe beauty of the volcanic coastline. Go to [b]Location 361[/b].

503.text: The water remains shallow for quite some distance from shore. Go to [b]Location 362[/b].
As you hike along the shore, the combination of seaside smells and sounds makes you nostalgic for the family reunions of your youth. Go to [b]Location 447[/b].

504.action: [2694d0]WADE[-] north across the calm, shallow channel
504.text: A light breeze dances across the water as you wade underneath a skyship. Go to [b]Location 363[/b].
The farther you wade south away from the ocean, the muddier the water becomes. Go to [b]Location 340[/b].

505.action: [2694d0]WADE[-] north, briefly exchanging pleasantries with the sentient
505.text: Go to [b]Location 364[/b] and gain 1 boost. The sentient warns of much deeper waters ahead and dangers lurking under the surface.

506.text: The undertow tugs at your legs as you go to [b]Location 365[/b].

506.action: [2694d0]TREK[-] south into or around a city
506.text: Just south of the ocean is a glimmering city. Choose one:

choices.outcome: You’ve never seen so much gold before. Go to city [b]Location 529[/b].
You scout information about the golden civilization as you trek. Gain 1 boost and go to [b]Location 342[/b].

507.action: [2694d0]WADE[-] north from one sandbar to the next
507.text: A series of sandbars ensures your top half remains dry as you wade north. Go to [b]Location 366[/b].
As you walk down the long hill to the canal, you admire the glimmering monuments to the west. Go to [b]Location 343[/b].

508.text: Boats skim across the water as you wade north. Go to [b]Location 367[/b].
The gleaming gold of the city reflects impossibly on the brown water. Go to [b]Location 344[/b].

509.action: [2694d0]WADE[-] north into the confluence of sea and fresh water
509.text: The brackish water has an odd smell. Go to [b]Location 368[/b].

509.action: [2694d0]WADE[-] south toward the edge of a forest
509.text: You’re so busy looking for slippery rocks as you wade that you pass right by some long-legged animals grazing by the shore. Go to [b]Location 470[/b].

511.text: You clamber down the steep slope and (carefully) hop along a series of small islands before finding firmer ground. Go to [b]Location 475[/b].

512.text: The water is shallow, and you soon step onto the island. Go to [b]Location 514[/b].
You hold your breath and plunge into the depths. Go to [b]Location 643[/b], where you ignore hypoxia damage upon arrival.

513.text: The hair on your forearm stands on end as you step through the energy shield. Exit to [b]Location 213[/b].

514.action: [2694d0]DIVE[-] south underwater or [2694d0]WADE[-] south to the rocky archipelago

choices.outcome: Go to [b]Location 644[/b], where you ignore hypoxia damage upon arrival.
Go to [b]Location 512[/b].

515.action: [2694d0]TRUDGE[-] east across the sand (only if you have completed quest 1695)
515.text: You begin to feel nauseous the further east you go—some sort of time dilation effect. Go to [b]Location 517[/b].
You feel a cool breeze from the other side of the arch, and you step forward into it. Go to [b]Location 741[/b].

515.action: [2694d0]TRAILBLAZE[-] south through the jungle (only if you have quest 1699)
515.text: You are amazed by what you find in the once-empty grove. Go to [b]Location 516[/b].

516.text: You can feel the sunburn as you walk across the scalding desert. Go to [b]Location 515[/b].

517.action: [2694d0]TRUDGE[-] back west over the hot sand
517.text: You begrudgingly leave the shade of your new ship to head west toward the gateway. Go to [b]Location 515[/b].

518.action: [2694d0]WALK[-] north after passing through the city
518.text: Beyond the market square, the city becomes more spacious—it seems that wind sentients don’t like spatial constraints. Go to [b]Location 191[/b].

519.action: [2694d0]TREK[-] north after passing through the city
519.text: Your thighs get an excellent workout as you stroll through the city, the streets of which are almost all staircases. Go to [b]Location 682[/b].

520.action: [2694d0]TRAILBLAZE[-] north after passing through the city
520.text: The cozy, silent city reminds you of stories of ancient libraries. Eventually the shops taper off and you find yourself back in the marsh. Go to [b]Location 243[/b].

521.text: You leave the glowing lights of the Gibsonesque city and out into the wild snow fields, where it’s somehow even colder. Go to [b]Location 628[/b].

521.action: [2694d0]BALANCE[-] north after passing through the city
521.text: You wonder how other sentients navigate this peculiar urban planning. Gain ability [b]Item 1501[/b] and go to [b]Location 493[/b].

522.text: A cruel wind blows along the face of the tall cliff, leaving you somehow even colder than you were in the frigid city. Go to [b]Location 207[/b] and gain 1 morale.

522.action: [2694d0]CLIMB[-] north after passing through the city
522.text: The howling wind beating against the cliffside makes the nearly vertical ascent punishing, but as you near the precipice, a glow from behind it draws your attention. Go to [b]Location 211[/b] and gain 1 morale.

523.action: [2694d0]HIKE[-] north after passing through the city
523.text: Leaving the city this way makes for a technical but manageable climb. Go to [b]Location 728[/b].
You deftly maneuver around the rolling boulders. Go to [b]Location 721[/b].

524.action: [2694d0]TREK[-] north after passing through the city
524.text: You have a sense of unease as you walk through the skeletons that shape this city. Go to [b]Location 267[/b].

525.action: [2694d0]WADE[-] north after passing through the city
525.text: The water of the sea is a welcome relief from the perpetual heat of molten metal in the industrial city. Go to [b]Location 167[/b].

526.action: [2694d0]TRAILBLAZE[-] north after passing through the city
526.text: You slide down giant leaves to reach the jungle basin before forging a path north. Go to [b]Location 102[/b].

527.action: [2694d0]WADE[-] north after passing through the city
527.text: You stroll across a vast series of boardwalks until one ends at the northern edge of the city. The water is warm, welcoming, and waist-high. Go to [b]Location 739[/b].

528.action: [2694d0]SWIM[-] north after passing through the city
528.text: You can’t hear much underwater, but the vibrant lights of the City of Waves are dazzling to witness as you swim north. Go to [b]Location 642[/b].

529.action: [2694d0]SWIM[-] north after passing through the city
529.text: The glitz of the city is beyond anything you’ve seen on other worlds. Go to [b]Location 506[/b].

530.action: [2694d0]DESCEND[-] north after passing through the city
530.text: You methodically descend a vertical cliff at the northern edge of the city, then make your way to tidal pools tucked into a vast shoreline. Gain ability [b]Item 1491[/b] and 1 morale; go to [b]Location 337[/b].

531.action: [2694d0]TRUDGE[-] north after passing through the city
531.text: The sights and sounds of the sandy city are soon behind you as you trudge north. Go to [b]Location 488[/b].

541.text: The waist-high grass billows in the breeze coming off the sea. Go to [b]Location 136[/b].
The grassy cliffside shoreline makes for a moderately difficult hike away from the ruins. Go to [b]Location 140[/b].
You wade through the shallows to reach a tiny island, upon which is perched an even tinier animal. Go to [b]Location 406[/b].

542.text: When you exit the ruins, the shadow of something high up in the clouds passes over the plains. Go to [b]Location 190[/b].

543.text: The descent off the plateau is steep, but a series of ropes helps you reach solid ground. Go to [b]Location 264[/b].

544.text: The forest is dense but navigable. You hear a falling gobble-like call from a bird followed by a clap of its beak. Go to [b]Location 315[/b].

545.action: [2694d0]LEAP[-] north off the sky island into the water
545.text: You plummet into the waves, nearly landing on a pointy device. Go to [b]Location 405[/b].

545.action: [2694d0]LEAP[-] west across the gap to another island
545.text: With a running start you clear the gap and find yourself on a much less tranquil island. Go to [b]Location 304[/b].

546.text: You carefully avoid touching the crumbling ruins as you head north. Go to [b]Location 699[/b].

547.text: The alps tower over the already impressive waterfall. Go to [b]Location 712[/b].

548.action: [2694d0]BALANCE[-] south across the narrow walkway out of the ruins
548.text: You realize that the walkway may actually be a wall, but it’s too late to turn back. Go to [b]Location 784[/b].

549.action: [2694d0]WADE[-] north across the stream after exiting the tent
549.text: You grab the plump mushroom as you leave the tent. Exit to [b]Location 108[/b], gaining item [b]Item 1136[/b] as you leave.

550.action: [2694d0]DESCEND[-] north down the steep drop after exiting the tent
550.text: Exit down the sheer cliff face to [b]Location 136[/b], gaining item [b]Item 1041[/b] as you leave. Also gain 1 morale.

551.action: [2694d0]DESCEND[-] north down the sheer cliff after exiting the tent
551.text: You grab a pair of boots on your way out of the tent (gain item [b]Item 955[/b]), then make a not-so-fast getaway down the almost vertical cliff face to the swampland below. Exit to [b]Location 230[/b] and gain 1 morale.

552.action: [2694d0]TRUDGE[-] north across the desert after exiting the tent
552.text: You snag a rope as you leave the tent. Exit to [b]Location 299[/b], gaining item [b]Item 902[/b] as you leave.

553.action: [2694d0]SWIM[-] north after exiting out the back window, pocketing a parchment as you leave
553.text: You roll up the map and try to waterproof it before jumping out a back window into the water. Gain item [b]Item 1257[/b] and exit to [b]Location 120[/b].

554.action: [2694d0]DASH[-] north through the back gate, pocketing the smallest item as you leave
554.text: You stuff the ball into your pocket as you dash out the gate. Gain item [b]Item 1228[/b] and exit to [b]Location 485[/b].

555.action: [2694d0]LEAP[-] west after exiting out the side window, pocketing an item as you leave
555.text: You grab the snowshoes and leap out the window. Gain item [b]Item 933[/b] and exit to [b]Location 128[/b].

556.action: [2694d0]LEAP[-] north after exiting out the back, grabbing an item as you leave
556.text: The sleeping bag looks quite cozy. You tuck it under your arm (gain item [b]Item 1040[/b]) and slip out the back door (exit to [b]Location 209[/b]).

557.action: [2694d0]HIKE[-] north after exiting out the back, pocketing the smallest item as you leave
557.text: You pocket the dice and quickly exit the tavern. Gain item [b]Item 924[/b] and exit to [b]Location 220[/b].

558.action: [2694d0]TREK[-] north after exiting out the back of the casino, pocketing the smallest item as you leave

choices.outcome: Gain 1 random card from the Skirm spoiler pack. Place it in your reserve, where your entire Skirm collection counts as only 1 reserved card. You can use this type of card from your reserve during [ec1c3b]overpower-[b]DUEL[/b][-] actions, which have further instructions. Exit to [b]Location 271[/b].
Gain item [b]Item 878[/b] and exit to [b]Location 271[/b].

559.action: [2694d0]SWIM[-] far north after exiting out the back, strapping on the goggles as you leave
559.text: You pocket the goggles (gain item [b]Item 935[/b]) and then dive into the vast sea for a long swim to the north. Exit to [b]Location 409[/b] and gain 1 morale.

560.action: [2694d0]TRAILBLAZE[-] north after exiting out the back, taking some shoes as you leave
560.text: You’ve never seen wingtips like the ones on these shoes. Gain item [b]Item 989[/b] and exit to [b]Location 678[/b].

561.action: [2694d0]EVADE[-] north after exiting out the back, pocketing a smaller item as you leave
561.text: You grab the goggles and escape through a narrow window. Gain item [b]Item 986[/b] and exit to [b]Location 490[/b].

563.action: [2694d0]EXIT[-] the bandit hideout into the clouds
563.text: On your way out of the room, you grab a blue ball from the cubby. Gain item [b]Item 1228[/b]. Then, using no additional information, exit to location [b]Location 706[/b], [b]Location 200[/b], [b]Location 393[/b], [b]Location 201[/b], or [b]Location 205[/b].

564.action: [2694d0]DESCEND[-] north after exiting out the back of the museum, attempting to grab the nearby armor as you leave
564.text: The nearby armor looks like it would fit you perfectly, but the security shield blocks you from touching it. You may pay 1 boost to disarm the shield; if you do, gain item [b]Item 975[/b]. If you don’t, gain 1 boost. Either way, exit to [b]Location 221[/b].

565.action: [2694d0]TRAILBLAZE[-] north after exiting out the back, pocketing a vial as you leave
565.text: You hope the owner of the house won’t notice a missing vial among so many colorful trinkets. Gain item [b]Item 861[/b] and exit to [b]Location 244[/b].

566.action: [2694d0]LEAP[-] east off the floating island, grabbing the glider as you leave
566.text: You grab the glider (gain vehicle [b]Item 957[/b]) and vault off the island (go to [b]Location 404[/b]).

566.action: [2694d0]LEAP[-] north after exiting out the back, stealing the farthest item as you leave
566.text: Had you not been in such a hurry, the glider would have aided the leap off the island. Gain vehicle [b]Item 957[/b] and exit to [b]Location 309[/b].

567.action: [2694d0]EXIT[-] north after exiting out a back window, pocketing an item as you leave
567.text: You pocket the gloves and rush toward the windows. Gain item [b]Item 936[/b] and exit to [b]Location 707[/b].

568.action: [2694d0]DESCEND[-] north with the smallest item in hand
568.text: You grab the goggles (gain item [b]Item 941[/b]) and exit the back window, which overhangs a steep descent to [b]Location 338[/b].

569.action: [2694d0]DESCEND[-] north after exiting out the back, pocketing a nearby item on the way out
569.text: You pilfer the compass (gain item [b]Item 968[/b]) then sneak down the long, sheer cliff to the valley below. Gain 1 morale, and exit to [b]Location 340[/b].

570.action: [2694d0]TREK[-] north after exiting out the back, pocketing a small item as you leave
570.text: You drop the ring in your pocket before leaving the resort. Gain item [b]Item 994[/b] and exit to [b]Location 343[/b].

571.action: [2694d0]SWIM[-] north after exiting out the back, taking a helpful item as you leave
571.text: You figure the fire sentients won’t miss a blowtorch. Gain item [b]Item 870[/b] and exit to [b]Location 125[/b].

572.action: [2694d0]DESCEND[-] north after exiting out the back, taking an item as you leave
572.text: You grab the clunky goggles. Gain item [b]Item 940[/b] and exit to [b]Location 397[/b].

573.action: [2694d0]SQUEEZE[-] north via the open window, grabbing the farthest item as you leave
573.text: You grab the climbing equipment and slip out the window. Gain item [b]Item 909[/b] and exit to [b]Location 411[/b].

574.action: [2694d0]SWIM[-] north after exiting out the back, taking the armor as you leave
574.text: You don the armor and squeeze out the back window. Gain item [b]Item 976[/b] and exit to [b]Location 454[/b].

575.action: [2694d0]SWIM[-] north after exiting out the back window, pocketing an item as you leave
575.text: You pilfer the binoculars before slipping out the window. Gain item [b]Item 972[/b] and exit to [b]Location 456[/b].

576.action: [2694d0]EXIT[-] north out the back, pocketing a dangerous item as you leave
576.text: You carefully handle the explosive. Gain item [b]Item 879[/b] and exit to [b]Location 457[/b].

577.action: [2694d0]LEAP[-] north over a canyon after exiting out the back, pocketing a document as you leave
577.text: You have only a moment to decide if the map (item [b]Item 1262[/b]) or the book (item [b]Item 1045[/b]) is more important to you. After you gain one, proceed to exit the window to [b]Location 465[/b], which smells as bad as it looks.

578.action: [2694d0]SWIM[-] north after exiting out the back, a nearby item in hand
578.text: You regret not putting on the flippers before swimming north. Gain item [b]Item 927[/b] and exit to [b]Location 356[/b].

579.action: [2694d0]TREK[-] north after exiting out the back, pocketing a small item as you leave
579.text: You slip the ring in your pocket, curious to see how it feels to try on. Gain item [b]Item 993[/b] and exit to [b]Location 358[/b].

580.action: [2694d0]TRUDGE[-] north after exiting out a side panel, pocketing an item as you leave that might aid your travels
580.text: The ice skates will be useful in the frozen north. Gain item [b]Item 951[/b] and exit to [b]Location 618[/b].

581.action: [2694d0]SQUEEZE[-] south through a ventilation shaft out of the facility
581.text: You drag the transducer behind you as you leave. Gain item [b]Item 948[/b] and exit to [b]Location 626[/b].

581.action: [2694d0]SNEAK[-] west out of a secret passage
581.text: You carry the transducer with you as you sneak out of the factory. Gain item [b]Item 948[/b] and exit to [b]Location 403[/b].

582.action: [2694d0]SWIM[-] north after exiting out the back, grabbing the farthest item as you leave
582.text: You steal the net as you swim away. Gain item [b]Item 932[/b] and exit north to [b]Location 641[/b].

583.action: [2694d0]EVADE[-] north past the council, grabbing the package as you leave
583.text: Much to the dismay of the council, you rob them of the package in plain sight. Gain item [b]Item 1034[/b] and exit to [b]Location 778[/b].

584.action: [2694d0]TRAILBLAZE[-] north after exiting out the back, stealing an item as you leave
584.text: You’re eager to try on the shoes after you leave the lodge. Gain item [b]Item 963[/b] and exit to [b]Location 667[/b].

585.action: [2694d0]TRAILBLAZE[-] north after exiting out the back door, pocketing the key as you leave
585.text: You doubt anyone will notice the missing key. Gain item [b]Item 996[/b] and exit to [b]Location 681[/b].

586.action: [2694d0]CLIMB[-] north after exiting out the back, pocketing a ring as you leave
586.text: You’re excited to try on the ring. Gain item [b]Item 995[/b] and exit to [b]Location 687[/b].

587.action: [2694d0]WADE[-] north after exiting out the back, putting on the oxygen mask as you leave
587.text: You look forward to diving into this ocean with this mask. Gain item [b]Item 964[/b] and exit to [b]Location 745[/b].

588.action: [2694d0]WADE[-] north after exiting out the back, taking the farthest item as you leave
588.text: You toss the fishing net over your shoulders as you leave the island. Gain item [b]Item 911[/b] and exit to [b]Location 738[/b].

589.action: [2694d0]EXIT[-] north out the back, stealing an offering as you leave
589.text: The egg looks like it might make an interesting omelet. Gain item [b]Item 977[/b] and exit to [b]Location 764[/b].

590.action: [2694d0]HIKE[-] north after exiting out the back, pocketing an item as you leave
590.text: You hope you can fit into the climbing gear. Gain item [b]Item 904[/b] and exit to [b]Location 770[/b].

591.action: [2694d0]DESCEND[-] north down the back of the building
591.text: You steal a ring as you leave the room. Gain item [b]Item 990[/b] and exit to [b]Location 787[/b].

591.action: [2694d0]EXIT[-] west, pocketing the ring as you leave
591.text: The large ring looks like it may fit better on your wrist than your finger. Gain item [b]Item 990[/b] and exit to [b]Location 780[/b].

593.text: Return to the cave location from which you originally entered the dungeon.

594.text: Return to the cave location from which you originally entered the dungeon.

595.text: Return to the cave location from which you originally entered the dungeon.

596.text: Return to the cave location from which you originally entered the dungeon.

597.action: [2694d0]DESCEND[-] north out of the lighthouse window, pocketing the farthest item as you leave
597.text: The map on the wall looks like it will provide a sense of direction. Gain item [b]Item 1251[/b] and exit to [b]Location 310[/b].

598.text: Return to the cave location from which you originally entered the dungeon.

599.text: Return to the cave location from which you originally entered the dungeon.

601.text: You slide and shuffle across the ice, hoping it’s thick enough to hold you. Go to [b]Location 606[/b].
The ice slopes slightly downhill, so you simply maintain your balance as you slide toward a lorestone. Go to [b]Location 220[/b].

602.text: The thin ice breaks under your weight, plunging you into the frigid water. Roll 3 skill dice and gain all [2694d0]move[-] and [a84fc0]look[-] results. Suffer 1 cold damage unless you pay [2694d0]1 move[-] or [a84fc0]1 look[-], then pull yourself to safety (go to [b]Location 607[/b]).

603.text: The hike through the deep snow is long and tiring. Gain ability [b]Item 1496[/b] and go to [b]Location 222[/b].

604.text: The thick sheet of ice easily holds your weight, but propelling forward in a relatively straight line requires some patience. Go to [b]Location 609[/b].

604.action: [2694d0]TRUDGE[-] south through the ice and snow
604.text: There’s no relief from the cold as the wind kicks up flurries of snow. Go to [b]Location 223[/b].

605.action: [2694d0]SNEAK[-] north around the camp (if the camp is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
605.text: The snow muffles the sound of your steps as you sneak north. Go to [b]Location 610[/b].

605.action: [2694d0]HIKE[-] south out of the valley onto the ridge
605.text: The ridge narrows precipitously and a blizzard rolls in as you trek southward. Go to [b]Location 224[/b].

606.text: You expect to slip on the ice before the long ascent up the mountain path, but a supernatural force pushes you forward with precision and speed. Go to [b]Location 611[/b].
You careen over the icy slope and down a snowy embankment. Go to [b]Location 601[/b].

607.text: Roll 4 skill dice and gain all [ec1c3b]overpower[-] results. Underfoot of the animals, you lose 1 health unless you pay [ec1c3b]1 overpower[-] or unless you previously removed the threat of the animals. Go to [b]Location 612[/b].
You slide wildly across a frozen lake but your fear subsumes your exhilaration as you notice the wide cracks in the ice. Go to [b]Location 602[/b].

608.action: [2694d0]SLIDE[-] north across the vast expanse of ice
608.text: You fear for bumps, bruises, and breaks every time you fall on the ice. Go to [b]Location 613[/b].

609.text: Using the snow for traction you accelerate yourself to a breakneck speed. It’s not safe or comfortable, but at least it’s fun. Go to [b]Location 613[/b].
Your breath catches in your lungs as you reach the summit. View page 32 in the Book of Vantages and gain 2 boost. Then go to [b]Location 614[/b] and gain 1 morale.
It’s a smooth ride down into the open plain, and you spot something smoking in the distance ahead. Go to [b]Location 604[/b].

610.action: [2694d0]EVADE[-] the animal as you make your way north (if the animal is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
610.text: You dart forward through the snowfall, finding cover in a small canyon. Go to [b]Location 615[/b].

611.action: [2694d0]SLIDE[-] north over the ice, avoiding the cracks
611.text: The ice tilts toward a series of gaps, and falling into them could be deadly. Fortunately you manage to avoid them as you slide north. Go to [b]Location 616[/b].

611.action: [2694d0]DESCEND[-] south down a small, icy hill
611.text: You find yourself behind a sentient, their back to you. They seem to be guarding a cave entrance. You can choose to go to cave [b]Location 021[/b] or to face the sentient (go to location [b]Location 606[/b]).

612.text: You pass tall, cabled towers that remind you of the server racks on your spaceship. Go to [b]Location 607[/b].

613.text: From the top of the mountain, the clouds briefly part to reveal the snowy area below. View page 32 in the Book of Vantages and gain 2 boost. Then go to [b]Location 614[/b] and gain 1 morale.
The ice turning to snow is a sign of warmer climates to the north. Go to [b]Location 618[/b].
The cold doesn’t subside, but at least the fast slide across the nearly frictionless ice is fun. Go to [b]Location 608[/b].
