614.action: [2694d0]DESCEND[-] to the east from the mountaintop
614.text: The steep descent into the icy canyon below is cold and technically demanding. Go east to [b]Location 615[/b].

614.action: [2694d0]DESCEND[-] to the south from the mountaintop
614.text: The sun hangs tentatively in the sky, seeming powerless to melt the frozen lake below. Go south to [b]Location 609[/b].

614.action: [2694d0]DESCEND[-] to the west from the mountaintop
614.text: The temperature doesn’t become any more forgiving as you clamber down the icy mountainside to the towering, cabled structures below. Go west to [b]Location 613[/b].

615.action: [2694d0]WALK[-] east through a gateway illuminated by green lights
615.text: Unless you’ve disarmed the gateway, you receive a brutal shock as you pass through it. Lose 1 health and go to [b]Location 422[/b].
From the top of the mountain, the clouds briefly part to reveal the snowy area below. View page 32 in the Book of Vantages and gain 2 boost. Then go to [b]Location 614[/b] and gain 1 morale.

616.action: [2694d0]EVADE[-] north past the elemental (if the elemental is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
616.text: By staying close to the cliffside you manage to avoid the attention of the nightmarish synthetic elemental’s many tentacles. Go to [b]Location 621[/b]; if this action’s cost was not reduced to 1, also gain 1 morale.
Against your better judgment, you careen down an icy hill and across a frozen lake. Go to [b]Location 611[/b].

617.text: After focusing on the frozen, spiky stones, you look up to see a sentient glaring at you. Go to [b]Location 622[/b].

618.text: It’s still freezing, but you’re happy to find yourself more in the open (and with fewer enormous and frankly weird chattering masks). Go to [b]Location 613[/b].

619.action: [2694d0]SNEAK[-] north past the busy sentient (if the sentient is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
619.text: You are reluctant to leave the warmth of the sentient as you sneak north. Go to [b]Location 624[/b].
You slide across the slippery ice and skid to a stop in a wide, shallow cave. Go to [b]Location 618[/b].

620.text: The crisp snow starts to turn to mush as you hike east. Go to [b]Location 423[/b] and gain 1 morale.
To avoid electrocution, you wiggle carefully through the wires. Go to [b]Location 625[/b].

621.text: The maze piques your curiosity, but it’s much easier to simply walk around it. Go to [b]Location 626[/b].

621.action: [2694d0]SNEAK[-] south past the hydra-like elemental (if the elemental is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
621.text: You hug the snowy cliff face as you move south and manage to avoid the attention of the elemental’s numerous appendages. Go to [b]Location 616[/b]; if this action’s cost was not reduced to 1, also gain 1 morale.
The air warms quickly as you scale down the far side of the wall. Go to [b]Location 402[/b].

622.action: [2694d0]EVADE[-] north past the sentient (if the sentient is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
622.text: You scamper across the snow toward the city lights in the distance. Go to [b]Location 627[/b].

623.action: [2694d0]SNEAK[-] north past the hologram while the Traveler provides a distraction (if you talked to the hologram, reduce this cost to 1)
623.text: The panoptic holographic AI sees your attempts to sneak by it, and as you leave, it offers haughtily, “I could calculate your chance of survival, but you won’t like it.” Go to [b]Location 628[/b].

624.text: You need a little luck to make it through the wires. Roll 3 skill dice and gain all [a84fc0]look[-] results. Lose 1 health as you trip on a cord and bang your knee unless you pay [a84fc0]1 look[-]. Go north to [b]Location 629[/b].
You avoid the tangle of wires and head northeast, where a vehicle hovers over the Traveler. Go to [b]Location 630[/b].

625.text: Warm air from the east motivates you to persist east across the mountain range. Go to [b]Location 424[/b] and gain 1 morale.

626.text: The building features ample handholds and footholds, though you’re careful not to slice yourself on the sharp metal. Go to [b]Location 492[/b].

626.action: [2694d0]TREK[-] south around the outskirts of a maze, scouting it as much as possible
626.text: You catch occasional glimpses of the maze as you walk, giving you a slight advantage if you decide to journey through it later. Gain 1 boost and [a84fc0]1 look[-]; go to [b]Location 621[/b].
A jolt of electricity strikes as you grab the top of the fence (unless you previously disarmed the fence, suffer 1 heat damage). Go to [b]Location 403[/b].

627.text: You stay clear of the dozens of cables draping outward from the city center and dash to the frozen wastes to the east. Go to [b]Location 628[/b].
You figure there must be an easier way to enter the city, but you haven’t seen one yet. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Go to city [b]Location 521[/b], gain 1 random skill, and gain 1 morale.
Go to [b]Location 493[/b] and gain 1 morale.

627.action: [2694d0]SNEAK[-] south past an angry-looking sentient (if the sentient is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
627.text: An intimidating sentient has their back turned to you. Either confront them (go to [b]Location 622[/b]) or go southeast to [b]Location 623[/b] or southwest to [b]Location 621[/b].

628.text: The land drops off just beyond the crystals, leading down toward fields of green. Go to [b]Location 494[/b].

629.text: You dodge through tentacles swinging like huge, slow pendulums around you. Go to [b]Location 495[/b].

630.text: After cresting the hill, the temperature rises rapidly to something more comfortable, and the snow gives way to sand. Go to [b]Location 425[/b].

631.text: You push away from the seaweed to a place where you can stand out of the water. Go to [b]Location 363[/b].
Your lungs plead for fresh air as you head for the surface. Go to [b]Location 381[/b].

632.text: You swim against the current to stay clear of the dangerous flora. Go to [b]Location 638[/b].
Roll 5 skill dice and gain all [a84fc0]look[-] results. Lose 1 health as the plants slash toward you unless you pay [a84fc0]1 look[-]. Go to [b]Location 633[/b].
You’re eager to escape from the violent flora. Go to [b]Location 426[/b].

633.text: Roll 5 skill dice and gain all [a84fc0]look[-] results. Lose 1 health as the plants slash toward you unless you pay [a84fc0]1 look[-]. Go to [b]Location 632[/b].
Bubbles released by the fish push you toward the shallows. Go to [b]Location 427[/b].

634.text: As intriguing and mysteriously well-lit as the depths appear, you are eager for a breath of fresh air. Go to [b]Location 428[/b].

635.text: The bioluminescent roots help to guide you toward the shallows. Go to [b]Location 429[/b].

choices.outcome: Go north to [b]Location 476[/b] and gain 1 morale.

You are caught in the second sea spout, which sends you rocketing out of the water. Roll a skill die and go to a location based on the result: [2694d0]move[-] ([b]Location 476[/b]); [a84fc0]look[-] ([b]Location 361[/b]); [fd8c46]engage[-] ([b]Location 667[/b]); [0b955e]help[-] ([b]Location 434[/b]); [fff349]take[-] ([b]Location 649[/b]); [ec1c3b]overpower[-] ([b]Location 752[/b]).

637.action: [2694d0]SWIM[-] north as seaweed slaps into you
637.text: Tendrils of seaweed wrap around your appendages, some leaving painful welts as you pull away. Go to [b]Location 638[/b] and lose 1 health.
As you emerge from the ocean, the breeze skimming along the water warns you of a storm to the east. Go to [b]Location 364[/b].

638.text: Any piece of seaweed that comes into contact with your skin leaves you with open sores. Go to [b]Location 637[/b] and lose 1 health.

638.action: [2694d0]SWIM[-] west as the giant seaweed waves around you
638.text: Countless bioluminescent tendrils light your way. Go to [b]Location 632[/b].

639.text: The thick cables sway in the current as you swim by. Go to [b]Location 640[/b].

640.text: A guard stops you and asks for identification. If you have the water emblem, go to [b]Location 641[/b]. If not, stay here, gain 1 boost, and continue.
You manage to pull yourself through the heavy cables undulating slowly in the current. Go to [b]Location 639[/b].

641.text: The city glows with the bioluminescence of a million organisms. Choose one:

choices.outcome: You find a less populated area to enter the ocean metropolis. Go to city [b]Location 528[/b].
Go to [b]Location 642[/b].

642.action: [2694d0]EVADE[-] north past the animal to the surface (if the animal is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
642.text: The beast is massive, but it’s also quite slow. Go to [b]Location 477[/b].

642.action: [2694d0]SWIM[-] south into or around an underwater city
642.text: You swim deeper into the ocean, the pressure building in your ears. Go either to city [b]Location 528[/b] or to [b]Location 641[/b].

643.text: You underestimated the strength of the waterspout. Roll 2 skill dice and gain all [2694d0]move[-] results. Then choose one:

choices.outcome: Go to [b]Location 644[/b].

choices.option: Leave yourself at the whim of the waterspout
choices.outcome: Lose 1 health and go to [b]Location 512[/b].

643.text: The closer you swim to the shallows in this area, the more you are at the whim of the tide. Go to [b]Location 365[/b].

644.text: To avoid being dragged to the sea floor, you give the vortex a wide berth. Go to [b]Location 643[/b].

645.action: [2694d0]PUSH[-] north past the sentient (if the sentient is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
645.text: The sentient, impressed by your strength, lets you pass. Go to [b]Location 646[/b]; if this action’s cost was not reduced to 1, also gain 1 morale.

646.action: [2694d0]SWIM[-] north past the sentient, bowing respectfully
646.text: In appreciation, the creature cushions your head in a bubble. Ignore the hypoxia damage when you arrive at [b]Location 647[/b].

648.text: Catching your scent, a pair of sharks chases after you. Roll 2 skill dice; if the results include at least [2694d0]1 move[-] or [ec1c3b]1 overpower[-], go north to [b]Location 478[/b]. Otherwise, lose 1 health and go to an adjacent listed location.

649.text: You’re unsure of the dangers that lurk around or inside the shipwreck, so you head to the shallows. Go to [b]Location 366[/b].

650.action: [2694d0]PUSH[-] north past the weakened sentient (if the sentient is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
650.text: You dart smoothly through the water, only to come face to face with several angry animals. Go to [b]Location 651[/b].

651.action: [2694d0]EVADE[-] north around the herd of animals (if the animals are no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
651.text: You swim past several large egg-like containers hidden on the ocean floor. Go to [b]Location 652[/b].

652.text: You grow still and calm your heartbeat, drifting above guards. Go to [b]Location 653[/b].

653.text: You swim quietly over several guards without catching their attention. Go to [b]Location 652[/b].

654.action: [2694d0]SQUEEZE[-] north through the seemingly endless colony of anemones
654.text: Roll 2 skill dice. For each [fd8c46]engage[-] and [ec1c3b]overpower[-] result, suffer 1 heat damage as the anemones sting you. Then go to [b]Location 479[/b].

655.text: Fresh air fills your lungs when you reach the shallows. Go to [b]Location 448[/b].
You gulp for air as you break through to the surface. Go to [b]Location 367[/b].

656.text: These dark ocean depths give you the creeps. Go to [b]Location 449[/b].

657.text: Underwater monsters have a huge advantage over you in their natural environment; you didn’t even learn to swim until recently. Go to [b]Location 450[/b].

657.action: [2694d0]EVADE[-] north past the elemental (if the elemental is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
657.text: You swim behind rock formations and the bubbles rising from glowing vents and manage not to draw the hulking sea monster’s attention. Go to [b]Location 658[/b]; if this action’s cost was not reduced to 1, also gain 1 morale.

658.text: You swim away from these dark waters, cresting the ocean surface. Go to [b]Location 451[/b].

658.action: [2694d0]SNEAK[-] south around a massive elemental (if the elemental is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
658.text: You can only be so subtle moving around in the water, but to your relief the gargantuan creature either doesn’t notice or doesn’t take interest in you. Go to [b]Location 657[/b]; if this action’s cost was not reduced to 1, also gain 1 morale.

659.text: The graveyard may be a sacred place to the water sentients, but it chills you to the bone. Go to [b]Location 452[/b].
The gravekeeper offers you safe passage. Go to [b]Location 660[/b].

660.text: You were once stung by a jellyfish, and you discovered soon after that it’s a myth that urinating on such a sting will alleviate the pain. You swim east away from them. Go to [b]Location 453[/b].
The sunbeams guide you toward the surface. Go to [b]Location 480[/b].

661.text: You pass by the vehicle on your way north. Choose one:

choices.option: Hijack the vehicle (if available; pay [fff349]1 take[-])
choices.outcome: You take the opportunity to grab the reins and steer it as you wish. Gain vehicle [b]Item 1013[/b] with 1 boost on it, then go to [b]Location 666[/b].

choices.option: Ignore the vehicle (or if it is not available)
choices.outcome: Go to [b]Location 666[/b].

661.text: The lush hills turn into an eerie, soggy marsh the farther south you reach. Go to [b]Location 245[/b].
The ocean floor drops just a few meters from the shore, enough that you can’t see the bottom. Go to [b]Location 368[/b].

662.text: A bright light under the waterfall beckons to you as you head north. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Go to cave [b]Location 028[/b].
Go to [b]Location 667[/b].

662.text: You can feel the humidity increase when you reach the marsh. Go to [b]Location 246[/b].

663.text: Bat-like animals dart in long flocks through the sky as you quietly wade around some sentients talking in a river. Go to [b]Location 247[/b].

664.text: The river is deep, and the bottom becomes muckier as you cross it. Go to [b]Location 248[/b].

665.text: The grass is so thick that you can’t see anything below your waist. Go to [b]Location 670[/b].
The river bottom is especially mucky, but otherwise the wade is pleasant. Go to [b]Location 249[/b].

666.text: A bridge across the stream is occupied, so you wade quietly through the water instead. Go to [b]Location 667[/b].

666.action: [2694d0]LEAP[-] south off the waterfall onto the soft grass below
666.text: You tuck into a roll expertly as you land, but the turtle-like creature nearby seems unimpressed. Go to [b]Location 661[/b].
This babbling brook leads into a vast ocean at the forest edge. Go to [b]Location 448[/b].

667.action: [2694d0]SNEAK[-] north past the ceremony (if you already interacted with the ceremony, reduce this cost to 1)
667.text: You quietly observe the ceremony as you head north. Gain 1 boost and go to [b]Location 672[/b].
You crash through the trees and bushes into a clearing. Go to [b]Location 662[/b].
With respect to the celebrants, you try to splash as little as possible. Go to [b]Location 666[/b].

668.text: The forest is so dense that you can’t see farther than a few paces ahead. Go to [b]Location 673[/b].

669.text: You climb over mossy fallen logs and cut hanging vines as you push northward. Go to [b]Location 674[/b].

670.text: The grove leads into a vast, hilly forest. Go to [b]Location 675[/b].
The field slopes slightly downward as you stroll to the south. Go to [b]Location 665[/b].

671.action: [2694d0]WADE[-] west into the shallows of a sea
671.text: The water is cool and refreshing, but you can’t shake the sense that you’re being watched. Go to [b]Location 449[/b].

672.action: [2694d0]SNEAK[-] north around the sentient (if the sentient is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
672.text: You walk silently through the lush grass toward a towering city in the distance. Go to [b]Location 677[/b].

672.action: [2694d0]SNEAK[-] south past a ceremony (if you already interacted with the ceremony, reduce this cost to 1)
672.text: There is love in the air as you head south through the forest. Go to [b]Location 667[/b].

673.text: The grassy path is well maintained; it’s much more difficult to traverse through the thicket. Go to [b]Location 678[/b].
Overgrown fallen trees are everywhere, their limbs akimbo, and it’s real exercise to climb over all of them. Go to [b]Location 668[/b].

674.text: Berries squish under your toes as you blaze past the path left by the animal. Go to [b]Location 679[/b].

674.action: [2694d0]TRAILBLAZE[-] south out of the forest into a field
674.text: It takes a moment for your eyes to adjust to the bright light of the sun in the open pasture, and when they do you notice red fungi stretching across it. Go to [b]Location 669[/b].

675.text: A trick of the light makes the animal in the distance appear ethereal. Go to [b]Location 680[/b].

675.action: [2694d0]TRAILBLAZE[-] south out of the forest into a meadow
675.text: As you emerge from the shadows of the forest, a glowing glyph hovers curiously above a stone. Go to [b]Location 670[/b].

676.text: You peek inside the building as you walk past, catching sight of a book, a key, a knife, and a crystal. Go to [b]Location 681[/b].
You step down the leafy embankment and walk out into the cool water until it comes up to your waist. Go to [b]Location 450[/b].

677.text: Tendrils of smoke trace up the long trunk of the massive tree-city. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Go to city [b]Location 519[/b] and gain 1 random skill.
Go to [b]Location 682[/b].

678.text: The forest is alive with gentle bird calls, quietly chatting sentients, and the occasional howl. Go to [b]Location 673[/b].

679.action: [2694d0]PUSH[-] north past the fungal animal (if the animal is no longer an obstacle, reduce the cost to 1)
679.text: The animal shoves you, and within seconds you’re surrounded by dozens of similar creatures. You must immediately choose either to [fd8c46]engage[-] them or to [ec1c3b]overpower[-] them:

choices.outcome: You belt out a few lines of your favorite song, and, to your delight, the fungi sway side to side in unison. They hum along as they allow you to proceed north, led by a youngling. Gain animal [b]Item 843[/b] and go north to [b]Location 684[/b].
You carve a path through the wretched beasts, sparing none. Gain item [b]Item 1162[/b] and [ec1c3b]1 overpower[-]; you may go north to [b]Location 684[/b].

679.text: You push aside through the climbers and step over mossy logs and into a small glade. Go to [b]Location 674[/b].

680.text: You cut through the bushes to reach a colorful tree. Go to [b]Location 675[/b].

681.text: If you already removed the threat of the hidden creature on this location, go north to [b]Location 686[/b]. Otherwise, as you pass through the trees, a great weight drops on you from above, sharp fangs digging into your neck (lose 1 health). You roll away to see your attacker, a large spider-like creature with teeth like a vampire. It poises to strike again. Choose how to respond:

choices.option: [2694d0]move-◆4-[b]DIVE[/b][-] west into the sea with great haste
choices.outcome: The beast doesn’t follow you into the water. Go to [b]Location 451[/b].
It’s a brutal battle, but you emerge victorious. Gain item [b]Item 1164[/b] and go north to [b]Location 686[/b].

681.text: The canopy is thick enough that little sun reaches the ground. Go to [b]Location 676[/b].
The forest ends abruptly at the edge of a vast ocean. Go to [b]Location 451[/b].

682.text: You clamber down branches from the canopy to the understory, where strange pendulous structures hang from the sturdy branches above you. Go to [b]Location 683[/b].
The forest is too thick for easy traversal, but the residents have created alternative options for navigating the canopy. Go to [b]Location 687[/b].

682.action: [2694d0]TREK[-] south into or around a city
682.text: The city smells of rich mahogany. Choose one:

choices.outcome: A bowl of worms props open the door to a shop. If you enter, read the result of [b]Location 519[/b] in the [a84fc0]look[-] storybook, then go to city [b]Location 519[/b]. Otherwise, go to city [b]Location 519[/b] and gain 1 random skill.
Go to [b]Location 677[/b].

683.action: [2694d0]DASH[-] north up the stairs to the right
683.text: The staircase takes you higher into the trees, the type of place any curious animal would love to perch. Go to [b]Location 688[/b].
As you move west you scale branches upward toward the canopy. Go to [b]Location 682[/b].

684.action: [2694d0]EVADE[-] north up the stairs around the winged animals
684.text: Roll 4 skill dice and gain all [a84fc0]look[-] results. Choose one:

choices.option: Pay [a84fc0]1 look[-] (or if you have already dealt with the threat of the beetle)
choices.outcome: Go to [b]Location 689[/b].

You fail to notice the hidden beetle on the left-side tree, waiting patiently for unsuspecting prey; you feel a sharp sting and tumble off the staircase (lose 1 health and go east to [b]Location 685[/b]).

685.action: [2694d0]TRAILBLAZE[-] north through the tangle of vines
685.text: You navigate through the thick snarls of vines to find yourself in front of some not-quite-ruins. Gain ability [b]Item 1484[/b] and go to [b]Location 690[/b].

686.text: The undergrowth is too dense for traveling on foot, so you ascend a tree instead. Go to [b]Location 687[/b].
Branches catch your augsuit as you blaze a path north. Go to [b]Location 691[/b].
The transition from forest to seaside is abrupt. Go to [b]Location 452[/b].

687.text: You’re getting a little nervous about being up so high, so you carefully head toward solid ground. Go to [b]Location 692[/b].

687.action: [2694d0]DESCEND[-] south to the base of the tree
687.text: The climb from the emergent layer down to the glow in the canopy below isn’t so far, but it’s difficult not to dwell on how far about the forest floor you are. Go to [b]Location 682[/b].

687.action: [2694d0]DESCEND[-] west, swinging from one branch to the next
687.text: The first swing is perilous, but you feel like an acrobat in flow for those that follow, moving seamlessly from branch to branch. Go to [b]Location 686[/b].

688.action: [2694d0]DESCEND[-] north down the tree trunks toward the base of a massive tree
688.text: The irregular branches make the climb down a tricky one, but you’re charmed by the wak-wak calls of the birds in the trees. Go to [b]Location 693[/b].
As you swing on the vine, you bellow out the victory cry of the bull ape, but after you land on a branch, you’re slightly embarrassed and hope no one heard you. Go to [b]Location 683[/b].

689.action: [2694d0]DESCEND[-] east from the canopy toward an ancient gateway
689.text: You clamber down the branches of trees to find a mostly functional gateway. Go to [b]Location 690[/b].

689.action: [2694d0]DESCEND[-] north from the canopy to the edge of the forest
689.text: You clamber down the towering trees to the forest floor and the impressive ruins below. Go to [b]Location 694[/b].

690.text: The forest quickly becomes a snarl of tall trees and long vines. Gain ability [b]Item 1484[/b] and go to [b]Location 685[/b].
You pull yourself up from branch to branch until you reach the canopy, high above the arched gateway below. Go to [b]Location 689[/b].

691.action: [2694d0]TREK[-] north around the tangle of roots
691.text: The roots are so plentiful that you almost twist your ankle. Go north to [b]Location 696[/b].
The thick vines you hack away appear to indicate that this part of the forest isn’t well-traveled. Go to [b]Location 686[/b].
The seawater flows right up to the forest edge. Go to [b]Location 453[/b].

692.action: [2694d0]EVADE[-] north through the animal’s giant legs as it stomps forward (if the animal is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
692.text: You weave between the animal’s legs, barely avoiding its massive tail. Go to [b]Location 697[/b].
The climb to the canopy is challenging, but you’re soothed by the gentle nuu-nuu calls of the birds in the forest. Go to [b]Location 687[/b].

693.text: In all the worlds you’ve visited, this is by far the largest tree you’ve ever seen. The trunk is speckled with climbers wearing a variety of colorful outfits, along with tags indicating routes and dangerous areas. Go to [b]Location 698[/b].
The long climb up the tall trees reveals a tower just to the north. Go to [b]Location 688[/b].

694.text: You trek around the ancient ruins to a grassy cliffside. Go to [b]Location 699[/b].
As you near the canopy, you hear… meowing? Go to [b]Location 689[/b].

695.text: An open plain lies just north of you, but the shortest path between two points is a straight line, and you clear branches and vines from that line with gusto. Go to [b]Location 386[/b].
You follow the path up to the farmhouse before taking to the bushes to avoid bothering the occupants. Go to [b]Location 700[/b].

696.text: You hike through the idyllic valley, the silhouette of the city looming in front of you. Go to [b]Location 761[/b].

696.action: [2694d0]TREK[-] south around a large wooden monument
696.text: As you walk around the monument, you realize that it’s a vast series of tree roots woven together. Go to [b]Location 691[/b].
You step into the gentle waves of an impossibly blue sea. Go to [b]Location 454[/b].

697.text: You hike through the misty forest to the towers of the city to the north. Go to [b]Location 767[/b].

698.text: The gold and green fields here are tranquil, even Elysian, but you press onward. Go to [b]Location 699[/b].
You walk through several patches of fog sitting in the small valleys between you and the towering city. Go to [b]Location 773[/b].

699.text: You give a celebratory high five to the levitating device. Gain [0b955e]2 help[-] and go to [b]Location 779[/b].
The towering ruins stand like a sentient over the serene valley. Go to [b]Location 694[/b].
With a running jump you cross to the wide-open pastures to the west. Go to [b]Location 698[/b].

700.action: [2694d0]FOLLOW[-] the path north across the rolling hills toward a sprawling city
700.text: The path leads to the outskirts of a city. Go to [b]Location 785[/b].
You stroll over the rolling countryside to a farm building that looks well maintained. Go to [b]Location 695[/b].

701.text: You steer clear of the glowing box, instead hiking up the steep, grassy incline to the north. Go to [b]Location 702[/b].

701.action: [2694d0]TREK[-] west toward a herd of animals
701.text: A distant herd grazes on the abundant grass; they take no notice of you. Go to [b]Location 387[/b].

702.action: [2694d0]HIKE[-] north up and down the steep hills
702.text: From a distance it seems that an orb is glowing to the north, but as you draw close, you realize it is actually a radiant sentient. Go to [b]Location 703[/b].
The silence of the lush valley puts you in a semi-meditative state. Go to [b]Location 701[/b].

703.action: [2694d0]EVADE[-] north past the slow sentient (if the sentient is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
703.text: You spin around a rocky column before darting north. Go to [b]Location 704[/b].
You stick to an old path as you trek south. Go to [b]Location 702[/b].

704.text: The path forks into dramatically different routes. Choose one:

choices.option: Hike north down into the cloudy valley
choices.outcome: Go to [b]Location 705[/b].

choices.option: Hike up the mountain path into the cave
choices.outcome: Go to cave [b]Location 050[/b].

705.action: [2694d0]HIKE[-] north down into the valley, steering far right
705.text: You weave through the peculiar rock formations and navigate a thick layer of clouds and emerge along a cliffside to see a colossal flying creature. Go to [b]Location 706[/b] and gain 1 morale.

705.action: [2694d0]HIKE[-] south up out of the clouds
705.text: The alpine landscape is beautiful in a severe way, and you have to remind yourself to watch your footing. Go to [b]Location 704[/b].

706.text: You are careful with every step into the mist as you hike into rocky terrain. Go to [b]Location 200[/b].
The anomalous geology of the area forces you to take a long, winding path up the hillside. Go to [b]Location 705[/b] and gain 1 morale.

707.action: [2694d0]HIKE[-] south around a large stone building

choices.outcome: The building is impressive and stately without being bombastic. Go to [b]Location 321[/b].

choices.option: Pay [a84fc0]1 look[-] to inspect the northern face of the building
choices.outcome: You find a secret entrance into the building. Go to interior [b]Location 567[/b].

708.text: You vault over a deep fissure in the ground and notice that the clouds here move a little strangely. Go to [b]Location 714[/b].

708.action: [2694d0]EVADE[-] north around the sentient (if the sentient is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
708.text: The sentient is apparently too hysterical to follow you. Go to [b]Location 709[/b].

709.action: [2694d0]CLIMB[-] north up a large column of stone and vines
709.text: You clamber around the massive column and try your hardest not to look down. Go to [b]Location 710[/b].

710.text: After you cross the stream feeding the waterfall, you slowly climb down the nearly sheer cliff face to a rocky plain below. Go to [b]Location 711[/b] and gain 1 morale.

710.action: [2694d0]DESCEND[-] south down a pillar of stone and vines
710.text: The climb down the stone column is demanding, but at least the rock formations here offer plenty of handholds. Go to [b]Location 709[/b].

711.action: [2694d0]ENTER[-] the ruins or [2694d0]HIKE[-] around the ruins to the north

choices.outcome: Lose 1 health unless the animal is no longer an obstacle, then go to interior [b]Location 547[/b].
Lose 1 health unless the animal is no longer an obstacle, then go north to [b]Location 712[/b].

711.text: The cool breeze offers a little relief during the long ascent, and at the top you find a grassy ledge eroded by a small waterfall. Go to [b]Location 710[/b] and gain 1 morale.

712.text: The long hike through the clouds leaves you tired. Go to [b]Location 201[/b].
Gain 1 morale. You may either enter some ancient ruins (go to interior [b]Location 547[/b]) or walk around them to location [b]Location 711[/b].

713.action: [2694d0]DESCEND[-] north through the clouds into the valley below
713.text: There’s something enigmatic about the cloud formations you climb through, but you can’t quite put it in words. Go to [b]Location 714[/b] and gain 1 morale.
You see a wide stone structure rise gently through the trees. Go to [b]Location 322[/b].

714.action: [2694d0]DASH[-] north past the slow sentient (if the sentient is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
714.text: The clouds part as you dash through them. Go to [b]Location 715[/b].
You vault across a narrow but deep gorge, and the clouds start to thin out as you move west. Go to [b]Location 708[/b].

715.text: Even with a running start and the mercifully lower gravity in this part of the world, you barely manage to clear the deep, cloudy fissure. Go to [b]Location 721[/b] and gain 1 morale.

715.action: [2694d0]CLIMB[-] north through a winding series of rock pillars
715.text: You slowly clamber up the bizarre, pillared landscape, and when you look down, you see that layers of mist shroud whatever surface lies far, far below. Go to [b]Location 716[/b] and gain 1 morale.

716.action: [2694d0]TREK[-] north toward the source of the waterfall
716.text: The slope is unforgiving, but the view is breathtaking. Go to [b]Location 717[/b].

716.action: [2694d0]DESCEND[-] south down rock pillars and floating boulders
716.text: You can’t see the bottoms of the interlocking chasms through the fog stirring between the irregular pillars—an observation you try to keep from your conscious mind as you painstakingly descend to a narrow land bridge below. Gain ability [b]Item 1491[/b] and 1 morale; go to [b]Location 715[/b].

717.action: [2694d0]BALANCE[-] north around the rim of the pool
717.text: Like one of your cats, you use both legs and arms to balance on the rock as you circumvent the pool. Go to [b]Location 718[/b].

717.action: [2694d0]TREK[-] south toward the head of a trail
717.text: The severe landscape here is gorgeous, and you have to remind yourself to watch your step. Go to [b]Location 716[/b].
You manage to scramble down the cliff face through a layer of fog to a rocky plain below. Go to [b]Location 711[/b] and gain 1 morale.

718.action: [2694d0]LEAP[-] north across the gap and stroll through a gap in the mountains
718.text: You find yourself in a sunny clearing occupied by a metal sentient. Go to [b]Location 202[/b].

718.action: [2694d0]BALANCE[-] south around a shimmering pool of water
718.text: You teeter on the water’s edge, tempted to jump in. Go to [b]Location 717[/b].

719.text: The long climb through the layers of clouds to the humid valley below is tiring. Go to [b]Location 720[/b] and gain 1 morale.

720.action: [2694d0]CLIMB[-] south to a mountain peak above the clouds
720.text: The climb along the bare rock face through strata of clouds is exhausting. Go to [b]Location 719[/b] and gain 1 morale.

721.action: [2694d0]DASH[-] east ahead of the falling rocks
721.text: The rocks are fast, but in the low gravity here you manage to be faster. Go to [b]Location 727[/b].

721.action: [2694d0]DODGE[-] north through the avalanche of boulders
721.text: You leap for your life as you spring frog-like through the unceasing, erratic cascade of boulders. Go to [b]Location 722[/b] and gain 1 morale.
Even with the forgivingly low gravity in this part of the world, you barely manage to clear the bottomless-looking fissure. Go to [b]Location 715[/b] and gain 1 morale.

722.text: Clearing this particular gap ignites in you an unexpectedly strong sense of satisfaction. Go to [b]Location 723[/b] and gain 1 morale.

722.action: [2694d0]DODGE[-] south through the cascade of boulders
722.text: The deafening crashing of the boulders is as disorienting as it is worrying, but you manage to weave to safety through the relentless avalanche of stone. Go to [b]Location 721[/b] and gain 1 morale.

723.text: The clouds here are thick, and you have to backtrack along trails more than once. Go to [b]Location 724[/b].
A break in the thick clouds reveals the cliff on the other side of the gap, and with a running start you manage to clear the break. Go to [b]Location 722[/b] and gain 1 morale.

724.text: The dense fog slows your progress through the mountains, but you manage to reach a small, rocky plain. Go to [b]Location 723[/b].

725.text: Your arm hair stands on end as you approach two spires to the east. Go to [b]Location 409[/b].
The green gully stretches far into the distance. Go to [b]Location 726[/b].

726.action: [2694d0]GUIDE[-] the pair of sentients away from the aggressor (if the massive creature is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
726.text: The sentients give you a small token of their appreciation (gain item [b]Item 876[/b]) before scampering away. Go north to [b]Location 727[/b], east to [b]Location 410[/b], south to [b]Location 725[/b], or west to [b]Location 720[/b].
You spot a signpost to the south that might help explain the strange runes in this region. Go to [b]Location 725[/b].

727.text: The welcoming committee leaves something to be desired, but you’ve never seen a city carved into a cliffside before. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Go to city [b]Location 523[/b] and gain 1 random skill.
Go to [b]Location 728[/b].

727.action: [2694d0]DODGE[-] west toward the source of the falling rocks
727.text: Probably this route isn’t the safest way to go west from here, but you manage to dodge the boulders spinning down the hill. Go to [b]Location 721[/b].

728.action: [2694d0]DESCEND[-] north under the sentient into the valley
728.text: There’s something unsettling about the air in the valley. Go to [b]Location 729[/b].

728.action: [2694d0]HIKE[-] south either into the city or around it
728.text: Low gravity or not, the blustery weather and constant cascade of rocks makes the city a dangerous one to navigate. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Go to [b]Location 727[/b].

choices.option: [2694d0]ENTER[-] the city through a back entrance
choices.outcome: Go to city [b]Location 523[/b].

729.action: [2694d0]EVADE[-] north past the elemental (if the elemental is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
729.text: You give the elemental and the maelstrom of rocks roaring around it a wide berth as you slip off to the north. Go to [b]Location 730[/b]; if this action’s cost was not reduced to 1, also gain 1 morale.

730.text: At the north edge of the mining complex is an endless archipelago of floating rocks. Go to [b]Location 204[/b].

730.action: [2694d0]SNEAK[-] south to face the elemental (if the elemental is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
730.text: The whirlwind of rocks is dangerous and unsettling, but at least it makes you harder to spot. Go to [b]Location 729[/b]; if this action’s cost was not reduced to 1, also gain 1 morale.

731.action: [2694d0]SWIM[-] south to a hut perched on a tiny island
731.text: You swim away from the flotsam through the warm water to the cabana beyond. Go to [b]Location 476[/b].
You follow the trail of wreckage to the western shoreline. Go to [b]Location 432[/b].

732.action: [2694d0]SWIM[-] far north to a hidden cove
732.text: It’s a long but leisurely swim, and as you approach the cove you see something glowing above the waves. Go to [b]Location 733[/b].

733.text: The humidity in the jungle has you sweating buckets as you head north. Go to [b]Location 734[/b].

733.action: [2694d0]SWIM[-] far south toward an overgrown island
733.text: As you swim closer to the island, you realize that the vines and foliage are covering the husk of a spaceship. Go to [b]Location 732[/b].

734.text: You slash through the jungle, breaking free into the desert. Go to [b]Location 735[/b].
You blaze through the thick jungle, circumventing a landmark that seems to attract a number of sentients. Go to [b]Location 733[/b].

The bridge leads into a dark passage through the pillar of stone. Roll 4 skill dice and gain all [a84fc0]look[-] results. If you pay [a84fc0]1 look[-], you find something in the darkness (gain item [b]Item 1263[/b]). Go west to [b]Location 435[/b].

735.text: You immediately regret going out into the sun, as the sand is scorching hot. Suffer 1 heat damage and go to [b]Location 736[/b].
The desert abruptly changes into a jungle as you head south. Go to [b]Location 734[/b].

736.text: Despite your careful steps, several wedges of glass slice your skin. Lose 1 health and go to [b]Location 486[/b].
South of the field of glass is a sentient concentrating in the sun. You duck into some shade to observe them. Go to [b]Location 735[/b].

737.text: You swim east toward several sentients. Go to [b]Location 743[/b].
You step over the floating barrier and wade through the knee-high water around the nearby island to one farther in the distance. Go to [b]Location 738[/b].

738.action: [2694d0]WADE[-] north toward a towering island in the distance

choices.outcome: Go to city [b]Location 527[/b] and gain 1 random skill:
As you wade through the tide, you pass through the orb on the right. Look at page 5 of the Book of Vantages; your current area is SE-2. Gain 1 boost and go to [b]Location 739[/b].

738.text: The netting around this island prevents you from getting too close to shore, but you can still stand in the shallow water. Go to [b]Location 737[/b].

739.text: It seems that everywhere you swim in this archipelago features another lush, populated island. Go to [b]Location 745[/b].
You pull yourself ashore and hack through a small but thick jungle and into a pleasant glade. Go to [b]Location 740[/b].

You hear the relaxed revelry of people presumably having a better week than you are. Choose one:Go to city [b]Location 527[/b].Circumnavigate the city toward another island (go to location [b]Location 738[/b]).

740.text: As you emerge from the jungle the towering gateway comes into clear view, a yellow sunset still impossibly glowing through it. Go to [b]Location 741[/b].
As you swim by, raucous cheers spill out from an overgrown but not quite natural-looking island. Go to [b]Location 739[/b].

741.action: [2694d0]TRUDGE[-] north across the sand around the gateway
741.text: Based on what you can see through the gateway, you have two options: desert here or desert there. You’re already here, so you head north around the gateway. Go to [b]Location 742[/b].
You cut vines to forge a path—however temporary—to an open glade. Go to [b]Location 740[/b].

742.action: [2694d0]EVADE[-] north past the surprisingly speedy sentient (if the sentient is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
742.text: You dash around the monumental sentient and don’t stop until you reach a chasm. Go to [b]Location 487[/b]; if this action’s cost was not reduced to 1, also gain 1 morale.
As you kick up sand, you come upon a stone arch, the center of which looks out of place. Go to [b]Location 741[/b].

743.action: [2694d0]WADE[-] east toward some stones in the water
743.text: As you wade east, a pink ink-like substance seeps around you in the water. Go to [b]Location 749[/b].
The ocean floor drops off precipitously, and all you can see below you are hazy silhouettes of tall, organic structures. Go to [b]Location 478[/b].

As you swim, you take a moment to appreciate how amazing it is that this planet has all the elements of life that you need to survive. The ship could have crashed on far worse worlds. Go to [b]Location 737[/b].

744.text: You wade peacefully through the shallow water to another inhabited island. Go to [b]Location 745[/b].

745.text: You wade through the gentle currents toward a cluster of bright orange huts on the next island south. Go to [b]Location 744[/b].
As you swim through the calm water, you notice that no boats sail through this part of the archipelago. Go to [b]Location 739[/b].

746.text: Apparently because of some hydrologic anomaly, the humid jungle abruptly gives way to dry desert hills. Go to [b]Location 747[/b].

747.text: The walk is tiring. “I don’t like sand,” you think to yourself. “It’s coarse and rough and irritating and it gets everywhere.” Go to [b]Location 748[/b].

747.action: [2694d0]TRAILBLAZE[-] south out of the desert through the dense jungle
747.text: When you emerge from the jungle, you find yourself in a secluded resort. Go to [b]Location 746[/b].

748.text: The sounds of the city are soon replaced by the cheers of racing fans. Go to [b]Location 754[/b].
The sandstone and glass structures are even more impressive as you near the city. Choose one:

choices.outcome: You find a dusty back entrance. Go to city [b]Location 531[/b].
Go to [b]Location 488[/b].

748.text: You find some respite from the heat in the shade of a large, sun-bleached plant. Go to [b]Location 747[/b].

749.text: You quickly find yourself in deeper yet calmer waters. Go to [b]Location 479[/b].
By remaining close to the shoreline, you’re able to wade west instead of swimming. Go to [b]Location 743[/b].

750.text: The current pushes you toward the rocky shoreline. Go to [b]Location 756[/b].

750.action: [2694d0]EVADE[-] north around the kraken (if the kraken is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
750.text: You swim a long course through the choppy waters surrounding the colossal sea creature and reach a (much calmer) shoreline. Go to [b]Location 751[/b]; if this action’s cost was not reduced to 1, also gain 1 morale.

751.text: The trek is long, and as you crest the mountain ridge you feel static build up in your augsuit. Go to [b]Location 752[/b].

751.action: [2694d0]EVADE[-] south past the kraken (if the kraken is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
751.text: You swim a long way around the thrashing behemoth. Go to [b]Location 750[/b]; if this action’s cost was not reduced to 1, also gain 1 morale.

752.action: [2694d0]EVADE[-] north past the elemental (if the elemental is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
752.text: The air is thick with the static of the elemental’s discharges, giving you the feeling you’re being watched, but you don’t seem to have aroused the elemental’s interest. Go to [b]Location 753[/b]; if this action’s cost was not reduced to 1, also gain 1 morale.
The terrain quickly becomes more pleasant and you saunter down a long, sloping grassy hill. Go to [b]Location 751[/b].

753.text: The members of the caravan don’t seem to mind you bringing up the rear; “bandit bait,” one of them mutters. Go to [b]Location 754[/b].

753.action: [2694d0]SNEAK[-] south past a hulking elemental (if the elemental is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
753.text: Even before you see the elemental, you can feel an ominous static charge building up in your augsuit. Go to [b]Location 752[/b]; if this action’s cost was not reduced to 1, also gain 1 morale.

754.text: You avoid the clouds of dust spun up by the racers. Go to [b]Location 489[/b].
The walk south offers some sporadic—but highly welcome—patches of shade. Go to [b]Location 753[/b].

755.text: The tide guides you through the rocks that jut out of the water. Go to [b]Location 756[/b].
As you swim south the wreckage thins out and the islands give way to the wide sea beyond. Go to [b]Location 480[/b].

756.text: The tide presses relentlessly toward the shore, offsetting every two strokes of progress north with one to the east. Go to [b]Location 757[/b].
While you swim the waves carry the occasional splinter or broken board past you. Go to [b]Location 755[/b].

756.action: [2694d0]WADE[-] west toward a large, pink beast
756.text: The tide tugs at your body as you wade west, but you keep your footing. Go to [b]Location 750[/b].

757.text: As you swim east, the crystal clear water turns a darker shade, possibly the result of pollution from the nearby city. Go to [b]Location 457[/b].
Halfway up the slick rocks your fingers already ache, and you can’t help but feel that these cliffs are better suited for admiring than for climbing. Go to [b]Location 758[/b] and gain 1 morale.
Never straying too far from the shoreline, you make your way through a rocky arch to the next beach to the south. Go to [b]Location 756[/b].

758.action: [2694d0]EVADE[-] north around the beast (if the beast is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
758.text: The beast is preoccupied and you manage to avoid its attention (or perhaps it’s decided that you would be too insubstantial a snack to be worth the effort of chasing you down). Go to [b]Location 759[/b]; if this action’s cost was not reduced to 1, also gain 1 morale.
The landscape changes rapidly as you hurry down the slope toward a flash of blue. Go to [b]Location 757[/b].

759.text: You awkwardly trudge down the hot sand toward the edge of a vast city. Go to [b]Location 459[/b].

759.action: [2694d0]DASH[-] north past the sentients (if the sentients are no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
759.text: The sentients can’t resist a good footrace, and they applaud your speed. Go to [b]Location 760[/b]; if this action’s cost was not reduced to 1, also gain 1 morale.

076.text: As you race forward, the floor gives out from under you and you tumble into a pit. Lose 1 health and go to interior [b]Location 799[/b].

760.text: The clamor of battle gives way to the roar of the crashing waves below. Go to [b]Location 460[/b].
You sneak around the edge of the fighting and, at least for the moment, the battle is someone else’s problem. Go to [b]Location 490[/b].

761.action: [2694d0]WALK[-] north along the path outside the city
761.text: A wall sits directly to the north. Choose one:

choices.outcome: The path leads to a beach. Go to [b]Location 456[/b].

choices.option: Pay [2694d0]1 move[-] to climb the wall
choices.outcome: Go to [b]Location 762[/b].

761.action: [2694d0]TREK[-] south far away from the city
761.text: As the city recedes behind you, you find yourself among rolling green hills. Go to [b]Location 696[/b].

762.text: One of the few gates in the massive wall surrounding the capital city happens to be just south of here. Go to [b]Location 761[/b].

762.action: [2694d0]DESCEND[-] west from the city wall into the moat
762.text: You gag at the smell of fish and salt as you descend from the wall out of the city. Go to [b]Location 456[/b].

763.action: [2694d0]FOLLOW[-] a sentient north through the city
763.text: With so many possible places to go in this city, you decide to follow someone who seems to know where they’re going. Soon they’re joined by others in the streets heading in the same direction. Go to [b]Location 764[/b].

763.action: [2694d0]SQUEEZE[-] west through gaps in the old city ruins along the shoreline
763.text: Almost immediately after squeezing through the wall, it’s much quieter, almost serene. Go to [b]Location 457[/b].

764.text: You slip through a gate as the sentients’ euphoria and merriment carries on behind you. Go to [b]Location 458[/b].

765.text: Several vacant houses are built into the city wall, allowing easy passage to the west. Go to [b]Location 459[/b].

766.action: [2694d0]FOLLOW[-] the balloon from the city below as it drifts to the north
766.text: The balloon moves slowly enough that it’s no trouble to track it, but you do have to climb over the city wall to keep pace with it. Go to [b]Location 345[/b].

766.action: [2694d0]WADE[-] west out of the city through a shipyard
766.text: To the west is a large gateway for ships to pass in and out of the city. Several vessels are under construction just outside of the gate. Go to [b]Location 460[/b].

767.text: It’s a long walk through the forest and to the pastures beyond. Go to [b]Location 697[/b].

768.action: [2694d0]WALK[-] west through the busy city streets
768.text: You emerge in a grove inside the city walls. Go to [b]Location 762[/b].

769.text: When you reach the bottom of the long staircase, you’re greeted by the sounds and smells of a harbor. Go to [b]Location 770[/b].

770.text: You’re grateful for years of exercise up and down the steps at your house. Go to [b]Location 769[/b].

771.text: After you land on the other side of the canal, you find yourself at the base of a massive, open-air building. Choose one:

choices.option: Pay [2694d0]1 move[-] to enter the building
choices.outcome: Go to interior [b]Location 583[/b].

choices.option: Walk up to the path leading away from the building
choices.outcome: Go to [b]Location 777[/b].

772.text: This might not be the cleanest waterway in which you’ve swum; eventually you pull yourself ashore in front of a looming tower. Go to [b]Location 346[/b].

773.text: Apparently uninterested in looking for a more conventional route to the city, you climb over the wall and find yourself in a searingly hot industrial district. Go to [b]Location 774[/b].

773.action: [2694d0]TREK[-] south across a pleasant green pasture
773.text: You walk in and out of patches of fog as the sounds of the city give way to the chirping of birds. Go to [b]Location 698[/b].

774.action: [2694d0]EVADE[-] north around the fiery sentient (if the sentient is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
774.text: Sentients or no sentients, flames are everywhere in this district, and you barely manage to avoid catching fire as you head north. Go to [b]Location 775[/b].

774.action: [2694d0]DESCEND[-] south down the wall out of the city
774.text: Even the massive city wall here is hot to the touch, but you find immediate relief on the other side. Go to [b]Location 773[/b].

775.action: [2694d0]HIDE[-] in the bushes until the sentient passes (reduce this cost to 1 if the sentient is no longer an obstacle)
775.text: You feel like a little kid again as you hide in the bushes. Go north to [b]Location 776[/b].

776.text: You navigate through the sprawling web of market stalls, where vendors swap stamps, books, fabrics, and a thousand other items. Go to [b]Location 777[/b].

777.action: [2694d0]SNEAK[-] up the path while the sentry is on the other side of the building
777.text: The path leads to a majestic building. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Go to interior [b]Location 583[/b].
Go to [b]Location 778[/b].

777.text: The canal runs north to south from a harbor through the city. Your leap clears it with room to spare. Go to [b]Location 771[/b].

778.text: You’ve reached the northern edge of the city, and you exit through a gap in the wall. Go to [b]Location 347[/b].

778.action: [2694d0]HIKE[-] south toward a building on a hill
778.text: You push through ornamental foliage and see the entrance to a grand building on the hill. Choose one:

choices.option: Pay [2694d0]1 move[-] to enter the building
choices.outcome: Go to interior [b]Location 583[/b].
Go to [b]Location 777[/b].

778.text: You dive into the cool waters of the bay below. Go to [b]Location 772[/b].

779.text: The ivy makes the wall quite easy to climb. Go to [b]Location 780[/b].
It’s a long hike across a plain and through a forest, and you’re happy when the noisy bustle of the city gives way to the gentle oom-ing of birds. Go to [b]Location 699[/b] and gain 1 morale.

078.text: You try not to look down as you descend the tower. Go to [b]Location 347[/b] and gain 1 morale.
The wind presses you against the tower as you make the steep descent. Go to [b]Location 176[/b] and gain 1 morale.
The tower has few handholds, but you’ve trained with less. Go to [b]Location 346[/b] and gain 1 morale.
You feel like you’re on top of the world as you slide down the side of the tower. Go to [b]Location 345[/b] and gain 1 morale.

780.action: [2694d0]SWIM[-] south out of the city via the rapids
780.text: The aqueduct acts as a water slide, jetting you out into the city moat. Go to [b]Location 779[/b].

781.text: You’re impressed by the extensive system of aqueducts and canals in this city. Go to [b]Location 787[/b].

782.action: [2694d0]SNEAK[-] north around the sentients (if the sentients are no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
782.text: You slip through the dense greenery to an open street to the north. Go to [b]Location 783[/b].

783.action: [2694d0]EVADE[-] the sentients as you proceed north
783.text: The street leads to a glimmering building. Choose one:

choices.option: Pay [a84fc0]1 look[-] to find a secret entrance
choices.outcome: Go to cave [b]Location 030[/b].

choices.option: Follow the street to the north
choices.outcome: Go to [b]Location 784[/b].

783.action: [2694d0]SNEAK[-] south past a few sentients (if the sentients are no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
783.text: You sneak past several leaf sentients as you head south toward a lush garden. Go to [b]Location 782[/b].

784.text: Beyond the northern city wall you can see windswept dustlands. Go to [b]Location 348[/b].

785.text: You pull yourself up to the entrance of the city, just behind a group of armed guards. You can either proceed into the city to the northwest (go to [b]Location 780[/b]) or follow the guards north atop the wall surrounding the city (go to [b]Location 786[/b]).
Your legs are soon caked in mud as you wade under the bridge. Go to [b]Location 389[/b].
You decide you’d rather splash around in the muck, no matter what the bridge toll may be. Go to [b]Location 388[/b].
The bustling noise of the city fades as you hike through the rolling grassland to the south. Go to [b]Location 700[/b].

785.action: [2694d0]WADE[-] west against a torrent of water gushing out of the city
785.text: You push against the water, which turns out to be refreshingly clean. Go to [b]Location 779[/b].

786.action: [2694d0]DESCEND[-] east down a narrow staircase leading out of the city
786.text: The narrow width of the staircase reminds you of the conservation of space on your ship. Go to [b]Location 389[/b].

786.action: [2694d0]DESCEND[-] south down the wall into the city moat
786.text: You can’t find a staircase down from the wall, so you do your best to rappel down the ancient stones. Go to [b]Location 785[/b].

787.text: You find that it is much easier to exit the capital city than to enter. Go to [b]Location 390[/b].
You try not to think about the possibility of slipping on the slick rocks as you leap across the gap. Go to [b]Location 781[/b].

788.text: A sentient, noticing your desire to leave, presses a combination of stones in the wall to open a slim gap. Go to [b]Location 391[/b].
Go to [b]Location 789[/b], grabbing what you think is a piece of fruit as you go. Gain item [b]Item 1021[/b].

789.text: You walk down an alley that ends in a small gate leading out of the city. Go to [b]Location 392[/b].
You dash past and find yourself in a park that feels, for lack of a better word, magical. Go north to [b]Location 790[/b].

079.action: [2694d0]DODGE[-] boulders as you proceed down toward the central pillar
079.text: Inside the pillar is a narrow, dark staircase that leads you even deeper into the planet. Go to cave [b]Location 046[/b] and gain 1 morale.

790.text: You drop from the branches of a tree directly in front of a monstrous elemental. Go to [b]Location 393[/b].
Vast dunes await you to the north of the capital city. Go to [b]Location 349[/b].

791.action: [2694d0]SWIM[-] far north to a hidden cove after exiting the crumbling ship
791.text: The swim is long but the water is a pleasant temperature, and as you near the cove you see something glowing above it. Go to [b]Location 733[/b].

080.action: [2694d0]DASH[-] north past the sentient (if the sentient is no longer an obstacle, reduce the cost to 1)
080.text: You crash through a thin wall in the rear of the cavern. Advance deeper into the planet to dungeon [b]Location 014[/b]; keep this location for reference.

801.text: You belly flop into the waves and tread water toward a large device floating in the water. Go to [b]Location 405[/b].
You dive into the water with a mighty splash and drift to shore. Go to [b]Location 309[/b].
You swan dive into the sea and let the current pull you to shore. Go to [b]Location 374[/b].
You plunge into the water and float to the edge of an island. Go to [b]Location 308[/b].

081.text: Several wires lead through a cramped passage that thankfully widens after a brief moment of panic. Advance deeper into the planet to dungeon [b]Location 015[/b]; keep this location for reference.

082.text: Confident on the ice, you break off a piece of the crystal as you glide past it. Gain item [b]Item 1160[/b]. The frozen stream slopes downward, leading you deeper into the planet. Go to cave [b]Location 047[/b].

083.action: [2694d0]PUSH[-] north through some glowing sediment in the rear of the cavern
083.text: Your hands are caked with dirt as you stumble into a narrow passage. Advance deeper into the planet to dungeon [b]Location 016[/b]; keep this location for reference.

085.action: [2694d0]EXIT[-] north out of the sweaty arena
085.text: You stink of sweat, smoke, and spilled booze by the time you reach the far side of the room. Advance deeper into the planet to dungeon [b]Location 019[/b]; keep this location for reference.

086.text: If you aim your long leap at the crystal perfectly by paying [a84fc0]1 look[-] or 1 boost, you land on top of it, breaking off a piece (gain item [b]Item 1162[/b]). Either way, you follow the passage on the far side of the magma, barely avoiding increasingly large shards that protrude from the cave walls. Advance deeper into the planet to cave [b]Location 049[/b].

087.action: [2694d0]SCALE[-] north up the scaffolding toward an exit
087.text: At the top, you find a narrow, unguarded passage that leads even deeper into the planet. Go to cave [b]Location 049[/b].

088.action: [2694d0]PUSH[-] east through the soft, glowing sediment
088.text: The soil gives way, and you emerge even deeper into the planet to dungeon [b]Location 017[/b]; keep this location for reference.

The roots are endless, and there is a moment when you wonder if you’ve gone too far. It’s then that you see a staircase spiraling around the massive roots. You follow it up into a bustling city. Go to city [b]Location 519[/b] and gain 1 morale

089.action: [2694d0]EXIT[-] the cavern, careful not to trigger the lasers
089.text: The laser array is set up to prevent someone from entering the cave, but not necessarily someone who is trying to leave. Go to cave [b]Location 029[/b].

090.text: You climb a narrow flight of stairs, at the top of which are some overgrown bushes. Pushing them aside, you emerge in the middle of some ancient ruins. Go to interior [b]Location 548[/b].

091.action: [2694d0]SNEAK[-] north past the serpent (if the serpent is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
091.text: With great care, you tiptoe past the serpent toward a narrow passage. Go deeper into the planet to dungeon [b]Location 594[/b]; keep this location for reference. If this action’s cost was not reduced to 1, also gain 1 morale

092.action: [2694d0]SWIM[-] north through one of the rear openings to proceed deeper into the cave
092.text: After a short swim, you bizarrely pull yourself out horizontally through a wall of water into an open cave. Advance deeper into the planet to cave [b]Location 049[/b].

093.action: [2694d0]TREK[-] north over the top of the maze
093.text: The journey feels endless, as no path leads directly to the far exit. Finally you reach the light at the end of the tunnel. Go deeper into the planet to cave [b]Location 043[/b] and gain 1 morale

094.text: You hug the steel walls of the cave as you move around the city. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Go to dungeon [b]Location 595[/b]. Keep this location for reference.

choices.option: Find a back entrance to the city
choices.outcome: Roll 3 skill dice and keep all [a84fc0]look[-] results. If you pay [a84fc0]1 look[-], go to city [b]Location 041[/b]. Otherwise, go deeper into the planet to dungeon [b]Location 595[/b] and keep this location for reference.

095.text: You head north, trying to avoid stepping on any eggs. Roll 2 skill dice and gain all [2694d0]move[-] results. Unless you pay 1 [2694d0]move[-], you accidentally crush one of the eggs, and their parent swipes at you (lose 1 health). Proceed deeper into the planet to dungeon [b]Location 596[/b]; keep this location for reference.

096.action: [2694d0]EVADE[-] the dragon (if the animal is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
096.text: The dragon must not be hungry, as it shows no interest in chasing you, even after you exit the tunnel into its vast golden grotto. Advance deeper into the planet to cave [b]Location 045[/b].

097.action: [2694d0]DASH[-] north through the glowing door in the rear of the cavern (if the noxious gas is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
097.text: You bolt through the nauseating miasma, and soon it thins out enough to be unnoticeable. Advance deeper into the planet to dungeon [b]Location 598[/b]; keep this location for reference.

098.action: [2694d0]LEAP[-] north from one root to the next
098.text: Skipping the labyrinthian staircases, you soar directly to the glowing exit. Go deeper into the planet to cave [b]Location 044[/b].

099.text: Deep in the cavern, you discover a narrow passage. Advance deeper into the planet to dungeon [b]Location 599[/b]; keep this location for reference.
